Friends,

It’s clear as day that Joe Biden doesn’t care about the crime that’s destroying beautiful cities in America from coast to coast.

Joe Biden’s more concerned about what flavor ice cream he’s having that day than making sure families feel safe. **That’s got to stop, and we’ve got to give our brave law enforcement officers they support that they need to defend themselves and maintain law and order in our beautiful nation.** | [**ACT HERE TO STOP CRIME**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=6428ea36cf824854b374f518e8cc3df1&_e=NEQm6cQB8SneWYrru3aKJ-hBmSInZp3CXbpsw6IjzOKu4s5sKCpY9ipfF0Nb_hmOeyi2mzVmLJoSEPn2gPVODXAb998uplAf8j6i3-8nd4mxthoI_QYydhcfZcEr5ivS1KrUE2q-JZ6GYmHHPgp3hxffNlnymKjcZINIIGV3zQWznC2d3jMMQJlAzMqa5Zo4YXAoTVdQQMLiwp37YIaH7OnM4Djc4810oKuVIeKLqIHA-Ob3xLFNBxGk3Vhcfsegt2TLJQof5E-8-A8kBOJBvPmpJ_azy7EEV5zdPqbtz6PrHA7YRSLBhhW0KDwxzOMGfUE90M7U522vxs-lNO0iyFn9-fZafrG9eqg6OVKh4QaQvp49Vo2jHUo25QzQRciDWKBRErSyf-L-5uqIoQ3t9us9RlZ4ki6ceaBhbvmuxMfz7V-USLzr8UMnMCiqXR7Jg3X0NzOj08nYN8hWc8ZR-Peqfn7QRbLGK-a8fYYbtblDW-frhLbDdO7Sn_Bk5FBhl9HJTZhvGuZ_c5H6zHh6IA%3D%3D)

I am working every day to support women through advocating for policies like the Violence Against Women Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, and the Child Tax Credit.

| Today is International Women’s Day — an important opportunity to reflect on the incredible accomplishments of women across our history and culture.

As one of the youngest women ever in Congress, I am especially grateful for the hard work and trailblazing legacies of the women who came before me. I am working every day to support women through advocating for policies like the Violence Against Women Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, and the Child Tax Credit. And as a co-chair of recruitment at the DCCC, I’m helping lead the charge to elect more Democratic women to Congress.

[_**If you want to support my work, I hope you’ll consider contributing to my re-election campaign so that I can keep advocating to ensure equity, fairness, and dignity for all women.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739945/334143502/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220308-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmY1NDdiMi0zZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-CgtQLjG8W8hExdGkxrT-iuQ0b3VdMBgKlzH50df3ZQ=)

body:
one down, one to go... | |
---
Team,

It’s been another busy week on the campaign trail! Check out what we’ve been focused on this week.

[🚨](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a0ae491a0b074e54835251c72688e097&_e=VH0fUp43KvZ0ok7DyhN_4pff2pfGQ_zoxZ0bXczCewICUTH2VVYxsSiS2NywTrekAoNmc3tPKD7ppWQYhDZAFaI-Uso01bvAF0kdXRH92dFP4vPJGYbBB5-s30bQpsc8DDT6yF3swsfJICg6U8EcQJztrvf3lXle2qHVtlNltljmd8hLMjXZMHNEOm338mclz6XkbzlagHl-9n2w2I-nCju-4HWPbsrmqxECLKKwzy4ChwB2F2NJ3cf5pzPgsWCePuLLapYTHC9TgTCI_N57viKPsTLrhe4iDDJvdVqpo2vxfBGzkNRY-feISRBRgStrEdbzjwjNkg4vbgQBFTjK09yIL6EDKfOBQ1OpYbX5sAcjlue6CMdHjE61LUepVdWTZYT5hiZmEcZ4wA86vm4-Ft0SWKKtyBd_FJjX_oVD4u1SOEGc4ybf9GakfC_ifu5Vkbk6RBbgEP8lmiesX8n1YvCGn-9A1moTAJNyjI9NaKs%3D)**FIRST, MIKE MADIGAN... NEXT, J.B. PRITZKER**

The announcement of the indictment of former Democrat House Speaker Michael Madigan has been a long time coming. Madigan is the very face of Illinois corruption. He leveraged his position as House speaker to gain new business for his property tax firm. And he orchestrated a pay-to-play scheme with ComEd, diverting thousands of dollars to his favorite lobbyists to gain his support for legislation in Springfield.

At a time when J.B. Pritzker is **[using taxpayer money to remove a patronage watchdog over his administration](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a0ae491a0b074e54835251c72688e097&_e=VH0fUp43KvZ0ok7DyhN_4spMJHShBhA4bCt5hy11OZtGBfIN2LUqumjO02rXQ3eUn_eHNxIzv6QUv_xJkHNr87OzZYLitLg-qXMjrWw9c8QRbIfhdTFXgfgipVLMNYLbRWBs8qbfMsFORD7ReLImkHtdbvdZLtKanVldxrkqp5wH_J13luN58Ydwx_34fksQ4hEdHRm5CayYI1ofAl39on4N6_Db6Mv_4hVqxFZpLD3dnjdNh8kzrQwPIwtcYGC-uhFvJujbFeUotM0IkJSyfJOn8BZJA6atczpwfzjzofPaYz8SCotZDq3RzKKydNTCH9FfmgtnewGyvGCgKKPBcGMvFPkTnYL1I70S2xxiZqj-e6xe6aMRG7Ih84Eiueh2Mz7EKTyZUPXam6ombwhxKpNyFI-DbWwdlXkgv285lx9wQVwa6zzVEy0oUy7swc30mqT2urwtvs126KS9d4Pu3ontHXDdcP4Cr4BvDj8M-zU053Jy2fZgvlYlyjVIS9AK),** we are reminded once again that career politicians and political insiders **[cannot be trusted to have the best interests of Illinoisans at heart](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a0ae491a0b074e54835251c72688e097&_e=VH0fUp43KvZ0ok7DyhN_4spMJHShBhA4bCt5hy11OZtGBfIN2LUqumjO02rXQ3eUsZFDNGpSbxFXYDbSkUrC-6UPGWdU1MEACYhyJK5nbJvameus8BwIBCDuVBiGC-kpj8xBLyiTtKlTFy7npWvpHj0neFcaaW_eEUKvAyEp6sJDSHE9xrSpJrPLzkiXf6_zE5Jl2IZ5k1L6a0jENBURBgx972M7aXO6JxGq-AeASJy_pzO26-1sk_ynnsyKHAxNKI8E5quvBDZGjeODTeA3h1qsY1sD5CHGKXgBUdgAf7wI1v12KdmsTNC9w_2fDBZD3WUlpKBo86LudBXrKQ5g2KPxFuaTozBMnPn3ytwLfuKgm48RgU2GRLl4fIBDMBLbz-Kj07HHtnNdYeonOn8IGPGTviuorg0h_xhpISYucgS2TjTjevmGH66TNU1Kw_Lw1Y3zqCRN2qUZc0T6BQGqSxnGCVB1PrnTmCukxAUN8dp2tO7qlzJkqfzLPYgBOhui)**. name: =?utf-8?q?Carly_Pe=C3=B1a=2C_PramilaForCongress=2Ecom?=
subject: Hey Peter, it's nice to meet you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As the new organizer for this incredible team, I am excited about joining this movement and what the future holds.
#
Hey Peter, my name is Carly — an organizer with Team Jayapal. It's nice to meet you.
In a moment, I'm going to tell you more about me and why this work is so important — but before I do, [**please consider contributing $3 or any amount to our campaign right now to help sustain our work in this critical election year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220308?refcode=em20220308-1087&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=1087_420207_8Xx7uK&akid=1087%2E420207%2E8Xx7uK)
As the new organizer for this incredible team, I am excited about joining this movement and what the future holds.
As a young woman of color, it fills me with pride to work for someone I can see myself in and who I know is fighting to create a better, more equitable world for my loved ones and communities.
I first moved to Seattle to attend college at Seattle Pacific University. As one of the first in my family to go to college, it was a defining experience made possible by a succession of sacrifices — from my grandparents' decision to immigrate from Mexico to the U.S. to my father's decision to join the U.S. Air Force and my mom's hard work raising me as a young mother.
When I graduated in 2019, I was excited to contribute to the communities in Seattle that had become my new home. When the pandemic hit a few months later, I worked as an immigration caseworker. I heard firsthand the struggles many individuals faced due to extreme backlogs and our country's broken immigration system.
I know that I am the product of these stories. My values are shaped by the struggles my family and the community members I had the honor of working with faced. And it is these stories that inspired me to join Congresswoman Jayapal's team. Her advocacy for the underserved was unwavering before and during the pandemic, and I know it will continue to be in the years to come.
**In this new role, I am fighting for my community here in WA-07 and for my family in Texas and Americans across the country. By having a fighter like Pramila in Congress, we have a fighter**** _for us all_****— one who is bold and will keep pushing for legislation that will improve the lives of working families like mine.**
But reelecting Pramila, protecting the Democratic majority, and electing more progressives to Congress this year is going to take everyone doing their part. Potential opponents, the GOP, and corporate special interests will do anything in their power to stop our momentum and stall our progressive agenda.
[**So, Peter, I have to ask one more time: Will you contribute any amount you can spare to power our movement? Our average donation in March so far is $22.36, but whatever you can give makes a powerful difference when it comes to fueling our work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220308?refcode=em20220308-1087&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=1087_420207_8Xx7uK&akid=1087%2E420207%2E8Xx7uK)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220308?refcode=em20220308-1087&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=1087_420207_8Xx7uK&akid=1087%2E420207%2E8Xx7uK)**
Thank you for being in this fight with us! I'm sure you'll be hearing from me again soon.
In solidarity,
Carly
Carly Peña (She/Her)
Organizer and Campaign Coordinator
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220308-1087-footer&t=22&refcode2=1087_420207_8Xx7uK&akid=1087%2E420207%2E8Xx7uK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1087%2E420207%2E8Xx7uK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1087%2E420207%2E8Xx7uK)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

| | Dear Friend,

Today, I officially qualified to run in GA-10.

I am not running for Congress because I want to go to Washington. I am running because we are in the fight of our lives for the heart and soul of our country, and we can't afford to replace conservative champions like Jody Hice with RINO's like Mitt Romney.
---
|
---
---
| We must send an authentic conservative fighter to Washington, but I need your support to do it.

[Will you help us cross the finish line?](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=ff82deebec&e=061a1ea0d5)

This district needs a Congressman who not only believes our conservative values, but lives them. I know the importance of faith – I'm a deacon at my church. I know the importance of family – Liberty, Haven, Maverick, and Dixie are the reasons I fight for freedom. I know the importance of small business – I've owned one myself for almost two decades. I know the importance of keeping the government small – I've dedicated my time in the State House to limiting government and empowering "We the People."

There are several candidates in this race, but **I'm the only one endorsed by Congressman Jody Hice and Congressman Andrew Clyde** , proven fighters who have earned your trust. We must ensure this seat doesn't go to the highest bidder. [Please consider supporting my campaign with a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or any amount you can do.](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=8a58cf5c67&e=061a1ea0d5)

With your help, we will fight for freedom and stand for America.

For Liberty,

name: Katie Porter's re-election
subject: Peter--You could be the difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Block?=
subject: We’re Inching Closer to the Midterm Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Let’s Unite the Republican Party! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6885849?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=af98be417f&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Sometimes I wonder if we live in The Twilight Zone when I reflect on how radical extremists continue to destroy the great State of New Mexico _from within_.

As Patriotic Americans who understand the sacrifices that generations made so that we would have the God-given liberties as our birthright, **we can’t just sit here and take it.** We’re tired of being pushed around by elite overlords in Washington D.C. - and for good reason!

The Radical Left is hellbent on stripping you of your Second Amendment rights, increasing unemployment - _which I lowered by one-third as Sandoval’s County Commissioner_ \- and weakening our border.
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=9c5dacca75&e=102b599530)
---
| **As your governor, I will make sure that New Mexico doesn’t fall victim to flawed policies any longer! **

Since we’re inching closer to the Midterm elections, I urge you to make a generous contribution so that everyone in this state benefits from _**SMALLER GOVERNMENT.**_

The time for us to turn things around is _**now.**_ Help me restore New Mexico’s proper title as “The Land of Enchantment.”
---
| [I SUPPORT JAY BLOCK FOR GOVERNOR](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=57024701c4&e=102b599530 "I SUPPORT JAY BLOCK FOR GOVERNOR")

body:
CRISIS

Friends,

Let’s talk about our Southern Border. It’s wide open and this lazy administration does not even care. I know what you’re thinking- how can this STILL be an issue? Well, it is.

By acting like the border does not even exist, Joe and Kamala are allowing streams of illegal immigrants into our country every day. Already we have seen the impact this has on crime in cities- this is not something to ignore!

As President Trump said, “A nation without borders is not a nation.”

clean_body: CRISIS | Friends, Let’s talk about our Southern Border. It’s wide open and this lazy administration does not even care. I know what you’re thinking- how can this STILL be an issue? Well, it is. By acting like the border does not even exist, Joe and Kamala are allowing streams of illegal immigrants into our country every day. Already we have seen the impact this has on crime in cities- this is not something to ignore! As President Trump said, “A nation without borders is not a nation.” | The Biden administration has proven we cannot trust them to keep our borders protected. Sincerely, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. name: Teresa Fedor
subject: Celebrating International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| Today, let’s recommit to the fight for equality in Ohio and around the world. Hi friend, **Happy International Women’s Day!** Today we celebrate the achievements, contributions, and progress of women and girls in Ohio, the United States, and around the globe. Because of the trailblazing, intrepid women who came before us, we live in a world that is more equal than at any point in history, where girls have more opportunities than at any point in history. My being a state senator and candidate for lieutenant governor is a testament to this progress, and I’m thankful every single day for their efforts. But I want to be clear, friend: **our work to achieve true equality is _far_ from finished. ** **[If you’re with me in the fight for gender equality, please, take a moment to add your name to our petition demanding greater equality for women and girls>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42740979/334160479/-255679714?refcode=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODkwNzg0My00NDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-erQXHJRGp8Iv1TIWMksticmKx90WpnTByJvs3cvTY=&emci=d5fae176-2c9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)** **[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42740980/334160480/-255679714?refcode=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODkwNzg0My00NDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-erQXHJRGp8Iv1TIWMksticmKx90WpnTByJvs3cvTY=&emci=d5fae176-2c9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)** I desperately wish I could say that things have changed over the decades, but they haven’t, friend. In 2019, when Ohio passed a bill that effectively outlawed abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest, I knew then that the fight was far from over. That idea was further reinforced when Texas passed a similar law last year, and when Florida passed its own law _last month._ Lawmakers — and let's be honest here: _mostly male lawmakers_ — still think they have a right to police women’s bodies. Until that horrific worldview is eliminated, we will never have true equality in our society. **And, until women are seen as true equals — in the home, in schools, in the workplace, and at tables of leadership — our fight will go on.** **[So on this International Women’s Day, let’s recommit to creating a society where the possibilities for all of our women and girls are limitless. Add your name to our petition today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42740981/334160481/-255679714?refcode=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODkwNzg0My00NDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-erQXHJRGp8Iv1TIWMksticmKx90WpnTByJvs3cvTY=&emci=d5fae176-2c9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)** Thank you, Teresa
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42740982/334160482/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODkwNzg0My00NDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-erQXHJRGp8Iv1TIWMksticmKx90WpnTByJvs3cvTY=)** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42740983/334160483/817536172?recurring=true&refcode=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.98907843-449f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODkwNzg0My00NDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-erQXHJRGp8Iv1TIWMksticmKx90WpnTByJvs3cvTY=)**

clean_body: | Today, let’s recommit to the fight for equality in Ohio and around the world. Hi friend, Happy International Women’s Day! Today we celebrate the achievements, contributions, and progress of women and girls in Ohio, the United States, and around the globe. Because of the trailblazing, intrepid women who came before us, we live in a world that is more equal than at any point in history, where girls have more opportunities than at any point in history. My being a state senator and candidate for lieutenant governor is a testament to this progress, and I’m thankful every single day for their efforts. But I want to be clear, friend: our work to achieve true equality is far from finished. I desperately wish I could say that things have changed over the decades, but they haven’t, friend. In 2019, when Ohio passed a bill that effectively outlawed abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest, I knew then that the fight was far from over. That idea was further reinforced when Texas passed a similar law last year, and when Florida passed its own law last month. Lawmakers — and let's be honest here: mostly male lawmakers — still think they have a right to police women’s bodies. Until that horrific worldview is eliminated, we will never have true equality in our society. And, until women are seen as true equals — in the home, in schools, in the workplace, and at tables of leadership — our fight will go on. Thank you, Teresa = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Birk?=
subject: I'm Running for Lt. Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY THE DR
body:
With Scott Jensen | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mattbirk.com/im-running-for-lt-governor?e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=bf76ac91fb&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | Peter,

Today, I am excited to announce my run candidacy for Lieutenant Governor. Like you, I have seen the failed leadership of Walz and Peggy Flanagan and I am ready to get in the game and fight for Minnesota. _I am running alongside Dr. Scott Jensen to help make Minnesota the best it can be!_ It's the 4th quarter. We've been down, BUT we're going to WIN back Minnesota TOGETHER!
Please watch our launch video by clicking the thumbnail below and [HELP US WIN by contributing](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=dd47f646e2&e=33b11688c1):
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7d7f7cb715&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Why can't Minnesota be the best? Why can't we have the safest streets, the most robust economy, the best schools? We've been led by bad politicians and their bad policies, which have led to a middling future for our kids and grandkids. We don't have to accept that any longer. Let's work together to WIN in November!

My wife Adrianna and I have spent time praying about this decision and believe the stakes are now high enough in Minnesota for me to jump in. I don’t regard myself as any kind of savior - far from it - but after much discussion with the Scott Jensen team, I believe I will bring new value to an already-strong campaign and we will unify Republicans and Independents alike in a dramatic charge to Election Day in 2022! I could not be more thrilled to run alongside Scott Jensen - a man of integrity, who does not allow political groupthink to cloud his vision, and who _CAN WIN_!
[**And we need to win.**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=dbab391320&e=33b11688c1)
I was born and raised in St. Paul, and went to Cretin-Derham. I played 14 seasons in the NFL and 10 seasons with the Minnesota Vikings. On top of the on-the-field success I was blessed to have, I received the honor of being named the Walter Payton Man of the Year in 2011. Service to community means everything to me and it's a big reason as to why I'm now running to be Lt. Governor alongside Scott Jensen. I'll always cherish my time in the NFL, but I am most grateful for my wife Adrianna and our eight kids. We love the Lord, we believe hard work pays off, and we still believe in the American Dream. You can get to know me a bit better and learn where I stand on the issues by [visiting my website](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b696e43205&e=33b11688c1)!
---
|
---
| I hope you will join Dr. Scott Jensen and me! A Jensen/Birk administration will restore sanity to this state. We will fight to protect unborn lives, expand educational freedom by letting dollars follow STUDENTS, and restore safety to our streets. Minnesota can be the BEST because we have good, hardworking people here. Our far-left politicians have clouded that vision and I am excited to join the team that will replace them in November.
**Dr. Scott Jensen/Matt Birk 2022
[Let's strive to be the best state we can be!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b0a95b5afb&e=33b11688c1)**

Blessed to be your candidate,

Matt Birk
Republican Candidate for Lieutenant Governor
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e0d02f2334&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=8f51fba933&e=33b11688c1)

body:
Stand with Jennifer to DEFEAT MTG on June 7th. Read more >>>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/13816d554ceb/rep-greene-is-a-national-embarrassment?e=daf3f68050)
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_white_nationalist?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-white-nationalist_20220308&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-white-nationalist&utm_agency=PG
Peter,

Marjorie Taylor Greene is a national embarrassment – and it’s gone from bad to worse.

Last week, she was the “special guest” speaker at an event organized by an anti-Semitic, white nationalist, and pro-Putin extremist.

Even after being condemned by the Chair of the Republican National Committee, fellow Republican lawmakers, and the Republican Jewish Coalition, she refuses to apologize.

Her behavior, across the board, is WRONG and UNACCEPTABLE.

She does not represent the good people of GA-14, period!

Take a stand today to send MTG packing. Support Jennifer and our critical campaign efforts as we work to DEFEAT MTG in the May 24th primary election. (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_white_nationalist?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-white-nationalist_20220308&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-white-nationalist&utm_agency=PG)

The company one keeps says a lot about one’s character. Rep. Greene’s embrace of wild-eyed conspiracy theories and dangerous hate-fueled individuals and organizations has NO PLACE in our Republican Party.

Jennifer Strahan is running to offer voters a conservative alternative.

Our momentum is growing by the day and we can’t let up, Peter!

Please pitch in (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_white_nationalist?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-white-nationalist_20220308&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-white-nationalist&utm_agency=PG) $5, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_white_nationalist?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-white-nationalist_20220308&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-white-nationalist&utm_agency=PG&amount=5) $10, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_white_nationalist?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-white-nationalist_20220308&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-white-nationalist&utm_agency=PG&amount=10) $25, or (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/redirect_white_nationalist?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-white-nationalist_20220308&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-white-nationalist&utm_agency=PG&amount=25) $50

**This is horrifying.**

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene has been a controversial figure ever since she started running for Congress.

**But the latest news is extreme - even for her: **We just learned she spoke at a white supremacist conference!

Let us be clear: If we allow the Republicans to retake the House Majority, extremist figures like Marjorie Taylor Greene will have _**UNPRECEDENTED** power_.

This is what's at stake in 2022. And we can't allow it to happen - **EVER**.

That's why we're calling on grassroots supporters everywhere to step up and take Democratic HQ's poll before midnight.

**QUICKLY, let us know: Do you CONDEMN Marjorie Taylor Greene for speaking at a white supremacist conference? >>**

name: Team NRSC
subject: Why Americans aren’t paying attention to Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This could hurt us in the long run
Peter

Recent polling is showing that Democrats are tuning out national news during the Biden era, and we want to make sure that Republicans aren’t doing the same thing. It is paramount to Republican success in the upcoming midterms that our voters understand the failings of the Leftist government that currently has a hold on Washington.

[**Can you confirm for us that you’re still paying attention to national news as we approach a very important midterm election? name: John Fetterman
subject: An update from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'm so deeply proud to be able to share all of these campaign photos + updates with you.
#
Hey, Derek — it's John.
Gisele and I have been REALLY busy on the campaign trail and we have some pics to share with you from our journey around Western PA. But before I start going through my camera roll, I just have to ask: **[Will you please donate your first $5 to our campaign to flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?amount=5&refcode=em20220308-4891&t=1&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)**
Awesome. With that important request out of the way, I'd *love* to share some updates from the road with yinz.
Last weekend, some members from my team and I were able to connect with seven PA counties in three days. We met so many supporters from every walk of life — and collected SO many petition signatures to secure our campaign on the Democratic primary ballot.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=2&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
We started the trip with the Clearfield Democrats, who thanked me for coming to red 🔴 counties, and that's gracious of them. But truly, I want to thank the Clearfield Democrats for all the important work they do every day to fight for our values.
Is it easy being a Democrat in a really red county? No. But we know this campaign has the best argument as to how we’re going to flip this seat blue. 🔵
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=3&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
In Butler County, I was inspired by the warm hospitality, their commitment to the cause, and the cookies being handed out. 😍 Earning their petition signatures is what our 67 County campaign is all about.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=4&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
Next up, we got some time in beautiful New Castle, PA. Lawrence County is a prime example of how powerfully important small counties are. In PA, electoral success or failure has nothing to do with the partisan divide of a county, and everything to do with the margin.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=5&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
Warren County came out in full force!! We left with with a full page of petition signatures. I just can’t thank them enough.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=6&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
I don’t know who needs to hear this, but Erie is really, really great. So are all the folks who signed our petition pages while we were there. Also Lucky Louie’s hotdogs in Erie are off the chain good. 🌭
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=7&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
Our time in Oil City was fun, engaging, and thoughtful. Thank you for your petition signatures + spending the morning with me, Oil City!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?refcode=em20220308-4891&t=8&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
Luckily, we got to end our weekend road trip in beautiful Sharon, PA. I always love my time in Mercer County.
If you're not familiar with Mercer, it's a place in Pennsylvania that cynics might write off as a "deep red" county. Trump won there by 25% in 2020. But the crowd of amazing people who gathered there that night was a true testament to our campaign's motto: **Every county. Every vote.**
Derek, I'm so deeply proud to be able to share all of these campaign photos + updates with you. Because the truth is that YOU are the only reason why our grassroots campaign is able to travel from county to county to earn the votes of working Pennsylvanians and their families.
**Grassroots contributions — most of which come in response to emails like this one — are what allow us to travel to all of these campaign stops. You're literally keeping this show on the road!** So with our first FEC deadline of 2022 coming up in just three weeks, I must ask once more:
**[Will you fund more campaign events like these by chipping in your first $5 right now? With our grassroots campaign, even a modest donation would help — even just a buck or two.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?amount=5&refcode=em20220308-4891&t=9&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?amount=5&refcode=em20220308-4891&t=28&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)**
__
Thank you so much for all you do for our campaign.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **We are just three weeks away from our first FEC filing deadline of 2022 – and the last FEC deadline before the primary.** Falling short of fundraising goals before these deadlines makes it impossible to stay on the road meeting voters — which is where Gisele and I really need to be! **[So please chip in $5 if you can today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45171?amount=5&refcode=em20220308-4891&t=29&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220308-4891-footer&t=30&refcode2=4891_434096_fHremz&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=31&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=32&akid=4891%2E434096%2EfHremz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: The establishment wants to lead us into war.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1efaf861f113/the-establishment-wants-to-lead-us-into-war?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,
#
The establishment wants to lead us into war (again).
**The narrative out of Washington, DC feels very similar to the lead up to the Iraq War.** We have politicians, members of Congress, now echoing the messaging of Joe Biden’s State of the Union address about building a “coalition” of allies against Russia. Then, they vote to express “solidarity” with Ukraine, laying out ways they can further provoke Russia.

Instead of lawmakers like Jaime Herrera Beutler warmongering and conducting pointless photo ops behind Ukrainian-colored American flags, we need to demand that Joe Biden consult Congress so those who represent the American people can vigorously debate any escalations of force.

The American people want to know what’s on the table and want to have a say, and Congress alone has the power to declare war—but Joe Biden and the establishment across both parties don’t want them to.

It’s easy for them to talk a big talk in DC and act tough on the world stage. But at the end of the day, they have completely incapacitated our domestic energy production and our leverage in dealing with Russia. They’re willing to put our national security in danger, even if it means striking oil deals with despotic governments like Venezuela.

There is nothing but incompetence and weak leadership coming out of our nation’s capital, and that’s a very dangerous combination. It’s time for us, the American people, to have a say in our national security—because no one benefits from war.
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=686df72e41&e=00856e661d)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend, The establishment wants to lead us into war (again). The narrative out of Washington, DC feels very similar to the lead up to the Iraq War. We have politicians, members of Congress, now echoing the messaging of Joe Biden’s State of the Union address about building a “coalition” of allies against Russia. Then, they vote to express “solidarity” with Ukraine, laying out ways they can further provoke Russia. Instead of lawmakers like Jaime Herrera Beutler warmongering and conducting pointless photo ops behind Ukrainian-colored American flags, we need to demand that Joe Biden consult Congress so those who represent the American people can vigorously debate any escalations of force. The American people want to know what’s on the table and want to have a say, and Congress alone has the power to declare war—but Joe Biden and the establishment across both parties don’t want them to. It’s easy for them to talk a big talk in DC and act tough on the world stage. But at the end of the day, they have completely incapacitated our domestic energy production and our leverage in dealing with Russia. They’re willing to put our national security in danger, even if it means striking oil deals with despotic governments like Venezuela. There is nothing but incompetence and weak leadership coming out of our nation’s capital, and that’s a very dangerous combination. It’s time for us, the American people, to have a say in our national security—because no one benefits from war. | | | Why is the establishment scared of me? ✅ March 4th: ✅ March 4th: ✅ March 6th: | | Join Joe Kent at a reception at Park House in Dallas next week, March 15th! | | | Upcoming Events I want to meet you! subject: Biden’s Failed Energy Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6178005?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| Good evening,

Gas prices are skyrocketing here in WNY and around the nation, and they are only set to go higher.

On DAY 1 of his presidency, Biden took steps to kill our domestic energy production and harm our energy independence – and you’re paying for it.

Biden is hurting our domestic production while potentially negotiating with dictators in Iran and Venezuela.

We shouldn’t be increasing our dependence on hostile foreign nations for oil, especially right now. We should be buying American.

That is exactly what I called for Biden to do yesterday. [Read this coverage of my press conference.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=4368a3081e&e=13f35c4add)

---
|
---
| The Biden administration’s anti-American policies are putting us at risk. They need to be reversed immediately, and we need American production to thrive!

That’s what I am fighting for in Congress.

Best,
Chris Jacobs

Friends,
Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” Senator Rand Paul visited Cheyenne and Gillette with Harriet. The crowds were fired up to see Senator Paul and hear how he and Harriet will work together to fight for liberty and freedom in Washington, D.C.!
Harriet has now traveled over 14,000 miles across the state! With every visit, Harriet is connecting with more voters and hearing about the issues that matter most to Wyoming.
For Wyoming,
Team Hageman

clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” Senator Rand Paul visited Cheyenne and Gillette with Harriet. The crowds were fired up to see Senator Paul and hear how he and Harriet will work together to fight for liberty and freedom in Washington, D.C.! Harriet has now traveled over 14,000 miles across the state! With every visit, Harriet is connecting with more voters and hearing about the issues that matter most to Wyoming. For Wyoming, Team Hageman | | Senator Paul Visits Wyoming! Senator Paul and his wife Kelley visited Cheyenne and Gillette with Harriet and the crowds were fired up to support Harriet! | Harriet at CPAC Harriet made a splash on the CPAC stage! She joined Alaska Governor Mike Dunleavy and Newsmax host and former Trump White House Press Secretary Sean Spicer to discuss energy independence, national security, and the failures of the Biden administration on both of these issues. As always, you can find Harriet’s media appearances on the tab of our website. Be sure to check out Harriet’s appearance at CPAC! Harriet on Dave Rubin Harriet was invited to join Dave Rubin for a full hour. This interview covers a broad range of topics and Harriet did a fantastic job covering the changes she will fight for when she gets to Congress! Watch the full video Upcoming Events! Albany County Republican Party Conservative Breakfast Saturday, March 12th 7:30AM-9:30AM American Legion Banquet Room 417 E Ivinson Ave, Laramie Casper Town Hall Monday, March 14th 6:00-7:30 PM The Hangar 1410 Prairie Ln., Bar Nunn Hudson Town Hall Thursday, March 17th 6:30-7:30 PM City Hall 333 S. name: Katie Porter re-election update
subject: fwd:Peter--You could be the difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

subject: Join us Thursday at Desaki in Swiftwater!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zama for PA
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9e173e2bf2eb/tune-in-for-tonights-debate-6764222?e=fe97fe84cf)
---

---
|
**Let's Help Dr. Zama's Campaign for Governor**

_Together We Can Help Transform Harrisburg, Restore Unity,and Inspire Love_

**5:30 pm to 7:00 pm,
Thursday, March 10, 2022
Desaki
2054 Route 611
Swiftwater, PA 18372**
Friends of Dr. Nche Zama,

As you know, up until the first televised debate in January, Dr. Zama got very little media coverage. Often, he wasn’t mentioned in articles about the Governor’s race. Despite these challenges, and the millions of dollars other candidates have spent, **Dr. Zama has performed with extraordinary results.**

__________
**Governor Scorecard: **Only three candidates for Governor have won a Republican caucus vote. Dr. Nche Zama won the Northwest caucus vote and finished 2nd in the Northeast caucus. Nche Zama was one of only 4 Governor candidates who received votes in all 6 caucus straw polls.
__________

In fact, four Governor candidates raised over $1 million dollars and none of them won a Republican caucus vote. Dr. Zama has spent 10-times less, and still won!

Dr. Zama’s uniquely clear and concise conservative message focuses on excellence in education, healthcare, energy, and our economy and it has resonated in every county across the Commonwealth.

The bottom line is this: working together, we can be a major part of Dr. Zama's $500,000 fundraising campaign, so Dr. Zama can do television, social media, and radio ads. With our support, Dr. Zama will be well-positioned to win the May 17th primary election for Pennsylvania Governor.

In addition to your support and vote, here’s how you can help.

**$1,000 or more – Your Name will be listed on the Host Committee and two tickets for fundraiser - Help us get 25 Host Commttee sponsors!

$300 – Two tickets for fundraiser - Help us get 25 couples tickets

$200 – One ticket to fundraiser - Help us get 25 tickets sold**
**You can make a big difference!**

_We’re especially pleased to be gathering at Desaki. Vincent and Charlie Trapasso bring together family, food, fire, and fun, in the most unique, family-friendly restaurant in the Pocono Mountains.

Friends, we had hundreds at Dr. Zama’s exciting announcement in May. We’re confident that working together, we can make our March 10th gathering a fun celebration for our next Governor.

Join us in supporting Dr. Zama for Governor! Please RSVP ASAP to: [DrZama@ZamaforPA.com](mailto:DrZama@ZamaforPA.com)._
**Make check payable to: “Zama for PA” o****r pay online at:**[**www.ZamaforPA.com**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=692dcc81da&e=fe97fe84cf)
Very truly yours,

**Dr. Darell Covington
Dr. Frederick Barnes
Dr. Drupad Bhatt**

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Biden's Speech Failed to Offer Real Solutions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, One week ago today, President Biden’s State of the Union address felt more like a “State of Denial” address. It was out of touch with the challenges Americans are facing.
Peter,One week ago today, President Biden's State of the Union address felt more like a "State of Denial" address. It was out of touch with the challenges Americans are facing. Instead of offering real solutions, President Biden used his speech as an opportunity to call for more government spending and promote far-left policies.**[We must stop the Democrats' power monopoly in Washington. Can you chip in and help make sure we defeat them in November?](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhlhhjl-idtjvlhlh-r/)****_Americans are facing real challenges right now. Skyrocketing inflation, record high gas prices, and rising energy costs are breaking the bank for families and workers. Drugs are pouring over our unsecured southern border and the crime crisis is making our communities less safe. Americans are feeling the consequences of failed policies and weak leadership._** We need leaders who will address and fix these issues. We must win in November. If we can take the House in our midterms then we can help stop far-left legislation from passing. If we can take both the House and the Senate, we will be able to pressure President Biden to adopt an agenda that will benefit all Americans.**[If you are able, please consider donating now so we can continue to build momentum until the crucial 2022 midterm election.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhlhhjl-idtjvlhlh-y/)** Thanks,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhlhhjl-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhlhhjl-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhlhhjl-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhlhhjl-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zhlhhjl-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

Friend,

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I honestly need some help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

name: American Update
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9674%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lD3URJs%2b1cHdUVr9x5RM%2fA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25063%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iIMGJaWbvRyD5bCRCEZYRw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25064%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ShkSTb%2fAbywpH3pkY3tHw&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25075%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lSLNMm3YLaPiqDrJq0jq8Q&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HNE5bA9ctFw1hc2AYWcPBA&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25075%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lSLNMm3YLaPiqDrJq0jq8Q&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H7TNOAKoPWDpX7IA4z50DQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9674%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lD3URJs%2b1cHdUVr9x5RM%2fA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9674%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lD3URJs%2b1cHdUVr9x5RM%2fA&sysid=1)

name: David Goder
subject: The Iran-Russia Affair
body:
Everyday Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies – but this one could be lethal. While the media is busy trying to fo
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqhtg063lqqfa1tj99loj9i0an6qfic4tar8o8c8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrr4t72cmrb6cr564o62djiehi39cdi6thmfd1jcdg74p3l6coe7dj6etgb8ohgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj3co5jckrr5cr666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm1oj7c9j6aoh5u)
Everyday Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies -- but this one could be lethal. Billions of dollars in cash to Iran. No inspectors allowed. AND a sunset clause which would all but guarantee a nuclear Iran... | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze7bbdeb4f5ch261ml9o45av6jjrqgu8da3l5p6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3h6eoj6clh2bs)
---
Friend,

Everyday Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies - but this one could be lethal.

While the media is busy trying to force us into war with Russia, **Biden and his cronies have been quietly brokering a terrible, new Iran Deal - and it's even worse than the last.**

Billions of dollars in cash to Iran. No inspectors allowed. AND a sunset clause which would all but guarantee a nuclear Iran.

That's right.

It's a trick he learned under the Obama administration: have the media focus on a war while he sends a gift to one of our enemies.

**And what's worse, while Joe Biden talks tough against Russia and Putin since they invaded Ukraine, he's RELYING on Russia to broker this deal.**

And you and I only have ONE chance to stop these insane proposals from becoming a reality.

[**Which is why I'm asking you to give an emergency gift of $35 or more to Secure America Now - because we've stopped the Iran Deal before and we can stop the Iran Deal again.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3oees71b9c6bqchg9l94jobng48ph1rsj2sqc7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3h6eoj6clh2bs)

Let me take a step back and introduce myself.

My name is David Goder and I'm the Co-Founder of Secure America Now (SAN) - the largest grassroots organization in the United States dedicated to keeping our nation safe.

You may remember the last time the radical left tried to force an Iran Deal down our throats.

It was 2015, and Barack Obama was sending planes full of cash to Iran.

When we found out, we called in a full court press from coast-to-coast, collecting petition signatures, showing up to Senator Manchin's townhall events, and making hundreds of thousands of phone calls telling our senators to stand up and oppose the deal.

**Famously, both Manchin and Senator Chuck Schumer opposed the Iran Deal because of our efforts.**

But this kind of grassroots action takes money, and if we're going to stop an even worse bill under an even worse "president" - we're going to need a lot of it, and fast.

[**Will you join Secure America Now and help us stop the imminent Iran Deal with an urgent gift of $35 or more today?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8sbdvq5l1ub82fkgl0ik9c21vkctp5g1mg580c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3h6eoj6clh2bs)

Behind a media smokescreen, Biden sent Robert Malley, a long-time advocate and friend of Iran, to Tehran to make a deal.

_It's like sending Bernie Sanders to make a deal with Cuba._

This deal would lift sanctions on some of the world's most horrific terrorists - and make the axis of evil even stronger.

The Biden "administration" is relying on Russia to finalize this deal, and if it goes through, Iran will could send enriched uranium stockpiles to Russia.

Joe Biden is playing a dangerous game right under your nose, with your own tax dollars...

...and if he succeeds, it will be a DISASTER for America and our allies.

What's worse - Biden is set to announce this deal ANY DAY NOW.

Your donation will fund our efforts, and make sure that Senators like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, along with every Republican legislator, oppose the Iran Deal.

But we have one chance, and this is it.

You see, the new Iran Deal MUST come before the United States Senate because it changes the terms that President Trump imposed on Iran.

Trump placed sanctions on Iran and refused to send them the cash that they demanded.

But you and I know full well that Biden and Malley are going to give Iran everything they want - including the ability to produce nuclear weapons.

_Especially since Russia is involved._

Joe Biden has made America a laughingstock on the world stage.

**Between the Afghanistan disaster and what's happening in Ukraine, Biden has been nothing but weak and feeble in the face of international confrontation.**

Which is why he sent Iran's best friend, Malley, to make a sweetheart deal with their radical government, and has **brought Russia into negotiations.**

He threatens Putin on the world stage, only to come back begging for his help like a dog with his tail between his legs.

It's up to patriots like you to take a stand and DEMAND that the Iran Deal be stopped.

So please, don't hesitate.

clean_body: Everyday Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies – but this one could be lethal. While the media is busy trying to fo Everyday Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies -- but this one could be lethal. Billions of dollars in cash to Iran. No inspectors allowed. AND a sunset clause which would all but guarantee a nuclear Iran... | Friend, Everyday Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies - but this one could be lethal. While the media is busy trying to force us into war with Russia, Biden and his cronies have been quietly brokering a terrible, new Iran Deal - and it's even worse than the last. Billions of dollars in cash to Iran. No inspectors allowed. AND a sunset clause which would all but guarantee a nuclear Iran. That's right. It's a trick he learned under the Obama administration: have the media focus on a war while he sends a gift to one of our enemies. And what's worse, while Joe Biden talks tough against Russia and Putin since they invaded Ukraine, he's RELYING on Russia to broker this deal. And you and I only have ONE chance to stop these insane proposals from becoming a reality. Let me take a step back and introduce myself. My name is David Goder and I'm the Co-Founder of Secure America Now (SAN) - the largest grassroots organization in the United States dedicated to keeping our nation safe. You may remember the last time the radical left tried to force an Iran Deal down our throats. It was 2015, and Barack Obama was sending planes full of cash to Iran. When we found out, we called in a full court press from coast-to-coast, collecting petition signatures, showing up to Senator Manchin's townhall events, and making hundreds of thousands of phone calls telling our senators to stand up and oppose the deal. Famously, both Manchin and Senator Chuck Schumer opposed the Iran Deal because of our efforts. But this kind of grassroots action takes money, and if we're going to stop an even worse bill under an even worse "president" - we're going to need a lot of it, and fast. Behind a media smokescreen, Biden sent Robert Malley, a long-time advocate and friend of Iran, to Tehran to make a deal. It's like sending Bernie Sanders to make a deal with Cuba. This deal would lift sanctions on some of the world's most horrific terrorists - and make the axis of evil even stronger. The Biden "administration" is relying on Russia to finalize this deal, and if it goes through, Iran will could send enriched uranium stockpiles to Russia. Joe Biden is playing a dangerous game right under your nose, with your own tax dollars... ...and if he succeeds, it will be a DISASTER for America and our allies. What's worse - Biden is set to announce this deal ANY DAY NOW. Your donation will fund our efforts, and make sure that Senators like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, along with every Republican legislator, oppose the Iran Deal. But we have one chance, and this is it. You see, the new Iran Deal MUST come before the United States Senate because it changes the terms that President Trump imposed on Iran. Trump placed sanctions on Iran and refused to send them the cash that they demanded. But you and I know full well that Biden and Malley are going to give Iran everything they want - including the ability to produce nuclear weapons. Especially since Russia is involved. Joe Biden has made America a laughingstock on the world stage. Between the Afghanistan disaster and what's happening in Ukraine, Biden has been nothing but weak and feeble in the face of international confrontation. Which is why he sent Iran's best friend, Malley, to make a sweetheart deal with their radical government, and has brought Russia into negotiations. He threatens Putin on the world stage, only to come back begging for his help like a dog with his tail between his legs. It's up to patriots like you to take a stand and DEMAND that the Iran Deal be stopped. So please, don't hesitate. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vshFc89HNy

Pro-Life Statement

Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology,
treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects.
Abortion that was once thought of
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshFc89HNy

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I feel
like our culture has forgotten-or ignored-some very important and
basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.
Our
society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its
most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was
once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has
become the new normal.
Medicine
tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also
tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves,
and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not
treated as though they are alive or even human.
As a
surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you
that they are very much alive.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
Life is a
precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No
person is disposable, and every life is precious according to
Him.
I believe
that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this
right by our society. I believe that together we can make a
difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also
believe that I'm not alone in this belief.
I believe
that you believe that too.
I've
started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are
looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that
values life but that takes people like you and I making a
commitment.
The first
step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing
to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me today
and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?
I've
created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you
read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals
and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the
unborn?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59768457:shFc89HNy:m:3:2532013465:6B2539E49E46CD342F361DE72D83FA83:r
Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Geoff Diehl Announces Policy Priorities and "Berkshires to Boston Tour"
body:
| | | |
---
DIEHL ANNOUNCES STATEWIDE "BERKSHIRES TO BOSTON TOUR"
---
|
---
| Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, announced today that he will be traveling across Massachusetts over the next few weeks to greet voters and discuss local and statewide issues as part of his campaign for Governor.
According to Diehl, he plans to visit towns in every county of the state under his newly-unveiled "Berkshires to Boston Tour". "My goal is to visit with as many people as possible, right in their home towns, and to talk about the issues that are front and center on their minds," Diehl said. "I'm excited for the chance to expand our conversation with this tour."
Diehl says he plans the first stop of his tour to be in the Berkshires next Thursday, March 10. As part of his visit to western Massachusetts, Diehl plans to stop by several local businesses and attend meet and greet events with voters. "It should be a fun day, and I encourage everyone in the area to come out and see us," Diehl said.
---
| DIEHL UNVEILS POLICY FRAMEWORK FOR GOVERNOR'S CAMPAIGN
---
| Meanwhile, with about 250 days to go until Election Day, the Diehl for Governor campaign has released a policy framework entitled, "The People's Priorities," outlining policy priorities and innovative plans Diehl is focusing on as part of his race for Governor. "This campaign isn't about me, it's about the people of Massachusetts," Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, said in a statement. "The reason I'm running is to bring renewed focus to issues and practices that are important to Bay Staters. These are policies that will improve state government for the benefit of everyone who lives here. And, I am doing that with an emphasis on protecting individual freedoms, innovation, and successful economic practices. It is important for voters to know exactly where I stand, what I'm focusing on as a candidate, and how the positions I endorse will help their everyday lives." Diehl's campaign outlined a series of policy issues the candidate intends to highlight as part of his race and pledges to work on as Governor:
---
|
---
| For more information on Diehl's "Berkshires to Boston Tour" and to find out when he plans to visit your area, please visit his campaign website, www.GeoffDiehl.com. The campaign also will share frequent updates on policy announcements and itineraries by way of its social media channels (including via Facebook and Twitter: @DiehlforMA).
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

| | **Look Up Now:** **Climate Candidates**
---
Were you unable to attend last week's Look Up Now event? If so, now you can watch the video! The event featured climate scientists Dr. Michael Mann, Dr. Ed Maibach, Dr. Bill Schlesinger, and Dr. Merav Ben David and moderated by Gary Kroeger (Actor and Saturday Night Live Alum). This was a fantastic conversation that covered a wide range of topics from how to communicate about climate change to all voters, the impacts that we experience NOW from climate change, the cost of inaction, and what federal policy measures we need to take. If you have an hour, this is worth the watch! And please share with others!

clean_body: Here is the video!| | | | | | | Look Up Now: Climate Candidates Were you unable to attend last week's Look Up Now event? If so, now you can watch the video! The event featured climate scientists Dr. Michael Mann, Dr. Ed Maibach, Dr. Bill Schlesinger, and Dr. Merav Ben David and moderated by Gary Kroeger (Actor and Saturday Night Live Alum). This was a fantastic conversation that covered a wide range of topics from how to communicate about climate change to all voters, the impacts that we experience NOW from climate change, the cost of inaction, and what federal policy measures we need to take. If you have an hour, this is worth the watch! And please share with others! | | | | | | If you like what you hear and are able, please donate to my campaign to help get me to Congress! If elected, I'd be the first climate expert ever elected to Congress, and I'm the only woman in the nation running for Congress with climate expertise. We need voices like mine in Congress. | | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O. name: Angela Angel
subject: [SIGN THE PETITION] Reauthorize the VAWA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749847/334191486/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBkW3egCeTNqwZ3Pr9TTETz4fTPukPpfiy_n8agWEyM=&emci=94a265a2-4c9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5fcf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)
---
Hi folks,

Twenty-eight years ago, Congress passed the landmark Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) that has since protected countless survivors of domestic abuse over the last two decades.

**I'm writing to you today as one of those survivors.**

In 2012, my husband cashed out all of the checks and I lost my home while pregnant with my fifth child. I was left blind-sighted, unsure where to go or who to turn to. Our marriage had been turbulent for several years, and I was left with the scars and trauma of domestic violence while trying to raise four kids with one on the way.

I found myself at a women's shelter for domestic violence, where I gave birth to my youngest daughter. Here, the kind folks at the center saw me through my fifth pregnancy and helped me pick up the pieces. Eventually, I moved out on my own, and, two years later, I was running to be Maryland State Delegate.

**Folks, that shelter saved my life.** It's the exact type of shelter that the VAWA funds all across the country, facilities that provide support, assistance, counseling, and so much more to the survivors of domestic abuse and assault.

It specifically allocates money to victims' services so that survivors of violence can access everything from therapy to safe housing. **Tragically, and to the detriment of millions of women and abuse survivors, it expired over two years ago.**

**That's why I'm calling on the Senate to reauthorize the VAWA now. We must support and empower survivors of domestic violence to build strong, resilient, and safe communities.**

[**Join me by adding your name to the petition demanding the Senate reauthorize VAWA _immediately._ >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749854/334191489/754129895?ms=em22_220308_vawa1&refcode=em22_220308_vawa1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBkW3egCeTNqwZ3Pr9TTETz4fTPukPpfiy_n8agWEyM=&emci=94a265a2-4c9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5fcf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8410825) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749866/334191496/754129895?ms=em22_220308_vawa1&refcode=em22_220308_vawa1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBkW3egCeTNqwZ3Pr9TTETz4fTPukPpfiy_n8agWEyM=&emci=94a265a2-4c9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5fcf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8410825) We must remember that domestic violence can happen to anyone and is present in every community, regardless of age, gender, sexual orientation, race, socioeconomic status, religion, or nationality. It's an issue that affects us _all,_ and that's why it's important we band together to educate and advocate against it.

Violence is not something we want to think about -- but unfortunately, it's all too common. Silence and complacency will not make the violence disappear; it will not protect us. That's why I'm sharing my story with you today.

VAWA should have _never_ expired. Leaders in the Senate need to do exactly that -- _lead_ \-- and take action immediately so we can secure the resources necessary to help thousands of survivors across the entire country. When the Senate failed to reauthorize VAWA in 2018, they failed me and the countless women just like me who are forced to experience abuse.

**[Tell the Senate to act immediately and demand they renew the Violence Against Women Act.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749872/334191510/754129895?ms=em22_220308_vawa1&refcode=em22_220308_vawa1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBkW3egCeTNqwZ3Pr9TTETz4fTPukPpfiy_n8agWEyM=&emci=94a265a2-4c9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5fcf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749879/334191517/754129895?ms=em22_220308_vawa1&refcode=em22_220308_vawa1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBkW3egCeTNqwZ3Pr9TTETz4fTPukPpfiy_n8agWEyM=&emci=94a265a2-4c9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5fcf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8410825) This issue is very personal and important to me; thank you for taking action.

In solidarity,

Angela

clean_body: | Hi folks, Twenty-eight years ago, Congress passed the landmark Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) that has since protected countless survivors of domestic abuse over the last two decades. I'm writing to you today as one of those survivors. In 2012, my husband cashed out all of the checks and I lost my home while pregnant with my fifth child. I was left blind-sighted, unsure where to go or who to turn to. Our marriage had been turbulent for several years, and I was left with the scars and trauma of domestic violence while trying to raise four kids with one on the way. I found myself at a women's shelter for domestic violence, where I gave birth to my youngest daughter. Here, the kind folks at the center saw me through my fifth pregnancy and helped me pick up the pieces. Eventually, I moved out on my own, and, two years later, I was running to be Maryland State Delegate. Folks, that shelter saved my life. It's the exact type of shelter that the VAWA funds all across the country, facilities that provide support, assistance, counseling, and so much more to the survivors of domestic abuse and assault. It specifically allocates money to victims' services so that survivors of violence can access everything from therapy to safe housing. Tragically, and to the detriment of millions of women and abuse survivors, it expired over two years ago. That's why I'm calling on the Senate to reauthorize the VAWA now. We must support and empower survivors of domestic violence to build strong, resilient, and safe communities. We must remember that domestic violence can happen to anyone and is present in every community, regardless of age, gender, sexual orientation, race, socioeconomic status, religion, or nationality. It's an issue that affects us all, and that's why it's important we band together to educate and advocate against it. Violence is not something we want to think about -- but unfortunately, it's all too common. Silence and complacency will not make the violence disappear; it will not protect us. That's why I'm sharing my story with you today. VAWA should have never expired. When the Senate failed to reauthorize VAWA in 2018, they failed me and the countless women just like me who are forced to experience abuse. This issue is very personal and important to me; thank you for taking action. We have made great progress the past few months, but Nancy Pelosi is throwing everything she has in the attempt to flip Florida. We need to keep the ball rolling if the America First movement is going to stay in front.
Grassroots support is the foundation of my campaign, which is why I'm here to ask if you would double your impact this month. If you wish to double your impact, all you need to do is pre-check to contribute again at the end of this month on the link below!
