Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a biased and distorted view of American history. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hollowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I mprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Adrian Ghainda
subject: Canvassing Friday in Downtown Jersey City
body:
Good afternoon Volunteers!

Please join us Saturday, March 13th for a canvassing session in Downtown Jersey City from 1 PM- 4PM! You're more than welcome to stay for an hour or the whole session! We will be meeting near the Newport PATH station in Downtown Jersey City. If you are able and the weather is permitting, please come out!

Click the button to sign up:
<https://bit.ly/canvassfordavid>

Hope to see some of you there!

All the best,
Adrian

\--

Adrian Ghainda (He/Him)
Community Organizer- David Ocampo for Congress
[adrian@ocampo2022.com](mailto:adrian@ocampo2022.com)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Chuck Grassley’s Holding Up History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
If confirmed, she will be the first Black woman to EVER serve as a Justice – that’s huge.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42766947/334260995/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk772-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgyNTQxYi1kMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MBLs1V8_WkHjddXaDOYNJD10bVtyMVJ9lId3nkNOJFM=)
---
Peter,

We’re watching history in the making! Back in February, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson was nominated to the Supreme Court. **If confirmed, she will be the first Black woman to EVER serve as a Justice – ****that’s huge.**
She’s brilliant, has outstanding credentials and is exceedingly qualified to serve on our highest court. **So why is Iowa’s senior senator telling D.C. reporters that it’s time to pump the brakes on her appointment process?**
Chuck Grassley’s hypocrisy never fails to amaze me. Back in 2020, he was determined to quickly confirm Amy Coney Barrett – and she had NEVER even argued an appeal. Despite being underqualified, her confirmation was one of the quickest in recent history.
**Folks, it’s pretty clear there’s a double standard here. **
In fact, Chuck Grassley has continuously played politics with our judiciary. When Merrick Garland was nominated in 2016, Senator Grassley refused to even hold a hearing to consider him. **Instead, he left a seat on the Supreme Court’s bench empty for 11 MONTHS!!**
His actions are unacceptable, and we can’t let him keep standing in the way of progress. After 47 years in Washington, it’s obvious that he’s more interested in staying in line with Mitch McConnell and his fellow D.C. cronies than doing what’s right for Iowans and people across the country.
That’s why it’s so important that we don’t miss this moment. He’s facing record-low approval ratings, and **we have a real chance of defeating him in 2022. **
But friend, if we’re going to retire Chuck Grassley in November, I need your support. **[Can you pitch in $5 today to help me flip this Senate seat blue, expand our Democratic majority and unseat Chuck Grassley?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42766951/334260996/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk772-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgyNTQxYi1kMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MBLs1V8_WkHjddXaDOYNJD10bVtyMVJ9lId3nkNOJFM=)**

name: Team Nelson
subject: Celebrating one year of Tom’s book release!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Friend, one year ago today, Tom’s book, _One Day Stronger_ , was released! What he wrote about still rings true:
Fighting for worker’s rights is more important now than ever, **especially since Ron Johnson turned his back against thousands of Oshkosh unionized workers who are at risk of losing their jobs.**
Tom’s book tells the compelling story of how Tom and the local union fought together against the big banks to save the Appleton Coated paper mill and keep it right here in Wisconsin.

[**To celebrate the anniversary of his book release, donate $50 today and receive a signed copy of _One Day Stronger_!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42768279/334262751/1794729020?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220309_1_1&refcode2=424ecefe-d29f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRlY2VmZS1kMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reCXKrf2wxtWkTXJ00Ne_uW-2kYuXMkTiu8yedZ-YWI=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42768283/334262761/1794729020?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220309_1_1&refcode2=424ecefe-d29f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRlY2VmZS1kMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reCXKrf2wxtWkTXJ00Ne_uW-2kYuXMkTiu8yedZ-YWI=)
Tom explains the crucial role that labor unions have played in building America’s middle class by creating and sustaining good-paying jobs, fostering prosperous communities, and promoting social solidarity. As we face rising inflation costs and supply chain crises, Tom’s book is a great reminder of why we need to be able to make things here in Wisconsin and start bringing back industries.

**More importantly, he shows how labor, working in common cause with business and local government, can restore the American dream.**

[Friend, chip in $50 or more now to receive a signed copy of _One Day Stronger._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42768285/334262762/1794729020?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220309_1_1&refcode2=424ecefe-d29f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRlY2VmZS1kMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reCXKrf2wxtWkTXJ00Ne_uW-2kYuXMkTiu8yedZ-YWI=)

Thank you for your support,

Team Nelson

Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | Friend, one year ago today, Tom’s book, One Day Stronger , was released! What he wrote about still rings true: Fighting for worker’s rights is more important now than ever, especially since Ron Johnson turned his back against thousands of Oshkosh unionized workers who are at risk of losing their jobs. Tom’s book tells the compelling story of how Tom and the local union fought together against the big banks to save the Appleton Coated paper mill and keep it right here in Wisconsin. = = Tom explains the crucial role that labor unions have played in building America’s middle class by creating and sustaining good-paying jobs, fostering prosperous communities, and promoting social solidarity. As we face rising inflation costs and supply chain crises, Tom’s book is a great reminder of why we need to be able to make things here in Wisconsin and start bringing back industries. More importantly, he shows how labor, working in common cause with business and local government, can restore the American dream. = Thank you for your support, Team Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpkdvm6hriegdn0if79bl1ujg5af4hpl8jof8jug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1rm3dlj61qj5c30e9orecbme1qr6o5mmpo69d5im8rj2tjjmkp30o9jclimeptnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchmcor6eddkcurm2phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cdge2o70shj649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z10of8vjqn0i17jqno7hkk6vfop75dh25ja1oudg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3gm1o74cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmcif7kf66pvq79mk0ethqdn4c0t9elv3sfp1v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3gm1o74cph2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn2jnlkb6q5htjkk4djdc0ndm0312ress4j4s2ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3gm1o74cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm4kks52an7akblga92d52kcn3ka58jn52qcpmno_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3gm1o74cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

If not we’re bumping it to the top of your inbox – it’s a must-read. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]
The far-right is rapidly scaling up their war on voting rights ahead of the midterm elections, and it’s up to us to fight back and save our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]
Give Jena’s note a read, then rush $20 to help Democratic Secretaries continue to defend our most fundamental rights >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]

Team, this is DASS Chair Jena Griswold here with an urgent warning:
The far-right is officially moving at lightning speed to gut voting rights and defeat democratic secretaries of state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]
With Big Lie extremists doubling down on their attacks, it’s critical that we ramp up our efforts to ensure fair and accessible elections for all.
But we need our entire grassroots team onboard to fuel this fight! Will you rush $20 to help our Democratic Secretaries fight back and defend our elections this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]

And in must-win swing states like Arizona and Michigan, the far-right is working overtime to target critical voter protections before voting gets underway in the fall.
Their goal is to disenfranchise voters and tilt future elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]
Let me be clear: We refuse to stand by while this happens, but we need our grassroots network to help us lead the charge. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030922_B2_AC_30D]
In the face of the far-right’s war on democracy, DASS is committed to defending election integrity across America. name: Derek Marshall
subject: BREAKING: The California Democratic Party endorses our race!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s finally here, the moment we’ve all been waiting for: **the California Democratic Party (CADEM) has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in California’s 23rd district!** This endorsement is one the most influential endorsements we’ve received and just goes to show that we’re making big waves here in the High Desert.
**[If you want to show your support for THE leading Democrat in this race, start a monthly contribution to my campaign today. Help us flip this district blue–it all starts with you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42773449/334269154/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM1MjIwMS1kNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaonmzjHhkJ4l3P2Uh_IYYg3-d20URmyoAQ-4O6Kl5o=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42773452/334269158/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM1MjIwMS1kNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaonmzjHhkJ4l3P2Uh_IYYg3-d20URmyoAQ-4O6Kl5o=)
**With the full support of the party, we have successfully maintained our standing as the frontrunner in this race.** We’ve by raised hundreds of thousands of dollars and worked tirelessly behind the scenes with delegates across the state to get to this moment. To say the least, this is huge!
I am so grateful to every donor, voter, and volunteer who has invested time and resources into this campaign. We are building the momentum we need to win and it WILL pay off! **This campaign is built on two very important components: people power and fundraising power.** That’s how we’ve gotten this far, and that’s our road to victory.
**[We are well on our way to flipping this district blue and winning a much-needed seat for the Democrats – help us make history by beginning a monthly recurring donation TODAY. Let’s show the Republicans exactly what we’re made of. Donate now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42773455/334269161/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM1MjIwMS1kNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaonmzjHhkJ4l3P2Uh_IYYg3-d20URmyoAQ-4O6Kl5o=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42773457/334269163/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM1MjIwMS1kNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaonmzjHhkJ4l3P2Uh_IYYg3-d20URmyoAQ-4O6Kl5o=)

Republicans have held this seat in Congress for far too long. **It’s time to prove once and for all that Democrats have what it takes to engage our base and win over voters who are sick and tired of politicians who fail to make meaningful change for them.** Every single one of my policies is designed to put working people and families first, so we can all thrive.
**We have what it takes to win, now we need the money that drives our ability to do it all. None of this can happen without you.** Now is the time for courage and commitment. I know I will do whatever it takes to get us to victory. Will you?
**[If you’re ready for a Democratic victory in California’s 23rd, join the California Democratic Party in supporting my campaign. Help us for the long run by starting a monthly contribution RIGHT NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42773459/334269167/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM1MjIwMS1kNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaonmzjHhkJ4l3P2Uh_IYYg3-d20URmyoAQ-4O6Kl5o=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

subject: 📸 President Trump + YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc

Peter Willis,
I’m not running for Governor to make a name for myself or boost my political profile. **I’m running to RESTORE the Commonwealth and take our freedoms back!**
To best do that I need to know what is the top issue for the people of Pennsylvania. Instead of paying some DC political pollster, I thought, “Why not ask the people themselves?!”

clean_body: | | | | As a native Pennsylvanian... | Peter Willis, I’m not running for Governor to make a name for myself or boost my political profile. I’m running to RESTORE the Commonwealth and take our freedoms back! To best do that I need to know what is the top issue for the people of Pennsylvania. Instead of paying some DC political pollster, I thought, “Why not ask the people themselves?!” After all, if I’m blessed enough to be elected your next governor, I will be working for you - the people. And I will never forget that. It’s time to give power back to We The People - take the poll and let know what’s on your mind. Together we can work to restore Liberty in Pennsylvania. Thank you, | | Lou Barletta Leading Republican Candidate Pennsylvania Governor | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 ==

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749399/334189772/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fNBdA-f2T1Qu1uuqpKMpRHRXqTQlzp3znRoaLMg-xw=&emci=55e7f8fe-319f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=51cf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, Petitioning to get on the ballot is underway in New York. My team and I are out every day knocking on doors and collecting signatures. We need 1250 signatures to qualify for the June primary, but we aim to collect several thousand so we have a healthy cushion. **[Will you chip in $3 to help our signature-gathering efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749404/334189776/924952270?refcode=2022-03-09-campaigning&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=51cf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fNBdA-f2T1Qu1uuqpKMpRHRXqTQlzp3znRoaLMg-xw=)** Everyone who answers the door asks me the same question: "Why are you running?" Here's my answer, Peter: I'm running because the problems of the past cannot be solved by the leaders of the past. We need a new generation of leaders who will reinvigorate this country with new ideas. I'm running because too many politicians on both sides of the aisle are intent on dividing us for political gain instead of working together for the national interest. At 28 years old I will be the youngest Democrat in the House of Representatives. But given the bickering and fighting in Washington, you can bet that I'll be the adult in the room. And I'm running because I _truly care about every American_. In Congress I'm going to set my personal politics aside and do what's best for our district and our country— **even if that upsets members of my own party.** Peter, collecting signatures is the most critical period of my campaign so far. My team and I are working day and night to meet our goal. It's an honor to be out there asking for community support.**[I'm counting on my supporters across the district to win this primary, and then to win in November. Can I count on you to donate $3 to help me build a winning campaign, Peter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42749409/334189792/924952270?refcode=2022-03-09-campaigning&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=51cf3d49-b19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWNmM2Q0OS1iMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fNBdA-f2T1Qu1uuqpKMpRHRXqTQlzp3znRoaLMg-xw=)** clean_body: | | | Peter, Petitioning to get on the ballot is underway in New York. My team and I are out every day knocking on doors and collecting signatures. We need 1250 signatures to qualify for the June primary, but we aim to collect several thousand so we have a healthy cushion. = Everyone who answers the door asks me the same question: "Why are you running?" Here's my answer, Peter: I'm running because the problems of the past cannot be solved by the leaders of the past. We need a new generation of leaders who will reinvigorate this country with new ideas. I'm running because too many politicians on both sides of the aisle are intent on dividing us for political gain instead of working together for the national interest. At 28 years old I will be the youngest Democrat in the House of Representatives. But given the bickering and fighting in Washington, you can bet that I'll be the adult in the room. And I'm running because I truly care about every American. In Congress I'm going to set my personal politics aside and do what's best for our district and our country— even if that upsets members of my own party. Peter, collecting signatures is the most critical period of my campaign so far. My team and I are working day and night to meet our goal. It's an honor to be out there asking for community support.= More to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. Hello,
I am old enough to recall when Donald Trump was first impeached for holding military aid to Ukrainian President Zelensky hostage: ‘You either begin an investigation into Joe Biden or you won’t get the Javelin missiles Congress authorized.’
I’m also old enough to remember when my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, said that Trump’s behavior was perfectly fine – and voted against his removal from office.
Thankfully, we now have a President who understands the real threat Russia poses, and American Javelin missiles are currently helping Ukrainians defend themselves against the Russian tanks pouring across their border.
**We need more leaders in the Senate who will defend democracy and put the interests of America and our allies first – not partisan political gain and the whims of a deranged demagogue. Chuck Grassley has proven that’s not him.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. But grassroots contributions keep campaigns going, and I need your help today if we’re going to win.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $15,000 before midnight tonight so that we can fight back against all of McConnell’s Super PAC attacks. Right now, we’re still falling dangerously short, but there’s still time to make up the gap if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42774503/334273695/-42398318?refcode=em20220309mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGYwN2MzMi1kYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5pomvewg22yUX15E98GTT4lXTjGQb4AQ_vdz8Wa_CRU=)

We can't forget that Hillary Clinton spied on President Trump both during his campaign and while he was in the White House!

body:
Think about it. If you knew $3 would save a life, wouldn’t you give it immediately?
#

Friends -
In Maryland, 13.5 people are killed with a gun every year. Out of 50 states, Maryland is number 33.
We can bring that 13.5 number down.
That is why we are fighting to defeat a bill that would allow anyone to legally go online and buy a do-it-yourself gun kit—no background check required in Maryland.
Hundreds of thousands of people have donated to Giffords since we launched our organization almost 10 years ago. Our work, thanks to them, has undoubtedly saved lives.
Now we need you. Help us ban ghost guns in Maryland.
Because Gabby can’t do it alone.
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to Giffords today? Together our work will save lives. And there is no value you can place on that.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220309-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1663_3935704_juqS5r&akid=1663%2E3935704%2EjuqS5r)

name: Val Demings
subject: I'll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I just launched my first TV ad
| | |
---
Friend, I only have a few minutes before my next meeting, so I'll make this quick:
**_FIRST,_** Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
**_THEN,_** polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans began spending millions of dollars in attack ads to defeat me.

clean_body: | | | = | | Peter – From Brunswick to Darien to our big finale rally in Savannah with over 200 supporters, this past Sunday was one for the books! To see more from the parade, check out our = = On Monday, we headed to Atlanta to qualify, and now Wade is officially on the ballot for the May 24th Primary Election! It has been a long road since we announced our bold campaign in July and we’re excited to keep pushing towards the election. = Thank you to all who came out and had a great time with us this past weekend. We are looking forward to what the next few months hold for our campaign, and we’re grateful to have you with us on this journey. Talk soon, The Wade Brigade | | = | | | ---|---|--- | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress Wade Herring for Congress PO Box 9145 Savannah, GA 31412 United States =

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Our big new investment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
**Big news, Derek:** We just went live with TWO new TV ads in Philly — Pennsylvania’s biggest media market (and the 4th biggest media market in the United States.)
**[We can’t give up any of our airtime to the GOP. Help us keep these two powerful ads on the air where they’ll reach millions of Pennsylvania households »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45211?refcode=em20220309-4890&t=1&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45219?refcode=em20220309-4890&t=2&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde) | [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45220?refcode=em20220309-4890&t=3&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)
---|---
**[Donate to Fund Our Ads »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45211?amount=5&refcode=em20220309-4890&t=4&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)**
From cameras to video editing to buying time in the PA media markets, launching these ads is a costly and labor-intensive component of our campaign. _Especially_ given the fact that our GOP opponents and their super PACs have already poured nearly $40 million into the TV and radio markets here. We’re grateful to every grassroots donor who made it possible! ❤️
**These ads are going to be our very first impression for a lot of folks** , especially the unlikely voters that our campaign is trying to reach + mobilize. But we also know our GOP opponents are continuing to pour millions into the TV markets in PA — so it’s not going to be cheap or easy to keep our ads up.
**[Please, Derek, will you chip in whatever you can to help us reach every Pennsylvanian, power our campaign, and send John to be Democrats’ 51st vote in the U.S. Senate?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45211?refcode=em20220309-4890&t=5&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45211?amount=5&refcode=em20220309-4890&t=24&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)**
__
Thank you, Derek. Every single dollar we raise is going to be crucial to helping our campaign and its message reach every single community in PA.
More soon,
Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220309-4890-footer&t=25&refcode2=4890_434096_ZV2gde&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4890%2E434096%2EZV2gde)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: News Alert
subject: URGENT: Republicans want to DEFUND PBS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **URGENT: Republicans propose DEFUNDING PBS!**

Republicans are continuing their decades-long push to DESTROY PBS, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **_but we’re missing YOUR response:_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6916?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3285%2E9716520%2El1qHDa)
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6916?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3285%2E9716520%2El1qHDa)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/6916?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3285%2E9716520%2El1qHDa)
---
The GOP is going after a familiar target, team: The Public Broadcasting Service (PBS).

**Republicans have spent decades attacking PBS** , a network that has brought free, educational programming into American homes for _over fifty years,_ but now they've introduced a bill that would **PROHIBIT** federal funding for one of PBS’s main funders!

**PBS is facing its most serious threat in _decades._** We've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to find out where Democrats stand, but we need 30,000 responses by midnight and **_we still haven’t heard from you!_**
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6916?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3285%2E9716520%2El1qHDa)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/6916?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220309-NewsAlert-DefendPBSRF-Pros-sl1&akid=3285%2E9716520%2El1qHDa)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: A message from Chip the Dog
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Chip here, family dog and loyal companion to Senator Maggie Hassan!
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42775941/334280372/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk735-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2NlMDdjOS1lMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSOiFuctMohvv5mNAkBAXMI3gF47eRmuM_UDO5H0fJM=)
Hi there,

Chip here, family dog and loyal companion to Senator Maggie Hassan! I know you've been getting a lot of emails from my mom recently, so I'm sorry to bother you again — but she's got a super important fundraising goal to reach, and we can't just roll over and let Republicans flip the Senate red!
The road to reelection is looking difficult for my mom: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are spending more against her than any other Democratic Senator in an effort to buy her vulnerable seat and take back control of the Senate. **They've already spent $7.5 million in attack ads against her, and now,_polls are showing her statistically tied with her Republican opponent._**
My mom just doesn't have the bottomless pockets of dark-money donors that her Republican opponents do. That's why we're counting on humans like you to chip in, and help protect New Hampshire's Senate seat and the Democratic Senate majority.

body:
|

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42776098/334280906/-843099391?refcode=20220309_EV_UKB_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc4MjI3OS1lMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZC5U0jpQOCuUuHFeJIBu_H3TOD83UOP2shCwwZ-jVSE=)

[_**You can RSVP by donating any amount right now. All proceeds for this event will go directly toward the Ukrainian Red Cross:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42776099/334280907/-843099391?refcode=20220309_EV_UKB_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc4MjI3OS1lMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZC5U0jpQOCuUuHFeJIBu_H3TOD83UOP2shCwwZ-jVSE=)

---
Please join us on Thursday to show your support for Ukraine, Ukraine’s democracy, and the Ukrainian people.

Thank you,

Team Crist

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: Charlie Crist
Date: Mon, Mar 7, 2022 at 6:38 PM
Subject: What you can do right now to support Ukraine
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Team,

Right now, the fate of Ukraine hangs in the balance.

We’ve watched in real time as Vladimir Putin has invaded a sovereign nation, ruthlessly shelling civilians and threatening to blow up nuclear power plants.

And we’ve also seen the tremendous courage by President Zelensky and all the Ukrainian people putting it all on the line to defend their homeland.

In our own small way, the Crist for Governor campaign wants to show its support for the Ukrainian people during their time of extreme need. **So this Thursday, March 10 at 6:30pm, we are hosting a benefit to support Ukraine and her people.**

[_**You can make a contribution of any amount to RSVP for this event. All proceeds from this event will be donated to the Red Cross of Ukraine.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42776101/334280909/-843099391?refcode=20220309_EV_UKB_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc4MjI3OS1lMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZC5U0jpQOCuUuHFeJIBu_H3TOD83UOP2shCwwZ-jVSE=)
**[RSVP>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42776102/334280910/-843099391?refcode=20220309_EV_UKB_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc4MjI3OS1lMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZC5U0jpQOCuUuHFeJIBu_H3TOD83UOP2shCwwZ-jVSE=)**
---
We have the tools to stand with the Ukrainian people — and we must.

**A threat to democracy anywhere is a threat to democracy everywhere. I hope you’ll join us by standing in solidarity with Ukraine.**

God bless,

Charlie Crist

_P.S. If you can't make it to the event, but still want to show your support, consider purchasing our "Florida Stands With Ukraine" t-shirt. All proceeds from sales of this shirt will be donated to the Red Cross of Ukraine._
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42776103/334280911/800519429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc4MjI3OS1lMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZC5U0jpQOCuUuHFeJIBu_H3TOD83UOP2shCwwZ-jVSE=&emci=83ded950-ca9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=18782279-e19f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8807089)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: It's time
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
For over a year the Biden administration has crippled American energy by implementing Green New Deal regulations and increasing reliance on foreign im | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=827c7c0f94)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d0994e82ba&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

We're about to reach a breaking point.

For over a year, Joe Biden has done everything in his power to cripple America's energy production -- and it's driving the cost of gas higher every day.

Green New Deal regulations have prevented our producers from capitalizing on the resources that we have right here, within the United States.

Instead, Biden has forced us to rely on foreign imports... and now it's costing us. Instability overseas has caused the price of gasoline to skyrocket, and Biden doesn't have a plan. If we don't change course soon, I'm terrified to see how far the costs will rise.

**We need new leadership** to change the course of our country and adopt energy policy that will stop skyrocketing gas prices.

I'm running for Congress to reverse Biden's destructive energy policy and lower the cost of gas at the pump. We don't have much time, and ensuring a Republican majority in the 2022 elections will be critical.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign to help me reclaim a Republican majority and change the course of America's energy policy before it's too late?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ade0fbb695&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9c86204cbd&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")

---
|
Thank you for your support. Your contribution to my campaign is critical to taking back the House of Representatives. Together, let's put an end to the costly Biden agenda and restore commonsense, affordable policies to our country.

Warm regards,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

For over a year, Joe Biden has done everything in his power to cripple America's energy production -- and it's driving the cost of gas higher every day. Green New Deal regulations have prevented our producers from capitalizing on the resources that we have right here, within the United States. Instead, Biden has forced us to rely on foreign imports... and now it's costing us. Instability overseas has caused the price of gasoline to skyrocket, and Biden doesn't have a plan. If we don't change course soon, I'm terrified to see how far the costs will rise. We need new leadership to change the course of our country and adopt energy policy that will stop skyrocketing gas prices. I'm running for Congress to reverse Biden's destructive energy policy and lower the cost of gas at the pump. We don't have much time, and ensuring a Republican majority in the 2022 elections will be critical. | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | Thank you for your support. Your contribution to my campaign is critical to taking back the House of Representatives. Together, let's put an end to the costly Biden agenda and restore commonsense, affordable policies to our country. name: Tom Perez
subject: The attack on reproductive freedom
body:
We need to send a clear message that every person deserves the right to have control over their own body and health – including reproductive care – without fear or harassment.
#

Did you see this, team?

Just three months after the Supreme Court heard arguments on one of the most consequential abortions rights cases in 50 years, Florida state legislators passed their own nearly identical restrictions, banning abortion after just 15 weeks of pregnancy.

This bill is just the latest in the many draconian measures taken by GOP-led state legislatures to restrict access to reproductive freedom. And with _Roe v. Wade_ facing an uncertain future in the hands of Donald Trump's conservative supermajority on the Supreme Court, **we need to send the message that we will NOT stand for threats to reproductive health care, including the right to safe and legal abortion.**

I promise you that as Governor of Maryland, I will continue to uphold laws that preserve reproductive rights, just as I did as President Obama's Head of Civil Rights prosecuting anti-abortion extremists under the FACE Act.

I will make sure Maryland continues to rank among states most protective of reproductive freedom by supporting efforts like the Abortion Care Access Act that works to expand access and reduce cost for Marylanders seeking reproductive health care.

name: Katie Boyd Britt
subject: ICYMI: A win for the unborn

body:
Did you see what the Senate did? Peter, Just last week, the United States Senate decided to preserve the right to life by striking down a bill that would have erased Alabama’s commonsense laws that restrict abortions. This is a win for the fight for life, Peter, but one win is not enough. The vote was close (46–48), and that’s too close for comfort. If I were in the Senate, I would have voted no in a heartbeat, because the right to life is a right that SHOULD NOT and CANNOT be taken away from _any_ human being. **_This bill would have completely eviscerated_**** _
_****_Alabama’s pro-life laws by “providing abortion_**** _
_****_services without limitations.”_**** _It might as
well have been called _****_
_****_“The Abortion On-Demand Bill.”_****
** [**Oppose Abortions and Protect the Unborn**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=f773f78cd375452c8068b8893bf9ee2d&_e=HAOR3C80uwTRF0v0-orUIUQ3QEGhoThk8VirY03wd7XxMeig3cY-TW-NygLLTCTLcbIIn1FylRpudaGZU71DSpgDC-KAmTVFhlLH7LnHkx-cKMK4xgioJDWqXuWu6-NeQtCHfbcX2yQOD4p0ACJNaclFABl4He1b0dygiwMi1Ug6ok8MzP-n5hLG35MvK-REje2UUnrKV1miKDtgWjGgts-bmnI8OgO4FytGJVGJFPcJpnNAd4lOL0oS8dnF0omnykio6Fn9xZQa5de7BJsscQ7pBNwVF5KIrFtdPVm-Q1cdvR9ODPRfb70IixVVI0Z5zT6ZxLqj9jr-FJawZ87C0d84uZJAb1jUpG8s9rLkSEDDjFziaOe3ddu2UIxOr6V1lH3t0kiFL540Luq3lvjIlVhXQl8lo0aH8Mzydi1Sw9INkwutrPDaOhNNRyDKipDfyfNPHPS8MYNEp5rQS4H9gQ%3D%3D) The far-left bemoans the bill’s failure, but I’d challenge them to point out just exactly where in the Constitution killing another human being is outlined as a right. As a **conservative, pro-life mother,** I could NEVER support such a bill. And you know when I’m in the Senate, I will not let up in my fight to protect the unborn. You can count on that. subject: $14B for Ukraine, $0 for America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Congress prioritizes everyone except you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066213?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=d0fd07901d&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Our country is falling apart at the seams.

_At least 64% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck._

Gas prices are continuing to climb.

Groceries cost more than ever.

Crime is out of control. Our cities are no longer safe, even in broad daylight.

Millions of strangers are pouring across our border, and they’re bringing drugs and crime.

Fentanyl is now the leading cause of death for Americans aged 18-45. More than homicide, suicide, even car accidents.

Tens of thousands of Americans are suffering from adverse reactions to their mandated COVID injections.

_And now, our “leaders” are actively trying to involve our nation in another potentially devastating European war—one that may well turn into World War 3._

Instead of standing up for American citizens, our politicians are standing with foreign countries where we have no interests.

Just this week, Congress gave Ukraine $14 BILLION.

**This is the same Congress—Republican and Democrat—that refused to give a single penny to build a Border Wall.**

The same Congress that took **months** to decide on a measly $1,400 stimulus check for the people whose livelihoods the COVID mandates destroyed.

_The same Congress which pours our wealth down the drain every single day for every single special interest and foreign country on earth,**_EXCEPT_** the one interest they were elected to protect: You. Me. The American people._

It’s time to say goodbye to the rat’s nest of traitors that is the D.C. Swamp.

**It’s time to put America First.**

**America Always.**

**America ONLY.**

**[_Send a FIGHTER like me to D.C._

_Punish the Democrats' RINO Lackeys by throwing them out on their rear ends so we can finally take our nation back._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=7ef7c63f33&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3e08c9c53a&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=ea5476f223&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=50cdcf6813&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |

body:

Peter, I wanted to write a quick note on the state of the race.

As of today, two polls have now confirmed that we’ve surged to a solid second place in the Democratic primary – a strong sign that Wisconsinites know that our message is resonating and that our team can beat Ron Johnson in November.

This is good news because our hard work is paying off. With your help, we’ve been able to run TV ads and reach out to voters across the state to see what matters most to them and then incorporate that into our campaign.

For too long, Ron Johnson has been a roadblock for any progress in the Senate. He’s left behind the people of Wisconsin, and now we have the chance to defeat him. People want change, and I’m going to deliver.

**[But I need you by my side as we fight all the way to November. Can you make a donation of whatever is meaningful to you This is good news because our hard work is paying off. With your help, we’ve been able to run TV ads and reach out to voters across the state to see what matters most to them and then incorporate that into our campaign. name: Herschel Walker
subject: I will always find a way to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? |
---
Peter,

This race is not about me.

This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy.

And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way.

**Weak leaders create bad results.**

Peter, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? **_I am._**

That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3e040b19fd7d4411a799b0e4eb960bcf&_e=NWr5B_VYUk5d9uHdrbQXPceXQi6r_2LYR2WFfuRLJwSNVoBORg3Zx3X0jHFGWF1r5Gt2Ut5_IgSXdW1H1dgv1_m-4TlzKnWzg1kZcqhgNO-C7ZuYfgKwGg2-J0PiD7gqHaslEHat5HUtwx4oJ1CiAr1z8phGHkJvlEZ_dYZTuA9XutnmUHKZ5Xq8I39Ztp72EC3ERixLVk09odt92f3WGC0-u4Ed1xKdRSh3l6kYKFePDNUXmu-bTSm6PAlUnoeW2bE2_prfO3c5f-kBKcG01eyVXmaruiFH52qtQHJhaT-1V68AD-KdT5KPZJL8UQm_VUEd1BedYpklEizNf7EHZTsx79WmwHAb3lMZn4zhewzYUCiQdA77cmqPn6ZsncsUMF3AUdIyQdki0GQWwtHjGwvQgjx9NoKkldN4LKqpFwUtxxJ518izkD6pRGe3nOpb4MGP_4alFHK4gmiV3T1i2KWQSi2FVtQdC5sRjYFP0DQ%3D)
We need you on our team. We are up against a Democrat opponent that has more than $23 million in the bank.

Democrats in Washington and their donors will say and spend anything to keep their hold on the Senate. But if the course of my life has proven anything, _**it's that no one will outwork me, and I always find a way to win.**_

**[Peter, please take a moment to watch our official filing video, and then chip in $4, $10, or even $34 today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3e040b19fd7d4411a799b0e4eb960bcf&_e=NWr5B_VYUk5d9uHdrbQXPceXQi6r_2LYR2WFfuRLJwSNVoBORg3Zx3X0jHFGWF1r5Gt2Ut5_IgSXdW1H1dgv1_m-4TlzKnWzg1kZcqhgNO-C7ZuYfgKwGg2-J0PiD7gqHaslEHat5HUtwx4oJ1CiAr1z8phGHkJvlEZ_dYZTuA9XutnmUHKZ5Xq8I39Ztp72EC3ERixLVk09odt92f3WGC0-u4Ed1xKdRSh3l6kYKFePDNUXmu-bTSm6PAlUnoeWZBE2rdwNjcvKSoxgYlAgcovc8_ZLRx5yY8P--qBDSHbQUBBMpkRvsItWFa8X9w5XjzDOoCAoIu840S0UWpKFUVUivUaM7QFYv21xg8a84Ae-1JpBYVccnfMA7e5IakjQIHvRm2UM2x8uwmQjdZnb0sO0AVmyPhoIw0T7iSXrX5HlklGlf1ya8fBFKEYM7gQiYkcPj8mrOUHfgKtSj3QptLmxMpdly9fNkSf48c6P9tY%3D)**

Thanks,

clean_body: Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? | Peter, This race is not about me. This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy. And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way. Weak leaders create bad results. Peter, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? I am. That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia. We need you on our team. We are up against a Democrat opponent that has more than $23 million in the bank. Democrats in Washington and their donors will say and spend anything to keep their hold on the Senate. But if the course of my life has proven anything, it's that no one will outwork me, and I always find a way to win. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Mia McLeod
subject: It's long, but important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ye1S9nEDEpSa-nXaAdXqpkgiPnoJFcjCCy_b3FJ7OJ2xWf5BA8uW6SHNPmOY_l4tcPRtJt38rBJJg858exfAiRWoQ_xAkxX50fCN_JFXWBclojKnqmso5GEs-9ujFkr3wHE0AlYhwies0YfudU1uYpLTK6FDflA9rHBLgmA4pTaQxra2rFXDjHAvR1l6kFYTRtbCmBkE64PV9Fnp73DKXTqrFCBkCfEQMmaWC0NgqKjMMeSu7NNR1UMB4-Yk-LYy0n60cvNP_YthNMHGDVcq_s4o-NXkuggJsOPQTAZgmJVZoew_Qksb9p3f90Dezu7jE/3k7/Ik2arD3gQvymmupuTMomPQ/h0/_sEenaxyTpV6gguqZUKTwE8WThS96Alqt2KGqPI3OZ4)
---
Dear Friend -
---
Time after time, Governor McMaster and the Republican majority undercut the people of South Carolina, depriving them of the very resources they've earned, need and deserve. I'm fed up with it. Last week, I spoke on the floor of the SC Senate, urging my SCGOP colleagues to repay state unemployment benefits to hard-working South Carolinians who were cheated out of the unemployment benefits they've earned.
---
The back story: Gov. McMaster and his party always brag about how much money they save South Carolina employers each year, knowing that they're "saving" employers by not raising unemployment benefits for employees in well over a decade. He knows this lands squarely on the backs of the hardworking people of the Palmetto State- and he does it anyway.
---
During the height of a global pandemic, I realized SC workers were receiving between $42/week and $326/week in unemployment benefits, regardless of how much money they earned annually. This is absolutely unacceptable, so I got to work! I introduced a bill in the Senate to raise those weekly unemployment benefits and provide some semblance of balance and relief.
---
To add insult to injury, when the federal government sent pandemic assistance to the working people of South Carolina, Gov. McMaster chose to cut the additional $600/week in federal unemployment benefits that unemployed South Carolinians desperately needed, knowing that the SC Dept. of Employment & Workforce (SCDEW) was already cheating SC workers out of state unemployment funding they had earned and should've received. ** ** By illegally exercising discretion SCDEW didn't have, and capping state unemployment benefits at $326 per week, even though some SC employees earned and should've received significantly more than that, many working people across SC who were unemployed through no fault of their own never received the full amount of unemployment benefits they were owed.
---
Not surprisingly, when my bill publicly exposed their illegal actions, lawsuits were filed by plaintiffs across South Carolina and instead of righting their wrong...the Governor and his SCGOP cohorts doubled-down and unconstitutionally attempted to give SCDEW retroactive discretion it never had. ** ** I know this is getting into the nitty-gritty, but that's the kind of legislator I am and it's the kind of governor I'll be. Issues like this can make or break working families that are already struggling to survive and fully recover. clean_body: | | Dear Friend - Time after time, Governor McMaster and the Republican majority undercut the people of South Carolina, depriving them of the very resources they've earned, need and deserve. I'm fed up with it. Last week, I spoke on the floor of the SC Senate, urging my SCGOP colleagues to repay state unemployment benefits to hard-working South Carolinians who were cheated out of the unemployment benefits they've earned. The back story: Gov. McMaster and his party always brag about how much money they save South Carolina employers each year, knowing that they're "saving" employers by not raising unemployment benefits for employees in well over a decade. He knows this lands squarely on the backs of the hardworking people of the Palmetto State- and he does it anyway. During the height of a global pandemic, I realized SC workers were receiving between $42/week and $326/week in unemployment benefits, regardless of how much money they earned annually. This is absolutely unacceptable, so I got to work! I introduced a bill in the Senate to raise those weekly unemployment benefits and provide some semblance of balance and relief. To add insult to injury, when the federal government sent pandemic assistance to the working people of South Carolina, Gov. McMaster chose to cut the additional $600/week in federal unemployment benefits that unemployed South Carolinians desperately needed, knowing that the SC Dept. of Employment & Workforce (SCDEW) was already cheating SC workers out of state unemployment funding they had earned and should've received. By illegally exercising discretion SCDEW didn't have, and capping state unemployment benefits at $326 per week, even though some SC employees earned and should've received significantly more than that, many working people across SC who were unemployed through no fault of their own never received the full amount of unemployment benefits they were owed. Not surprisingly, when my bill publicly exposed their illegal actions, lawsuits were filed by plaintiffs across South Carolina and instead of righting their wrong...the Governor and his SCGOP cohorts doubled-down and unconstitutionally attempted to give SCDEW retroactive discretion it never had. I know this is getting into the nitty-gritty, but that's the kind of legislator I am and it's the kind of governor I'll be. Issues like this can make or break working families that are already struggling to survive and fully recover. I've always been a fierce advocate for the working people of South Carolina. Our June 14 Primary, where we can choose to put real issues like these front and center, will be here before we know it and I'm counting on your support to get me to the general election. I've said it from the start, I'm running because South Carolina deserves a Governor who will actually invest in our people and our economy to provide much-needed balance and strengthen our communities. I've been working to do just that in the General Assembly and with your support, we're ready to take our vision for a better, stronger South Carolina to the Governor's Office. In solidarity, Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_t=WC-9_a4W0xHkA9SI0SAcqea6UbWQbxP1eHRRCqTn9Wk5KZSJUzLs1j44pTdXTnatJQflzXgQK9-GemTGrCI7hCzhyOUT0ArYwKmSqPqpnSaK-dMKp5E0k9dTyo55xpYxNYHnHuEoWOq3bU_W9XZGukFqMuyyXMMWWF1pps86OdU%3D).

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCGJYAX6_LfEyEkrTKWf71QBH-zhPoLZMEft-ybAqC3D-tTx9ZWkcZWV7eRsW7LJl-J3bDs3MDt-Ttn9TIpo_T6TkaJDNWre5DQAfW8ucibFpBwTmwqRVy1MZ8BITpqGevm8SDDkdegJHhe-bOMPMiXHCuj2D86x7SknVd--jBwJ82uM7PWuLYO3Lfl5t2cJ5ydyydH0gZ6htrnUOsTKuIhJ)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCG4pSS8ppHZwbXpujaYqtAsThGxeNkyjpNqZIiRpXYN8FpoNKa41hWKtPM1whdjfPv9NRc4D4FSGaXp8JXp0D8-YyS3WZ7mNpH5UbydP0yAaEEWmf4guIsKl5sTZxl3Jwvx3r918EdWge1sFoqk1B9x17mePA2WU6QxApJPIhZOlhSAaj8Kjf3LCjoEzX7ERzqIEZbJwBXtF6jy1wFYA626)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCG7TX8HLS_3SdUMqGcfPaRxo2nvwE7khodJuzIjAOyEDEKtB04Fa-OJed3yNFGHIF8ji-8n_fhpUVe5wXk7E991ot_5ZS4QpvygBVDNWI6meAnOxBCYjYcY2h5L0FCciRevVSFxtSbjtXaPirGiuLH14_W_x9zrK8PXXxZK3FL7SdAaZ-hLYnGPgG8Z9vwNeOq7otyNCw0YJIYNyod0ProR)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCF7doMoOtHvIW8q80gKzD-7ybgfHcKK6jsdkT0iYakRLO8CzsjOAHzHH5AANJZDOO53Adt5Qsl5msebGuLpPpxWtbNOim7-I6LIgcGhx0csvu5dJk1E-UmYZjnGbIjgrg6XRKZqulJ5CGBr-RhRaDfZszG9p84kB9OZhxpkB0pIYajDFJwmEuLxuFeyRVYPhfRWSmyXb6BqvYRQASGpYykE)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** PLEASE TAKE A CHANCE ON ME
MAKE A GIFT TODAY>>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCFE4m_Uc4thtYkovUR3TJkrqYHdpri-dLI67e-3AJFwVfduEaOgf8RAd-wObRV_34sX9tIehOzmSPzEYlIzmrTa9hhhpyQCXPy0R79axAHl8lOOh3-0AbfLAqgL8eZOW9b-73sXFg5KpRAkXKm2vXOxkbflfIjH3YDH1CHRHmb-tazloYokTpJSm-BcPGN1LmQliXf9hmMrMD47ZMqHsAXC)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCH1G9ljoaSxXvNUzyUr9PA4pq2IHN-lnkG0o_BoT4m9RqkOGH2o1vl2cYe6EK2DZBRGQkCuoPLWswPU-JmtTf6gWQHqvU0PaxE215WN1RwPljb6ehcPfpSHa6wypCOlKXScJ3VN1yAl-NltQ2j7q4-dwp6K0vH8s4bw0lpL0-B7Rls5olU5nGWJBEi9BYSZ0xrUvYg477JhkBfHJfhKnZkc)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCH7-ZdHuIv9Gt7XjCRSib_I-ViXQMA-NzntlYYkzZ2N7Iifmo2tjI8N9b_-ArOtYpBguaNq7lJBWhiecWu1PFC5hoATZuwH4ip1Y6frglpIZ1XZADR1nz_39-P78Hdlbe92ze8RBk_xDu0KQEhi60dH33FJY7CTVqVKQGP0p2FwHCnX3l_9iekT8jpZip1LuoISDIamfzRAFtoocM5K1Qis)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** PLEASE TAKE A CHANCE ON ME
MAKE A GIFT TODAY >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCHOPxKaNlOtSMw8735D92nQEX_M-J5M23mHF6L-zZvuvQUjsPoQxVv4njqksrvC6UqYTWL-bISPteJXvT77RcjrJnMk046QH6sIaLbQJ30D1oGah1sYYRpPATkS0f2gfEZC9ozZrXrDfDJMDgmqwuvtm-Bpth4SUvRHYe16aiu1M3xCJeHfbI22XtyWiKI36vcjSpoCQpa1IaNzG2ly7TIQ)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3540efb4a08b44058b3d9e54e00d9712&_e=6GwJvGRpf0gij3MWXXXJkc-pgBxWJvdSgc80J9_l3Lh0lEVkemINLF30XMx-2TsxkrR-KJXZrUVo2Fo4b0zXrkng_UZ-dk6PBCy-pVos7Crp7vuHoS0K2IgNIkM_iEmQ6Nw3k_rtqtwAHxHpcyMNFs69I2xukaLana7xjOIMUmWbcS9Xi50fMGaUimN5VBIeK0GYablpKRTDTuqSHoJamKvgfOw6SzkKbIUWqfnLRXleNHCYLd1eXitiQmBDfWjRCOYkMUIh9UPaEfmk7dHLIrZN4XgtocIDIKmMA-51cCE1gGr_VTiB6SWWReEnfkUsVasrUmggYzZZLX-aLkfe2lH7g_IDVBkuKM3SY9bqqc8rfFjjmgs9KBo5HhnTMOn7ZsmQGdHeKWAQtE9m0zpG18u1XMmWjpGJj6iaHPgPCn2h8ehBzVi_8Rgj4qNS_PDdLTEnoaI3ykxJ__qBq9ihCr5hKnRZ51DzFwpv_7sll1SR9a-G7qt1bfsPW3-n2p1w)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.
