clean_body: I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Peter, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: My Plan vs. Sisolak’s
body:
It isn’t just our communities that have become less secure under the watch of Steve Sisolak...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tc1k1rQnLVuFesASeoKohhMBWYqN39SKcKU_tugb3svBniFGElFf6Eg9blqEglI42o2rYfSXyzKjYS4s3HQ5Irz3i4Lcuo2pyt-7x7kItSSuYvlM9jjibEjlLbup19Btqc6E6SiAVJAF1OlgsycS-opf4slIygoyBfUthYsTCE0R3skJK4h0B4sCt0LYQicDRx1xHRHgL6I=&c=HfL6iO0lSJN5lgdHmCWUigN4X9tkwWBFgh-MCUWDVG3QmUSvJStWxg==&ch=_Nohy0LbPpHN19_QveE-MH-_mvenlUi0oO2vGrApHjiMQR8tSU6nGQ==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
It isn't just our communities that have become less secure under the watch of Steve Sisolak...
Did you know that Nevada now ranks LAST in the nation for election security with Sisolak and Single Party Rule in charge?
We shouldn't be surprised. After all, we're talking about a Governor who signed a law creating ballot harvesting, and who STILL refuses to enact basic security measures like Voter ID.
My approach? I'll protect your voice at the ballot box just like I protect our streets and our communities. You shouldn't have to worry about the security of your elections - just like you shouldn't have to worry about criminals being let off the hook.
---

Folks, some talking heads are doubtful as to whether or not I’ll be able to hold my seat. But I know better than to listen to the skeptics.
Many of my male peers thought I wouldn’t succeed when I joined the Naval Academy when I was just 17 – but I went on to be one of the first women ever accepted into the Navy’s nuclear program.
And in 2018, people didn’t think I’d be able to flip Republican Scott Taylor’s seat – but thanks to this grassroots team, we proved those who doubted us wrong.
Now I’m running as a Frontline Democrat in a toss-up seat, and folks are once again questioning my ability to win.
We have a chance to defy the odds again this November. But I need your support to win my toss-up race.
**[Will you chip in $25? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? |

Fellow American,

This race is not about me.

This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy.

And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way.

**Weak leaders create bad results.**

Fellow American, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? **_I am._**

That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e138cf7e0bfe423c8ca4a4366113a3ae&_e=b74RmRURlFowODmPg2P0AfUQrYepn9C7wAOdMI7sam39enXaGC_ujoqM9ffGdgQ0ieExgbxMQvnL05EY-WqpzCd1hgcbtzA9F0wtJl28iA1J81gzpvd5TinOqC_klQRHIE_BDoXOaYciDpoUboskPY8GPORm7-7iAUOZ0jp8NLKSQ86xRbOKuXdqyJ0l_jHbPbp7rAH4wTWLRfUmCymEyYBX6oJcxz9xIMnFhGOWZDFfMvg8XMsf-qkVlfpWdE_Zewacc9vDLyHtAUlVx7cxDKWDpFKIbWOU1kNk5IBvastwDMuTjX27Yh8wZljyPfCteWRnf3odssnWjnPJOLrnlenGZWmGisWKRQogNEFixdnd-Z35NRo39JLXIlrv7yCs8xWS71qyI7bhv_s7exXwilghZ_6Woz7bymdV4rBThnBkFwUbp4AL0PBSNSTM4kKXQ0LWcuC2QpqYZtOsbWwpig%3D%3D)

clean_body: Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? | Fellow American, This race is not about me. This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy. And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way. Weak leaders create bad results. Fellow American, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? I am. That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia. We need you on our team. We are up against a Democrat opponent that has more than $23 million in the bank. Democrats in Washington and their donors will say and spend anything to keep their hold on the Senate. But if the course of my life has proven anything, it's that no one will outwork me, and I always find a way to win. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Mark’s story of service
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As Republicans ramp up their attack ads, we’re hopeful you’ll take a minute to read to the end and step up to help Mark.
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220309-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=2286_6688874_gU301H&akid=2286%2E6688874%2EgU301H)

Friends —
This is an important message about Mark’s career of service. As Republicans ramp up their attack ads, we’re hopeful you’ll take a minute to read to the end and then step up to help Mark.
Mark grew up as a twin son of two police officers. After graduating from the Merchant Marine Academy, he became a naval aviator and made two deployments, flying 39 combat missions in Operation Desert Storm.
He was selected as an astronaut in 1996 — in the same class as his twin brother — and flew four missions into space.
In 2012, Mark left NASA and retired from the Navy to focus on Gabby’s rehabilitation and recovery.
He ran for Senate because he knows how to solve tough problems, and work alongside and lead people of different backgrounds with different perspectives in service of a greater mission.
He won. But those values and his leadership have made him the target of an enormous amount of outside spending from those who want to protect the status quo in Washington.
And with this being an FEC fundraising deadline month, he really needs your help.
[**Can you PLEASE make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — to help keep Mark Kelly in the United States Senate? It’s not about how much money we raise, but how many donations we receive toward our total.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220309-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=2286_6688874_gU301H&akid=2286%2E6688874%2EgU301H)

Peter,

Tom Cotton here, reaching out because I’m endorsing Leora Levy for the U.S. Senate in Connecticut [**and I’m asking you to join me.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f4c7af3372cf4e02b46bbbdb2f5da028&_e=578EMZvSylqXV0iftGFb7hlXgW4R0JF9xyKmGtDV9tCSjR-xoN-XYa7WgaCTZRplL6HnDz-sR0h19jQxUJ6w8zSeg4HS9caFed5ou-F91DTv93Ev9xiSWasgIpd5Pd1XYDa8g_OBMvXbG6K08dD2O4M-Ft9eDujysdGV9YJSWjKUmKbo8HPDc9iRJosLrJmR0VQNclnVqB0J4ZvdaiuenhxMw2HgnZKetO6hMA2zk4SrorZFHOMeCWXGHs516aCRnckgmOdnw_JxDO9Cj9BBhEfjsJk2alG4vUjuaBjVaIDAeZJQx4unJ3DKNkvvni_mnI-52uTCqCoRPFNhNNOXbuT1Pljf5qi_eFxThTdQpN1tZ24fH6vOmHLL3qsiw_kTqjqR8kb4o3iJtUnwnCKgQXo1Fpw0qxnj7m1LYmfw5nnh2MtCSVHB_KK5FWDd1Qq8CP7YyXJIwtzHErnlmdhISg%3D%3D)

Leora’s family escaped Cuba during Castro’s revolution in 1960. She lived the American Dream, was nominated to be an Ambassador by President Trump and worked at the State Department, and has helped elect Republicans for more than 40 years.

She lived the American Dream, was nominated to be an Ambassador by President Trump and worked at the State Department, and has helped elect Republicans for more than 40 years. Joe Biden, Richard Blumenthal, and the rest of the Democrats have crippled our energy independence, driven inflation to record highs, opened the floodgates at our border, and enabled a violent crime wave. body:
I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country – in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes. I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. What America will we leave for our children? With the direction our country is headed in right now – our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42a6a3c5756c48a09948386ee5094ab7&_e=lQcXFCObLNRDUegDawPBfI6mtoJ37JjT5KfwykYV2s5U33ZYKZ8bkIh14EZ5hnO-6Hx1xKc4Vx63BHti8mnoXQc_TFbd8me3-3UC7DCnArtwtXHH5muzlOJNA1QpRLJvsiU0LLBcmKPiQwHaIcdPumKT_St-henFgc-M9aBB44Y9mJX3IPEczsgfbHIy5bm-AoaBCd12wXl4IJL8fjUht3RGkuKDmWf_AXgpJ3f1lq1y03doyWkBIVpKSvihHQRl-eyZBXpWBQGSDUpzoRhALXHcBCEDmp17n3punwqfWMu78xf-wnngkJXTpvHEosL-gG9kMGh6KgM390cys3r1NnqQWOb0vB2mNAOiarkEX3q2QWboVVfbKlttEw6k_hls)

Peter,

Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Leader Kevin McCarthy submitted me for the prestigious “Young Guns Program” and they declared me “On the Radar”! This program is designed to help Republican candidates running in the top competitive districts around the country to provide strategic support.

**But here’s the catch:** candidates in the program must prove they can raise enough money to sustain their campaigns and pave a clear path to victory, in order to be given support by the NRCC. **Since this membership is so exclusive, I have a hefty goal that I have to meet before the quarter is up at the end of March - $100,000, and I’m more than $40,000 short.**

[**Will you help me prove to top Republican’s in Washington, that it’s worth investing in this race by chipping into my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42a6a3c5756c48a09948386ee5094ab7&_e=lQcXFCObLNRDUegDawPBfI6mtoJ37JjT5KfwykYV2s5U33ZYKZ8bkIh14EZ5hnO-6Hx1xKc4Vx63BHti8mnoXQc_TFbd8me3-3UC7DCnArtwtXHH5muzlOJNA1QpRLJvsiU0LLBcmKPiQwHaIcdPumKT_St-henFgc-M9aBB44YHBaJgRPCes4ytH06rfT7Jpd0DiXEVtlIwb-IukH-83pf_FMCYdQwoQZIZ8SZXFO2MSTbZ3lYAmA82TAaESglAs_wTgFU38MQgAxZ_fAci1Ql8ebh6QMUY2w0Alb1jKM4lAv1NFK_dfEixpVCut_zqACDuaqrSxVf-3srtWUnFrz_Od03dxDecoo3u2c53ZuNwBxg204G8i_wxlWTEnKg9)

I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country - _in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes._ I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and kick my ultra-liberal opponent out of office.

Republican’s only need to pick up five seats to ensure the majority - and it all comes down to Minnesota. I can’t afford to fall short _**again**_. With all eyes on this race, I sincerely need all the help I can get, and that means crushing this goal before March 31st. Father. Husband. Marine.

| **_Tyler Kistner_**
* * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future.

clean_body: I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country – in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes. I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. What America will we leave for our children? With the direction our country is headed in right now – our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. | Peter, Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Leader Kevin McCarthy submitted me for the prestigious “Young Guns Program” and they declared me “On the Radar”! This program is designed to help Republican candidates running in the top competitive districts around the country to provide strategic support. But here’s the catch: candidates in the program must prove they can raise enough money to sustain their campaigns and pave a clear path to victory, in order to be given support by the NRCC. Since this membership is so exclusive, I have a hefty goal that I have to meet before the quarter is up at the end of March - $100,000, and I’m more than $40,000 short. I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country - in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes. I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and kick my ultra-liberal opponent out of office. Republican’s only need to pick up five seats to ensure the majority - and it all comes down to Minnesota. I can’t afford to fall short again. With all eyes on this race, I sincerely need all the help I can get, and that means crushing this goal before March 31st. Every contribution --even if it’s just a couple of bucks -- makes a huge difference in inching towards our goal. I’m counting on you today, Peter. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. P.S. I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and that oath will never expire. | Tyler Kistner * Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Nancy's actions were an absolute disgrace, and she is everything that is wrong with the Washington Swamp. Crushing Nancy and her liberal dreams of keeping the majority is absolutely paramount, so I'm really counting on YOU stepping up. I need YOU to send a message to her loud and clear, Peter. This is so critical that I've REACTIVATED your 600%-IMPACT offer. I need you right now, Peter. It's you and me against these Corrupt Liberals, and I need to know I can count on you. My team is giving me a list of EVERY PATRIOT who contributes TODAY, and I'm expecting to see YOUR NAME on that list. Don't let me down. Make sure the Radical Left hears you LOUD AND CLEAR. name: Team Reeves
subject: Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement By Governor George Allen
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Reeves for Congress
body:
Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement By Governor George Allen
| | |
---
| | [](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f6f7284ef-dadf062a-91cd-4d1c-9447-397bebaadec9-000000/-Njhu3k6QmDxVKBbpC5DX7GwAIk=261)
---
|
---
| Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement By Governor George Allen
---
|
---
| Joining the ranks of Senator Marco Rubio, Governor Rick Perry, Delegate Nick Freitas and dozens of others, Governor George Allen has endorsed my campaign for the 7th Congressional District! I'm so honored to have the endorsement of such a towering figure in conservative politics, Governor Allen knows a winner when he sees one. That's why he supported me in 2011 when I ran against, _and defeated_ , a 28 year Democrat incumbent in a Democrat leaning seat, flipping control of the Virginia Senate. And now, with a tough opponent like Abigail Spanberger, George Allen knows we need a winner to run against her.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Like George's father I too am a football coach, and while it's a little different from the NFL, _I'm ready to play in the Big Leagues and be a_** _Day One Leader_** _in Washington._ As a coach we're building a top notch team so that we can win big in November. [George Allen is joining that team - will you join too?](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/1/0100017f6f7284ef-dadf062a-91cd-4d1c-9447-397bebaadec9-000000/RMKjZJ4h3TvA0BgEihUCkZaY-As=261) Sincerely,Bryce Reeves
---
| |
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmi51uke6rifhn1id2qm9b2sb33eck10sg3tfnn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3hm8ob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5uussrfeeu6bp5thg7uar11oumaduu8cte8jpjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3hm8ob6c3h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z068s6oq2edmlou42cvrmbnst43bogvgfhf1jg1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3hm8ob6c3h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ir286s2qoagjkorn4b2vl6vlv7s6ua4vivbkdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3hm8ob6c3h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: A Conservative Future
subject: Are we going in the right direction?
body:

Joe Biden and the Democrats have taken America further _to the left_ than we ever thought was possible.

The White House and Congress are making decisions based on the whims of the woke Left rather than hardworking Americans like you.

_But unlike the socialist Democrats, Republicans are working to put YOU first. _

We want to know what YOU think about the direction our country is headed in, so we put together a survey so we can hear what YOU have to say.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Thank you all for the support
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Earlier this week, my team asked for your thoughts on my leadership so far this year.

To each of you who took time to respond, please know that I read over your comments and found them to be inspirational.

You’re proudly standing with me in this fight for democracy and took the time to share stories about the work you’re doing to protect democracy in your respective communities. Thank you for your feedback and THANK YOU for your work.

I believe we will win this battle by uniting together as a coalition of concerned citizens who want to secure our elections and protect democracy for generations to come.

We need to win this battle because the assaults on our democratic processes are escalating. Just last week, I rejected a GOP-led attempt to restrict your access to vote by mail and make it easier for election officials to throw away absentee ballots.

In a democracy lawmakers shouldn’t be asking themselves, “How can I make it harder for my constituents to vote?” Rather, they should be saying, “I will do everything in my power to make it easier for everyone in my state to participate in democracy.”

The work we do together must always be in pursuit of that goal, friend. We need to increase accessibility to the ballot box and build public trust in our elections. Once we do that, we will build a political environment where attempts to restrict democratic access are cast into the dustbin of history.

Your survey responses made it clear that you support my leadership and are with me in this work.

Now, will you support my re-election campaign today so I can continue serving Michigan and protecting our elections?

[secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030922]
secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030922 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030922]Thanks, again, for the work you’re doing to protect our democracy.

Jocelyn

clean_body: Friend, Earlier this week, my team asked for your thoughts on my leadership so far this year. To each of you who took time to respond, please know that I read over your comments and found them to be inspirational. You’re proudly standing with me in this fight for democracy and took the time to share stories about the work you’re doing to protect democracy in your respective communities. Thank you for your feedback and THANK YOU for your work. I believe we will win this battle by uniting together as a coalition of concerned citizens who want to secure our elections and protect democracy for generations to come. We need to win this battle because the assaults on our democratic processes are escalating. Just last week, I rejected a GOP-led attempt to restrict your access to vote by mail and make it easier for election officials to throw away absentee ballots. In a democracy lawmakers shouldn’t be asking themselves, “How can I make it harder for my constituents to vote?” Rather, they should be saying, “I will do everything in my power to make it easier for everyone in my state to participate in democracy.” The work we do together must always be in pursuit of that goal, friend. We need to increase accessibility to the ballot box and build public trust in our elections. Once we do that, we will build a political environment where attempts to restrict democratic access are cast into the dustbin of history. Your survey responses made it clear that you support my leadership and are with me in this work. Now, will you support my re-election campaign today so I can continue serving Michigan and protecting our elections? name: Peter Welch
subject: re: USPS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Because of folks like you, we’re delivering for Vermonters.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=127%2E61531%2Euw73V2)
The Postal Service is a mess.
But help is finally on the way—and you helped make it happen. Thanks to folks like you speaking out, the Senate passed the Postal Service Reform Act, the biggest reform to the USPS in nearly two decades.
I fought to pass this bill in the House because it’s going to be a big help for Vermonters. And this happened because Congress did things the Vermont way: we listened.
We listened to people who gathered in Elmore to save their rural post office. We listened to complaints about the uptick in delays—from seniors who rely on getting life-saving prescription drugs in the mail, people living paycheck-to-paycheck who weren’t getting their paychecks on time, rural communities that missed deliveries, small businesses that couldn’t count on shipments, and more.
, here’s what the Postal Service Reform Act will do:
* **Require six-day delivery** for both mail and packages.
* **Save the Postal Service $27 billion** over the next decade by no longer requiring them to pre-fund retiree health benefits 75 years into the future—for employees who haven't even been born yet. Costs which no other federal agency or private business has had imposed on them.
* **Create an online dashboard** with updated national and local service data for more transparency.

The bill now heads to President Biden’s desk, and I’m honored that we worked together to make it happen. We’re bringing better service to our communities and will put the Postal Service in its strongest financial position in years.
[**These are the kind of positive changes that Democrats can make when we control Congress, but it will all go away if Republicans win the Senate in November. We need all hands on deck to win this thing, so chip in right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1488?t=3&akid=127%2E61531%2Euw73V2)
Thanks for your support,
Peter

---

CNN is calling Florida a top pickup opportunity for Democrats, and James Carville says he has "zero doubt" that I can win this race, friend – but there's a problem:

body:

Let me give you the CliffNotes version of what happens if we lose Senate
control:

* No legislation passes – you can kiss affordable health care,
environmental protections, and cutting workers in on the deal goodbye
on day one.
* Roe could be history – the current Supreme Court is expected to
overturn Roe v. Wade. Tim’s GOP opponents are all anti-choice, so we
need to make sure Tim is in the Senate to protect reproductive rights.
* Bye bye, free-and-fair elections – voting rights legislation has been
struck down at every turn, despite Democrats controlling both houses
with razor-thin majorities.

The most important thing you can do to ensure we defend and expand our
Senate majority is help Tim Ryan win in Ohio, folks.

Tim is neck-and-neck in the polls with his GOP opponents, but they have a
massive financial advantage from their billionaire buddies and right-wing
super PACs.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8658?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2695%2E3611125%2Eca_Kx0 ]That’s why I’m calling on you, folks—can I count on you to
chip in $25 to flip Ohio blue and keep the gavel out of McConnell’s greedy
clutches?

body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9dc974af-c79f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/c4ff702f-c99f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZmNzAyZi1jOTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wV_cloKMaKnJDpW526ZoDEdDUuwiiP70_1gG17mh4qo=&id=103697760)

| Over the last few weeks, I’ve been on the road talking to voters across Kansas. It’s the best part of campaigning, hearing directly from the people who I want to represent in the US Senate and learning what they are looking for in their leaders.

I hear a lot of the same refrains about why we need new leadership in Washington, and it’s exciting because it’s exactly why I’m running.

[Kansas needs leadership that is in touch with the day-to-day challenges. I come from a long line of Kansans, and I love this state and all that comes with it. My father is a pastor who taught me the value of working for all people, and my mother is a teacher who taught me the value of public education and using our gifts to improve the community.

[I believe it's important for leaders to have first-hand knowledge of the struggles of day-to-day life. That’s why I'm running for Senate – to bring compassionate and accountable leadership to Washington. **Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

subject: I wanted you to hear it from me first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42780251/334301502/683353327?refcode=20220309_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmRmYTJjYy1mMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jo6yMVptyfoDlTeI5O159ideMa_F2J7ZZ9n6cj71U6I=) **Friend – I have an urgent update, and I wanted you to hear it from me first:** **1.** NBC News reports that Georgia is the most important swing state in the November elections, which means Senate control could be decided by our race. **2.** Donald Trump just held a megadonor fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago with my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), so they can flood this race with MILLIONS to defeat me. **3\. Our people-powered movement is falling short of the resources we need to fight back. If we don't see an _immediate surge_ of grassroots support, we could be outraised and outspent right before our first official FEC deadline of the election year. ** Everything we've been fighting for – from voting rights to climate justice – is on the line in Georgia. **With the latest polls showing me 1 POINT BEHIND Walker, we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal – so I'm counting on you to help us close our budget gap now:** [**Please, friend, will you split $15 before midnight between Seth Moulton and my campaign so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42780252/334301503/683353327?refcode=20220309_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmRmYTJjYy1mMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jo6yMVptyfoDlTeI5O159ideMa_F2J7ZZ9n6cj71U6I=) I appreciate you, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: SEAN HANNITY ENDORSES JAKE EVANS
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | [LISTEN TO SEAN ENDORSE JAKE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RD78Qwe_gCa3wyelH3ej-tBPy92vy-Sq74ugGswdINkXITVNDueqaU6MqxHg5xfv7flzvgwWV6NJA41MQyjcu4Nj11UW01tY4akNWxJRG88vyr96IoK-mwnoHr8j-F6L0N-PtETeFYf1xxmlxqmWSLwwUdJXzX38lZ_qftJ3o5DefkaaVImMTv0Z6q_Bes4Q&c=srSI14UWAnPvtq3KsvPb9pRyUUEnDBkvSUIrKg39S5c5WY3z-3IAEA==&ch=QdAlc37CVb7dDkZExGhRTdUfolIdNd4LbE20lH4aFSUpvdwKrXfNHw==)
---
| For immediate release March 9th, 2022 SEAN HANNITY ENDORSES JAKE EVANS One of the most influential voices in conservative media on Tuesday rocked the 6th Congressional District race in Georgia when Sean Hannity announced his endorsement of Jake Evans on his national radio show. "It is my honor to join so many others in endorsing Jake Evans for Congress in the 6th Congressional District in Georgia," Hannity said. "Jake grew up with the benefit of working with Speaker Newt Gingrich and with an unequivocal appreciation of President Trump's leadership of our country. To save our country, Jake's generation, the next generation, must take over and I wholeheartedly endorse his candidacy as the next congressman for the 6th District of Georgia - a district near and dear to my heart. I was there for Newt Gingrich and I will now be there for Jake Evans." Hannity has long hosted one of the most watched TV shows on cable and has a radio audience of nearly 15 million every week. He was also an early backer of Donald Trump's 2016 campaign. "Conservatives all over the United States listen to Sean as a trusted voice on the issues that matter most to them - and there are few who would even compete for the level of influence he wields," Jake said. "Having the seal of approval from Sean does so much for this campaign, and I'll be thrilled to get to work with him on restoring the America First agenda."
---

body:
This major endorsement shows the momentum behind Mike’s vision. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b2b88fdba0ca/i-am-running-for-congress-8858521?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=c9d74d0ec7&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hi there,

We’ve got some big news today: **United Rural Democrats, a coalition dedicated to highlighting rural issues and electing Democrats in rural areas, has endorsed Mike Van Someren in his race for Congress!**
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=d837132228&e=356c0699dd)
---
| Mike grew up in rural Wisconsin, and he understands firsthand the issues facing rural communities. He knows we need to expand broadband. He knows we need safeguards to protect the right to clean water from factory farm operations, while uplifting local family farms. He knows we need to support the businesses that help our rural communities thrive.

**This endorsement shows our campaign’s momentum, and we don’t plan on slowing down anytime soon. **

[**Will you join the United Rural Democrats in supporting Mike with a donation of $50, $25, or even just $10 today?**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=65bb33fa79&e=356c0699dd) Anything you can give today helps us continue to spread the word about Mike’s vision to get Washington back to work for all of us.

Thank you so much for your support,

Team Mike Van Someren for Congress

_P.S. We look forward to chatting with you about the future of our district and the great state of Wisconsin. Please feel free to reach out to our campaign on[Facebook](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=07fa395ee3&e=356c0699dd), or learn more by visiting my website at [www.MikeVanSomeren.com](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=3b0fd29901&e=356c0699dd). _

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Save our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? |
---
Fellow American,

This race is not about me.

This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy.

And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way.

**Weak leaders create bad results.**

Fellow American, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? **_I am._**

That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=36c5d1bbee58444aacd5538a24e2a18b&_e=_oGA1IKVJXrd6eSDTv-lyKtwwzgAAC4ZnW0PcG1EvLVV9HQfI-1fZ-_IJRdRb-Fp9KsejPJOBhIDjNTc-VjF6D_qwqoHg4vp5a9tvlzoGbPnP4y5JacL2EXVlwtSH7j9OILcaLA0udqniLsK_7jPGzsJPAGFuG7bySitfMI4wvcPf9QsxKKyjWI2hopQWVU8KzTaKDGmutmZwc7HmJgPMqngeFC_KqK3_761wjMOq09eHtAFFWEEx3acX2Sk3gWwXpj2mq5iolrZktafY8Fm8NFS5rKQDzBoWPTE0Fgx2HUDbXUE4_uGEXHUw1p45zWimTn6A5sAVpA6rmNukxYYs1U7-dI6yyIKHe_7lQUEN9sWbW45gpcwhIya3EzAYeDQAT94UX9_7yeWcsQ4cMspQoBuYQkbIljg4NTTl6lzli3nRVxoqdKKt5qR60MXMF-ON06V3NROYDTKKII-xc0bzA%3D%3D)
We need you on our team. We are up against a Democrat opponent that has more than $23 million in the bank.

Democrats in Washington and their donors will say and spend anything to keep their hold on the Senate. But if the course of my life has proven anything, _**it's that no one will outwork me, and I always find a way to win.**_

clean_body: Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? Are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? | Fellow American, This race is not about me. This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy. And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way. Weak leaders create bad results. Fellow American, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? I am. That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia. We need you on our team. We are up against a Democrat opponent that has more than $23 million in the bank. Democrats in Washington and their donors will say and spend anything to keep their hold on the Senate. But if the course of my life has proven anything, it's that no one will outwork me, and I always find a way to win. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Replicating the Glenn Youngkin Victory
body:
| Peter -- Radical Democrat Governors have destroyed states across our country with vax/mask mandates, lockdowns, overtaxation, and opposing parental rights over education. They shut down our businesses, locked us in our homes, and forced our kids to wear masks for over 8 hours a day. The American People have become fed up and the Democrats are on a losing streak. Conservatives are causing a **red wave** and hard-working activists delivered a much needed victory for Glenn Youngkin in Virginia’s Governor race. **We need to pull off a Virgina style victory in Minnesota.** There are many parallels to draw between their Governor race and ours. Virginia, like Minnesota, is a state that too often goes blue but can favor Republicans if the candidate, circumstance, and timing is right. Youngkin’s win was a **rejection** of the status quo. Terry McAuliffe was a continuation of the radical leftist Administration of the Virginia Governor and the voters were not going to allow it. Tim Walz and Terry McAuliffe are very similar; They both love Hillary Clinton, Critical Race Theory, big government, and Covid mandates. These two so-called moderate Democrats have shown their true leftist ideologies with their support of tyrannical rule over the people. They represent what is so bad about the corrupt Establishment. The Virginia GOP nominated their Governor candidate through a **State Convention** in May, just like us! They similarly had 7 GOP candidates for Governor, leaving activists and party members to carefully research and select their preferred candidate. Six rounds of voting took place at their convention. The field began to narrow as all considerations were at play. Candidates were eliminated once they had the lowest amount and were eliminated for a variety of reasons. Some lost out because they didn’t have the excitement and energy, some lost out because they were a liability in the general election, and some like Pete Snyder lost because they were corrupt and beholden to special interests, not the people. Pete Snyder also had State Party insiders working as his staff while **simultaneously** pulling the strings for the Convention. Snyder’s treasurer was also who delegate names had to be approved by. Candidates worried that the Convention could be rigged by party officials who want to selectively choose who can and cannot be a delegate. **Sound familiar???** In the end one candidate remained; A young, outsider, businessman who wanted to save his state from **Socialism** and **Authoritarianism**. This is no different than what is going on now. I am young and energetic, I successfully operate my business removing skin cancer, and I am an outsider with no ties to the Political Class and crony Lobbyists/Special Interests. **I am the Glenn Youngkin of Minnesota’s Governor Race.** If we want to win without sacrificing any of our principles, I can provide that path to victory. Glenn Youngkin has **real-world** experience like me and patriots are seeking candidates outside of the political good ol’ boys club. A candidate from the **inside** will lose to Walz. We need to have the energy and excitement that rallied a Republican Governor in blue leaning Virginia. Minnesota is also different from Virginia. We face our own issues and problems. National trends **do not** tell the whole story and we Minnesotans have our own culture and lifestyle. I have been loving life here in Minnesota for a long time, but politics has forced its way into my life and yours. I cannot not take it anymore. I’m running because I’m a common person challenging the powers that be. Minnesota voters are willing to support a true conservative as long as we are consistent and truthful. We cannot risk putting up a candidate who does not represent the conservative movement because they will lose. Our campaign can unite the GOP and bring in Independents and other dissatisfied voters. If we want to capitalize on this rare opportunity we have in Minnesota, we need to elect a candidate that has broad appeal and refuses to bend the knee to the Establishment. I have been across our great state at BPOU Conventions, connecting on the ground with freedom loving individuals with vast political knowledge. I can bridge the divide between the longtime activist and the new blood in our party. This battle will be tough but if I win the primary, **I will beat Tim Walz**. Check out my [interview on At Issue](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ajhWKI9uptiH6_g4lFnkCt40vh0YNHyn16ZkVlQQezxlTS3-9y1kyrHMPraowGqiQK2OB9gRQqnQsXonkKugl0kn9nHtWekQ28hi_g5IAe2gTFA9xMmB_jKKm2loCGNFxF8aBEi8NQtSLqEX8vEDaFk92K2CkFMmVqY2CjIkZzs&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=replicating_the_youngkin_win&n=1) with KSTP Channel 5 News. I discuss the budget surplus and how to return it to the taxpayers. The $12 Billion Surplus should return to the people and/or we should eliminate the income tax. Big ideas will win this race! We need to inspire Minnesota voters. Help out the Shah Team by going to your BPOU and running for State Delegate. Your voice and vote will take us to victory. If we want to see a Glenn Youngkin victory, we need to put up a Glenn Youngkin candidate. This is our opportunity. With your help we will win. Thank you! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [www.ElectNeil.com](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDD1Ub6RYh9Vgrrtgs-Sc8qk&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=replicating_the_youngkin_win&n=2)
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=replicating_the_youngkin_win&n=3). -=-=-

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: It's urgent, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records
| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend: ****I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control**** – but I'm falling short of my midnight fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42781219/334305074/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2607-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjg3NDgwOC1mNTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ARwi_5ODHu_mZycrueX8rPeKkmF-7pDB8nWsNtBGBCg=)
With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. **I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet tonight's fundraising goal to have a shot.**
Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. _Do you know what that means, friend?_ **Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. ****I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. **
It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again.
**This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. **

It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again. This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: It's a Call To Service
body:
Not for personal gain...
---
| | | | | | Volume 33 | March 9, 2022
---
|
---
| Public office is a call to service...
---
| | |
---|---
|
Public office is a call to service, and one who is elected to office should put the needs of the constituency before any personal gain.

But that's not what my Democratic opponent is the 7th Congressional District is doing. As a Colorado State Senator, she has been a member of the Senate Finance Committee, Colorado Health Insurance Exchange Joint Oversight Committee, and the Joint Study Committee on Opioid and Other Substance Use Disorders. She also served as vice chair of the Transportation and Energy Committee.

But the Democrats have cleared the decks of her responsibilities so she can run for the 7th CD, rather than doing the job she was elected to do.

Likewise, her social media presence has turned away from her Colorado Senate constituents and toward courting the voters of CO-07. She doesn't care about her constituents; she simply is looking for the next rung on the political ladder she's climbing.

I never designed my life to run for office--to me it is a call to duty. As your next U.S Congressman from Colorado I pledge my undivided support to solving the issues impacting you.
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5QdITGpZD8NBVrNmHZu-zqhC7VNRP9aIZy-e2s529AxHC1NTpXX_i0g9l1xWsAo8WymqnnIYo9g-8TMi9g4C2ZXXrg_p8mwJEX08_TrJAyPxwqjygxQP8pRUefr1ftFO7Ga0FPLL6P3mlPXB_bEY7B4jL8fJuVqn0pfNPR1DQRL7K71cVTegR82fkL0-ViA8xirxLvLuWbLKa2Mu4xQMhz5v6zaxBwm&c=qiZ0nRqwCTevRy30hkA0781xHsGEp_Xi7MUKSCWKqMeoepJHYWo1bg==&ch=2yNZEGynxSUlOckqtr35_NPC4H32OsrXswEvEHFZo2GI0oauQMIQrA==)

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week, Erik attended his precinct caucus as he hopes you did also.

Later in the week, he spoke to the Broomfield Caucus and Assembly.

Outside of these GOP Party activities, Erik provided interviews on radio and podcasts. You can visit our website to hear recordings of his appearances on Patriot State Radio, George Brauchler's show and Dan Caplis' show on KNUS. He also spent an entire hour with Mandy Connell on KOA, followed by visits with Kim Monson, Randy Corporon and The Chuck & Julie Show. Use the button below to find recordings of Erik's discussions on these shows.

| A True Grass-Roots Campaign
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

subject: The cost of inaction is too dangerous

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42781288/334305634/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNlZDc0ZS1mNjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Vm14Ah8QRXB8e7bKwHpObICdffZzaWHw2KXUujLQH0=&emci=ffd67619-d89f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=28ced74e-f69f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=23594672)
---
| | |
---
Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene spends more time in the headlines then she does working for the people of GA-14.
---
---
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been kicked off of committees, banned from Twitter, and called out by multiple members of her own party. Yet she continues to spread conspiracy theories, attend white nationalist events, and push the GOP deeper into extremism. Instead of focusing on her constituents, doing her job, passing legislation that impacts the entire country – **she is collecting taxpayer money while sitting around plotting her next political game. ** _Enough is enough_. I'm running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene because **the cost of inaction is too dangerous.** My neighbors lives are at stake while we have a representative in office that refuses to care about the issues we face. But we can't do this work alone. **[Can you rush $15 today to fund our voter outreach efforts so that we can make history and unseat Marjorie Taylor Green in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42781289/334305644/1995286606?refcode=em0309&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNlZDc0ZS1mNjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Vm14Ah8QRXB8e7bKwHpObICdffZzaWHw2KXUujLQH0=)** We're going to win this, why?**Because Georgia is ready for change.** We saw the energy and hunger for new representation in 2020, and we aren't done yet. I'm running to FINALLY bring Northwest Georgia's voice to Congress. I'm running to make historical advances in rural registration, outreach, and turnout. We won't be silenced, not this time. **This kind of organizing work is expensive.** From training volunteers, paying staff, printing materials, and running our political ads — there’s a lot of expenses ahead of our campaign. Not to mention that we need significant resources and funding to compete with the MAGA and special interest money that has protected Marge. **[Join us in unseating Marjorie Taylor Greene today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42781290/334305645/1995286606?refcode=em0309&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNlZDc0ZS1mNjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Vm14Ah8QRXB8e7bKwHpObICdffZzaWHw2KXUujLQH0=)** Not just for the benefit of Marge-free headlines, but to show that our rural communities are not forgotten. We can shift the narrative, but only together. Thanks for reading,Holly.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene spends more time in the headlines then she does working for the people of GA-14. Marjorie Taylor Greene has been kicked off of committees, banned from Twitter, and called out by multiple members of her own party. Yet she continues to spread conspiracy theories, attend white nationalist events, and push the GOP deeper into extremism. Instead of focusing on her constituents, doing her job, passing legislation that impacts the entire country – she is collecting taxpayer money while sitting around plotting her next political game. Enough is enough. I'm running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene because the cost of inaction is too dangerous. My neighbors lives are at stake while we have a representative in office that refuses to care about the issues we face. But we can't do this work alone. = We're going to win this, why?Because Georgia is ready for change. We saw the energy and hunger for new representation in 2020, and we aren't done yet. I'm running to FINALLY bring Northwest Georgia's voice to Congress. I'm running to make historical advances in rural registration, outreach, and turnout. We won't be silenced, not this time. This kind of organizing work is expensive. From training volunteers, paying staff, printing materials, and running our political ads — there’s a lot of expenses ahead of our campaign. Not to mention that we need significant resources and funding to compete with the MAGA and special interest money that has protected Marge. = Not just for the benefit of Marge-free headlines, but to show that our rural communities are not forgotten. We can shift the narrative, but only together. Thanks for reading,Holly. | | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Donald J. Trump March 8th, 2022

I feel confident that Robin will exercise his moral duty to follow up on Justice Gableman’s findings. In addition to announcing that they will stay in session and take action to get rid of ERIC and the WEC, which have done some very bad things and made review very difficult (as also noted by the Legislative Audit Bureau), based on the Gableman report, I would imagine that there can only be a Decertification of Electors. This is one of the biggest stories of our generation, even though the Fake News Media will try to play it down as much as they can.

Also, this past October the Racine County Sheriff, Christopher Schmaling, referred felony criminal charges against five of the six members of the Wisconsin Election Commission (“WEC”) for their scheme to violate Wisconsin law and allow illegal vote harvesting in nursing homes. The Sheriff stated that the governing “election statute was in fact not just broken but shattered” in all 72 counties across Wisconsin. body:
St. Augustine said, "The truth is like a lion. You don't have to defend it. Let is loose and it will defend itself."
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ZbKOOWzKYLoqaXlWu3Fv5A/Gz8AJTm1T763m763AdbNSLGBZQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/o763VHr9h6yWiuaAfJfph892BQ/Gz8AJTm1T763m763AdbNSLGBZQ)My fundraiser just texted me and we're already $6,770 off pace to hit our fundraising goals for the 1st Quarter of 2022!

[Would you please chip in with an emergency donation to help us get back on track?](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/o763VHr9h6yWiuaAfJfph892BQ/Gz8AJTm1T763m763AdbNSLGBZQ)

Americans are distracted by the conflict in Ukraine and the consequences of the Biden Regime's COMPLETE FAILURE on both foreign and domestic policy.

I'm sure you've been distracted by it all as well . . . but here's the deal: **if we don 't fight to fix things in our own country now, nothing will change!!**

name: Joe Shepherd, United Rural Democrats
subject: My 100,000 "miles-stone"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Peter, this accomplishment is all thanks to you.

| |
---
Hey Peter – **This month marks my 100,000 "miles-stone."** For the two years, I've made it my mission to create a community of rural Democrats, building coalitions of all types of people to make sure that rural folks feel represented in politics. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42765687/334259663/311099802?refcode2=5d521573-d09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220309_JS_milestone_i1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkNTIxNTczLWQwOWYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NlGSa-ZJd6ZivhKBvRYvQMOTRkJ-bG_f5FUZmCLHcw=) [__**In honor of my 100,000 "miles-stone," will you commit to making a $10 investment for the next 10 months to help us continue doing this important work in rural America? For Democrats to win, we've got to compete in hard-to-win places.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42765688/334259664/311099802?refcode2=5d521573-d09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&amount=10&refcode=220309_JS_milestone_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkNTIxNTczLWQwOWYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NlGSa-ZJd6ZivhKBvRYvQMOTRkJ-bG_f5FUZmCLHcw=) **[CHIP IN →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42765689/334259665/1646350971?refcode2=5d521573-d09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220309_JS_milestone_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkNTIxNTczLWQwOWYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NlGSa-ZJd6ZivhKBvRYvQMOTRkJ-bG_f5FUZmCLHcw=)** Traveling for United Rural Democrats has been difficult work. Thousands of miles, 45 states (and counting), and countless events. It's the type of work we need to put in to see electoral results. I do not doubt that the key to our long-term party health runs through rural areas in the Midwest and throughout the country. **But this "miles-stone" has also shown me the incredible need for political candidates and organizations to spend time and resources in rural America.** The people I've met on the road all have shared priorities. **From Wisconsin to Montana to my home state of Iowa** , we all want good-paying jobs, affordable education, accessible healthcare, and the transportation, broadband, and education infrastructure we need to build a better life for ourselves and our families. **But for far too long, Republicans have left rural values behind, and Democrats have failed to invest time and resources into making us feel heard.** Our movement through United Rural Democrats is just one part of the journey to make sure rural Americans are part of the political equation. I'm looking forward to the next 100,000 "miles-stone," and to meeting more of you on the road as we work together to uplift rural voices. You can join me on [Twitter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42765690/334259666/2126558495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkNTIxNTczLWQwOWYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NlGSa-ZJd6ZivhKBvRYvQMOTRkJ-bG_f5FUZmCLHcw=&emci=e05cd946-bc9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5d521573-d09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9364878) to follow me along as I continue my travels. [**And, as always, I could not do this without your support. I'm working hard to build a movement of rural Democrats ahead of the 2022 and 2024 elections. Will you chip in to help me keep fighting for Democratic representation in rural districts?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42765691/334259667/311099802?refcode2=5d521573-d09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220309_JS_milestone_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkNTIxNTczLWQwOWYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NlGSa-ZJd6ZivhKBvRYvQMOTRkJ-bG_f5FUZmCLHcw=) name: Laura Loomer
subject: Unleashing lions in the Capitol
body:
St. Augustine said, "The truth is like a lion. You don't have to defend it. Let is loose and it will defend itself."
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5wubIq3U7HCr5PMphh9x763w/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YhNbaKOrCnHzEMh6fZthuw/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YhNbaKOrCnHzEMh6fZthuw/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSlBr9tSQZt5VQdB78h8Tg/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA)My fundraiser just texted me and we're already $6,770 off pace to hit our fundraising goals for the 1st Quarter of 2022!

[Would you please chip in with an emergency donation to help us get back on track?](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSlBr9tSQZt5VQdB78h8Tg/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA)

Americans are distracted by the conflict in Ukraine and the consequences of the Biden Regime's COMPLETE FAILURE on both foreign and domestic policy.

I'm sure you've been distracted by it all as well . . . but here's the deal: **if we don 't fight to fix things in our own country now, nothing will change!!**

Please, [help me get to Washington so I can fight for you](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSlBr9tSQZt5VQdB78h8Tg/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA). **So I can RAISE HELL for you!**

Leftists don't fear me because I'm loud and confrontational. If you've watched any of my "Loomered" videos, I always have a smile on my face when I'm confronting a communist.

These people get yelled at all the time and it doesn't bother them.

**But what does bother them - what they ABSOLUTELY FEAR - is the truth!**

St. Augustine said, "The truth is like a lion. You don't have to defend it. Let it loose and it will defend itself."

**I will be UNLEASHING LIONS in Congress if you get me there!**

So please, [help me get back our fundraising on track and make up for the shortfall by backing my Congressional Campaign today.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSlBr9tSQZt5VQdB78h8Tg/vZL9ee8gvyGJDEsCpSOtgA)

Thank you so much for your support,

Laura Loomer

It's a big day for our campaign friend.

Over the past month, we've been seeing things shifting here on the ground in Pennsylvania. Our crowds have been getting bigger, more grassroots donations have been coming in, and Conor's picking up more endorsements every week.
_Our campaign is building momentum, so we're putting our money on Conor Lamb – and counting on you to have our back._

**[Tomorrow we're releasing our first TV ad, and we need your help to get on the air and reach voters across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42782620/334311099/-993140480?refcode=em22_220309_tv1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmQwODVkYy1mYzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXVlfWv3LAqnvdIJeEdM5NVv7kh3flp6nGDKYfduQvM=)**

That's why we're making a **BIG** investment to make sure voters across Pennsylvania know who Conor is, how he's beaten Trump's candidates in three Republican districts, and why he's the candidate who can beat them again in November.

Our editors are putting the finishing touches on our first ad right now, and you can be the first to see it when it's ready by **[clicking here to join our new Team Conor updates program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42782621/334311100/-839420045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmQwODVkYy1mYzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXVlfWv3LAqnvdIJeEdM5NVv7kh3flp6nGDKYfduQvM=&emci=26f0cd97-f39f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4fd085dc-fc9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18516396)**. body:
That's all that matters, right? Two months into the year and we are down 60 men. How can they say DEFUND the police now? |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=8e357d0a88924703bea4cdd5fb68d676&_t=s5vTOT8R3SBi1ceDwWHOoogBddBbcRoCg89ncXWQWCXY9IoV_md2MFp19UHXsf6sd6nWMgJvg9oYnFhbHcAjkPTdW_6TTcEbKTfD7ocTAcqdfW_TlhzOA8PQIv87bDPb2Ui--i7tH2liR-NndJgUA1rTSxiE35MyNlQZejHtL24%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=8e357d0a88924703bea4cdd5fb68d676&_e=Yxm-dK0zJ1as3zoSovwFhwZLrAo0_CrXArzoU23OdaxSSd1dh4omEk_jHPKRLm2mFjFDdxjIrIYGiXt7fXQkTM2ESs1jORE3xY4_kC93yFy6u6EuYrtDtcmnEtwQs2mK2cKlSITMavHHUWm736c2uZ22skRTR40zsLmXMIGm6KzG-8kXHbHH03diIyzMQXPzz4V53ATxu6MtziqI1QOjeEJ1cRWsC9uhRfBZhFxCpre9iO3b33I4mOTd_bTRbwokgw4TM4nn1ez5nQR9nucFMPdf24gYU6-5D1b0yzu4tbX_IsNn5Ocz4leQj04BX91kUPxcwGnoqPz6hKq2_Co108kcdrTZbcPK7SoqGLP1L0yRM6fis-3xvOMWjdUSU2wuwcnEkX5koWlZxCBBp7wJxhwem1GjkQEHPl2VFwlIOcszTui8F6ATew-GUrpGOa1kp0cQMkgmWTU_MH9Y9jY-5A%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

The statistics speak for themselves: we’re only two months into the year and 60 police officers have been shot in the line of duty. According to an article by Townhall, that’s a **60% increase in shootings than during the same period in 2021**.

Yet, next week Democrats in the House are planning to hold a hearing on ...... **DEFUNDING THE POLICE???**

My parents came to the United States with **absolutely nothing** because Haiti is in fact an anarchic society. I’m blessed beyond measure that they were fortunate enough to settle in a community that had a full-funded police department that watched over the community in which I grew up.

When will they wake up and realize that defunding police departments around the country would put the U.S. on the path to anarchy?

Shame on Cori Bush. **Shame on AOC**. Shame on any progressive Democrat calling for the defunding of police departments. **I wonder how AOC would feel if the police precinct in the pricey DC neighborhood where she lives – and parks her TESLA – suddenly shuttered its doors?**

That’s right - it wouldn’t have much of an effect on her or other members of the SQUAD - **they use private taxpayer money to keep private security guards around them 24/7.**

I’m running for Congress because of public “servants” like AOC and her SQUAD members who just don’t live in the real world. **[Would you do me the honor of chipping in just a $1 or $2 today to help me get to Congress where, at the very least, I can debate these out-of-touch Democrats?](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=8e357d0a88924703bea4cdd5fb68d676&_e=Yxm-dK0zJ1as3zoSovwFhwZLrAo0_CrXArzoU23OdaxSSd1dh4omEk_jHPKRLm2mFjFDdxjIrIYGiXt7fXQkTM2ESs1jORE3xY4_kC93yFy6u6EuYrtDtcmnEtwQs2mK2cKlSITMavHHUWm736c2uZ22skRTR40zsLmXMIGm6KzG-8kXHbHH03diIyzMQXPzz4V53ATxu6MtziqI1QOjeEJ1cRWsC9uhRfBZhFxCpre9iO3b33I4mOTd_bTRbwokYr96Rptigjc2eiHR9hckNuGlDNsDFa6enAY40al6CZyGD1GIEodiOrUfMaVKaS2PLTQ6gZe5N-yy35fWk1plhwv-GaJg_IK5UBO0wfAtXDhUtWGFkIpcVU_71KM2mPEbMpQ_0kUxPJM5Anl-pQCoPgTRHjFORJ1V5dnr5nvQbGfPKjVZOG9jb1wVhACFadE2QJvr1G9PBHDSH9AxQBMIig%3D%3D)**

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

clean_body: That's all that matters, right? Two months into the year and we are down 60 men. How can they say DEFUND the police now? | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, The statistics speak for themselves: we’re only two months into the year and 60 police officers have been shot in the line of duty. According to an article by Townhall, that’s a 60% increase in shootings than during the same period in 2021. Yet, next week Democrats in the House are planning to hold a hearing on ...... DEFUNDING THE POLICE??? My parents came to the United States with absolutely nothing because Haiti is in fact an anarchic society. I’m blessed beyond measure that they were fortunate enough to settle in a community that had a full-funded police department that watched over the community in which I grew up. When will they wake up and realize that defunding police departments around the country would put the U.S. on the path to anarchy? Shame on Cori Bush. Shame on AOC. Shame on any progressive Democrat calling for the defunding of police departments. I wonder how AOC would feel if the police precinct in the pricey DC neighborhood where she lives – and parks her TESLA – suddenly shuttered its doors? That’s right - it wouldn’t have much of an effect on her or other members of the SQUAD - they use private taxpayer money to keep private security guards around them 24/7. I’m running for Congress because of public “servants” like AOC and her SQUAD members who just don’t live in the real world. If I’m fortunate enough to make it to Congress, I’ll offer to take members of the Democrat Party to Haiti and show them what our country will look like if we abolish the police. clean_body: Obama and Holder are threatening to sue... | Peter, As one of just 7 competitive House districts in Florida, redistricting could decide the fate of my race. And unfortunately, Democrats are determined to give themselves an advantage in Florida – and my battleground congressional district – in any way they can. Barack Obama and his former Attorney General Eric Holder are even threatening to SUE Florida’s proposed maps, claiming they’re “racist”. Thankfully, Governor DeSantis won’t back down. But with the Left focusing their attention and money on taking over our redistricting process, I need your help raising the funds we need to FIGHT BACK. My race will likely be one of the closest in the country, Peter. That means the boundaries of my district are going to have an enormous impact on the outcome in November. Even relatively minor tweaks could be the difference between victory and defeat. The Democrats have successfully mobilized their entire base to fight tooth-and-nail to stop our redistricting efforts. Now, I need my grassroots army to mobilize as well. We MUST make sure our new district fairly represents the people of South Florida. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

Hi there, Peter, it's Abby. First, I want to thank you for supporting our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA).
I'm about to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign. Before I do, can I have a minute of your time to explain why I know that we can win in Iowa?
We can win in Iowa because voters are turning against Sen. Grassley like never before: He's facing record-low approval ratings and only 27% of likely voters want to reelect him.
We can win in Iowa because even the experts are sounding the alarm for Sen. Grassley's campaign. Iowa's top pollster is pointing to "weakness" in his poll numbers and recent reporting describes this as a "tough race" for Sen. Grassley.
We can win in Iowa because I promise you that I will work my hardest to win this seat every single day from now until Election Day.
We can win in Iowa because Iowans _know_ that they deserve better than Sen. Grassley's out-of-touch leadership – and we're willing to fight for it.
Thanks to your incredible grassroots support, our campaign team is hitting the road, talking with voters and keeping the pressure on Sen. Grassley, but there's a long road ahead of us still. We'll need the resources to air ads on television and radio, place yard signs all across the country, reach the most critical voters and compete with GOP spending funded by their far-right megadonors.
**I know we can win in Iowa, but only if grassroots supporters like you are with me every step of the way. **
**[So that's why I have to ask: Can you make your first grassroots donation to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority? I'm really counting on you to join our team of grassroots donors tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42782789/334312020/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk730-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWEzMGU2Zi1mZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_zKEjxU-L0QM_H-FtYCfGSWoFlFedvmFudFwGZh1BU=)**
