clean_body: | | | = Hi there, Peter, it's Abby. First, I want to thank you for supporting our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA). I'm about to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign. Before I do, can I have a minute of your time to explain why I know that we can win in Iowa? We can win in Iowa because voters are turning against Sen. Grassley like never before: He's facing record-low approval ratings and only 27% of likely voters want to reelect him. We can win in Iowa because even the experts are sounding the alarm for Sen. Grassley's campaign. Iowa's top pollster is pointing to "weakness" in his poll numbers and recent reporting describes this as a "tough race" for Sen. Grassley. We can win in Iowa because I promise you that I will work my hardest to win this seat every single day from now until Election Day. We can win in Iowa because Iowans know that they deserve better than Sen. Grassley's out-of-touch leadership – and we're willing to fight for it. Thanks to your incredible grassroots support, our campaign team is hitting the road, talking with voters and keeping the pressure on Sen. Grassley, but there's a long road ahead of us still. We'll need the resources to air ads on television and radio, place yard signs all across the country, reach the most critical voters and compete with GOP spending funded by their far-right megadonors. I know we can win in Iowa, but only if grassroots supporters like you are with me every step of the way. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do to flip this seat blue and fight for families in Iowa. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

# **De Gregorio Releases First Digital Ad of Cycle: “Priorities”**
---
| _Only CD5 Republican with Paid Advertising Up Targeting Gottheimer_
---
| [ ](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=f9c186a0fd&e=31104c58a7)
---
[WATCH](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=f9f6fc7693&e=31104c58a7) Nick's new ad!
| **FAIR LAWN –** Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran - who served in Iraq and Afghanistan - and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, announced the release of his first digital advertisement “[Priorities](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=380ed8509a&e=31104c58a7)” that will run as part of a five-figure digital buy targeting voters in the district.

The advertisement juxtaposes comments made by incumbent Democrat Josh Gottheimer describing the baseball lockout as the “worst thing for the country” with real problems affecting CD5 families, including soaring food and gas prices, along with rising crime and the devastating learning loss experienced by students during the COVID-19 pandemic. The comments appeared on the “New Jersey Globe Power Hour” program last Saturday, and since the interview aired, the [average price of gasoline](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=eaad39d210&e=31104c58a7) in the district has risen by almost a dollar.

“I like baseball, too. But Josh’s tone-deaf comment in the face of everything families in our district are facing right now demonstrates just how out-of-touch he is with the people he purports to serve. The Congressman, who has refused to join me in calling on _all_ CD5 candidates to support a ban on stock trading for Members of Congress, [has been recently featured in news reports](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=6286f81f53&e=31104c58a7) as a prolific day trader. While he may not realize that the sticker shock at the gas pump and the grocery store is sending families here into sheer panic, I do, and I will go to Washington to pump the brakes on the out-of-control Biden agenda.” – Nick De Gregorio

_De Gregorio was recently[named](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=8e8f73d949&e=31104c58a7) to the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Gun: “On the Radar” recruitment and support program._ **Click[HERE](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=1297850ce9&e=31104c58a7) to watch.**

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Support response efforts in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
An estimated one million people–mostly women, children, and seniors–have fled Ukraine due to the Russian invasion.
#
Peter,
I am sure you share my feelings about the tragedy happening right now in Ukraine.
I have visited cities in Ukraine where Russian bombs are now falling on innocent civillians. Ukrainians are losing their lives and fleeing their homes because of this unprovoked invasion.
I am doing everything I can to ensure my colleagues in Congress swifty approve emergency military and humanitarian assistance for Ukraine. But you can also support Ukraine right now.
**[My friend, José Andrés, and his World Central Kitchen, a non-profit that provides food in response to humanitarian crises, is on the ground in Ukraine. Will you make a contribution of $5 or anything you can afford to support their efforts to feed Ukrainian refugees?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42772054/334266867/1153772992?refcode=dd_em_220309_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhjNmZhNC1kNDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foQgCdO4vqDcVGiRdCnPIg--2qcwesKZM6HeYdRoW14=)**
An estimated one million people–mostly women, children, and seniors–have fled Ukraine due to the Russian invasion, and are seeking safety in nearby countries. In support of refugees escaping the violence, World Central Kitchen has been serving hot, nourishing meals in Poland.
The courage and unity of Ukranians in the face of Putin’s barbarity is inspiring the world, including me. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in standing up for the people of Ukraine.
**[Contribute $5 or anything you can afford right now to support World Central Kitchen’s efforts to feed Ukrainian refugees.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42772055/334266868/1153772992?refcode=dd_em_220309_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhjNmZhNC1kNDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foQgCdO4vqDcVGiRdCnPIg--2qcwesKZM6HeYdRoW14=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42772056/334266869/1153772992?refcode=dd_em_220309_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhjNmZhNC1kNDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foQgCdO4vqDcVGiRdCnPIg--2qcwesKZM6HeYdRoW14=)****

body:
She fought against corrupt insiders who have used public office to enrich themselves, and now she’s fighting with us. [](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=27acf8716a954376a0a47ce1564c787f&_e=sljiUyOMsQoEtu6OBtSBKsth916pTGVObpkeC3H8KcomgDyWKwbyHZ-yOvUXUEdfe67DI63OYc66UL7-kMmpAgUrBh07DY1THaWkutC1B_dtz6isXpNQJ4HOTTGNQalOGm2wr7cy-rEzeenUPSYLqJ99OucguNClU3d96pRFvZsGbqJ7TvREUDd-rcF3atAMwFR13bRbXvy18kEGp_SlOaU3IptbUVJchTfvhEVnCpCMKALAk1FYmkMmxMTaAGnh6cQeLevM2P8WeHyXG637FHwLmZyd6uwGMhQSbY-b1z5MBO9HQC0bjzcJEJ8Cb4Pj7h-ZPiI0_CMm3YEi0qMUDVDUBpVM46pgMmUW66pt4mRMNlBRlgHzesKsWu1Shd3oQJUEYqAFgEURln-rOIYufUp9d7kHG_hhezmIDpuimOFq5Amz9DciE9mxzbdkLzPHOH9C41L0VJ8AnwE_FgL2YA%3D%3D) | |

Friend,

**I am absolutely thrilled to announce the endorsement of a tireless advocate for the people of Illinois, Carol Pope. **

Carol Pope served as Illinois’ legislative inspector general until January 6, 2022. She resigned in the wake of ethics reform legislation that left her with “no real power to effect change or shine a light on ethics violations.”

Today, on the day that Michael Madigan, the longtime corrupt Democratic speaker of the Illinois House is being arraigned, she’s continuing her work in support of eliminating corruption by standing up in support of our campaign for governor.
****
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=27acf8716a954376a0a47ce1564c787f&_e=sljiUyOMsQoEtu6OBtSBKsth916pTGVObpkeC3H8KcomgDyWKwbyHZ-yOvUXUEdfe67DI63OYc66UL7-kMmpAgUrBh07DY1THaWkutC1B_dtz6isXpNQJ4HOTTGNQalOGm2wr7cy-rEzeenUPSYLqJ99OucguNClU3d96pRFvZsGbqJ7TvREUDd-rcF3atAMwFR13bRbXvy18kEGp_SlOaU3IptbUVJchTfvhEVnCpCMKALAk1FYmkMmxMTaAGnhf1noGhWHrwrSeIXMOcI_d8r6Blzly3YUUltwN_hAbCAIA2uNA-M8n7XL-DKCRDqN9K-qyc3p6U5oWt-_xY0PKp7Qu8QM_mjQaEfF5Yi9LInBGzCO0aV8IB1Js-oxY0Lg46VLanGcll-Zi5PyRZp97Nt-XQcnj1IMPfnqWr-7DRh3h2FCTSvl6qXhzoNzRG9ygzUkHzfRPZNTYIXpEZjNYA%3D%3D)
[**READ HER FULL ENDORSEMENT HERE**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=27acf8716a954376a0a47ce1564c787f&_e=sljiUyOMsQoEtu6OBtSBKsth916pTGVObpkeC3H8KcomgDyWKwbyHZ-yOvUXUEdfe67DI63OYc66UL7-kMmpAgUrBh07DY1THaWkutC1B_dtz6isXpNQJ4HOTTGNQalOGm2wr7cy-rEzeenUPSYLqJ99OucguNClU3d96pRFvZsGbqJ7TvREUDd-rcF3atAMwFR13bRbXvy18kEGp_SlOaU3IptbUVJchTfvhEVnCpCMKALAk1FYmkMmxMTaAGnh1xUHSZ4v7DlL52o3c_Ppv6BZ9WEbuMyQ1ZIyBPaL2u5pBMSRd5PLSGjuvx874gW9Q6vfgqB8baGUbd9Jl2vT597Hf5efL_thax_zeEZlSGnCX0wxkYKE79foMctmyiVtm_O0bp1Rufi27jCTcMYmN7oMXhIfg4klvRd8uA0oZcgzN5V5HOd2hrHqhyHwspAK4ynx9hmVX_QAFgkBd4w2Mg%3D%3D)
[**DONATE TO OUR OUTSIDER MOVEMENT**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=27acf8716a954376a0a47ce1564c787f&_e=sljiUyOMsQoEtu6OBtSBKsth916pTGVObpkeC3H8KcomgDyWKwbyHZ-yOvUXUEdfe67DI63OYc66UL7-kMmpAgUrBh07DY1THaWkutC1B_dtz6isXpNQJ4HOTTGNQalOGm2wr7cy-rEzeenUPSYLqJ99OucguNClU3d96pRFvZsGbqJ7TvREUDd-rcF3atAMwFR13bRbXvy18kEGp_SlOaU3IptbUVJchTfvhEVnCpCMKALAk1FYmkMmxMTaAGnhepJWVHdcyLPbRPZ3D5GDAqg8PBBOX1Muke6huuSzD6amE69yI_PK4Fzc0OH2ZWsdKEqislqR5gKYPHnp8fKA7K__iQmMnXmY22mVxaF3E-pXdXshGzknZKcRRz_ped04lURR5kFc3ResLsUFcrHc3jEQ8e1iGBgQjCF-qK_ONtqBZ2SEVcZWQ7njZoJuOmoispPVFabgHjBNf6d0wZjIZg%3D%3D)
I am honored to pick up the baton in this fight against corrupt insiders who have used public office to enrich themselves, at the expense of everyday Illinoisans.

As governor, I will push for the strongest ethics reform in the history of our great state, including using every tool at my disposal to transform the office of the legislative general from a “paper tiger” to a real force for accountability, as Carol fought for time and time again. We can be the Land of Lincoln again.

[**Read Carol Pope’s full endorsement here.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=27acf8716a954376a0a47ce1564c787f&_e=sljiUyOMsQoEtu6OBtSBKsth916pTGVObpkeC3H8KcomgDyWKwbyHZ-yOvUXUEdfe67DI63OYc66UL7-kMmpAgUrBh07DY1THaWkutC1B_dtz6isXpNQJ4HOTTGNQalOGm2wr7cy-rEzeenUPSYLqJ99OucguNClU3d96pRFvZsGbqJ7TvREUDd-rcF3atAMwFR13bRbXvy18kEGp_SlOaU3IptbUVJchTfvhEVnCpCMKALAk1FYmkMmxMTaAGnhmqqcvreD3Xd-Ao6yq0_qlwnWnu1tGzYDhiTquSC8dgTjcftRPoRt83f9pyUksXiRZVt64M9ehV8kV8Yzyv_vN7cRDK1phkDOLDtoMvgp3WaA1f6aj7j-QCc4Sw1usDaRdwHKe-NzkPI4mH65B7SQnddogNZCJH4B3FsfSMfdvjeFZnAr6AjUpyGEY-IR1VJG7gsWUQS-kbe0hAsU0lrliw%3D%3D)

Jesse Sullivan

body:

Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: We’ve nearly hit our goal to fight back against Facebook’s censorship. | Friend – after Facebook shut off our ads on the same day we won the Republican primary, we’re now only $13,180 short of our ambitious new goal to directly combat their censorship. But I’ll be straight up, fighting back against a Big Tech giant like Facebook won’t be easy or cheap, especially when it’s clear they’re in Pelosi’s pocket... [Source: The Washington Examiner] Now more than ever, with our largest source of fundraising completely CUT OFF, I’m fully relying on grassroots contributions from patriots like you to help us cover this final $13,180. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Date: Fri, March 4, 2022 Subject: re: Censored for winning?! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, On the very same day that I won the Republican nomination for Texas’ brand-new congressional seat, I received this message from Facebook: Facebook SHUT OFF our largest source of fundraising at a time when our momentum was at its peak. You don’t have to be a cynic to see just how vindictive Big Tech has become. Because hitting our FIRST fundraising goal of the general election is now going to require a near miracle, I’ve set an ambitious $50,000 target over the next 48 hours to directly combat Facebook’s censorship. Big Tech giants like Facebook aren’t even pretending to promote free speech anymore. They openly crush conservative voices while attempting to play kingmaker... ...And if you dare utter a negative word about Joe Biden and his FAILURE of an administration, they label you a bigot. But the only way to truly hold these liberal cronies at Facebook accountable is to prove just how badly their schemes can BACKFIRE. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Folks – many American seniors can’t afford their bills right now.

Housing and health care costs are higher than they’ve EVER been.

A fourth stimulus check would provide desperately needed relief to America’s seniors.

[**So Congress is deliberating passing another stimulus check for Social Security seniors. We need to know if it has the support of Pennsylvania Democrats.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9m8SHjdriurWb4Ubh2TMUUKvgXJWPMhD9RMk0OU3jZcYkg1ubdlJyhg35zvpKaQqsUf2evu49XoAB-4FS8eejH7l5ADem_2meiox9n5mlKT8Bv3GHqA6a41MREUVLzKMVqjXJw2ay_XingXyScJZC9Ax-RoeYJkrRD5YiroKVS-PVrVG56CPT_GzedbN_H4qd0S8sZeSrAwdpZdZH-OTl3BcVaNY7i4sScb4n0pWR2nEy8uJPxwziS7JPAxaIZ2glWkLwttOMHvh0SLWYraJNvLvy_f6FcyEjUnlPR6ZRPIwyqpcKCs1u9WQlSa-zYts/3k7/-SDa5cosS3iWC5HXpFGdiw/h7/uyjfGGzD1LRAuIYKC4UCdFh4s8AznjfVU16GDvSO6K0)

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | Folks – many American seniors can’t afford their bills right now. Housing and health care costs are higher than they’ve EVER been. A fourth stimulus check would provide desperately needed relief to America’s seniors. | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. subject: Bill McSwain: Pennsylvanians have Wolf, Biden, Corman to thank for disastrous energy policies
body:
Wolf and Corman's calls for gas tax suspension are nothing more than political theater. The people of Pennsylvania deserve better. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-pennsylvanians-have-wolf-biden-corman-to-thank-for-disastrous-energy-policies?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 9, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain: Pennsylvanians have Wolf, Biden, Corman to thank for disastrous energy policies

_Wolf and Corman's calls for gas tax suspension are nothing more than political theater. The people of Pennsylvania deserve better._
**West Chester, Pa.** \-- Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, had this to say in response to [news](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=df20d3a708&e=b1ec95759b) that Governor Tom Wolf has joined five other Governors in calling for a suspension of the federal gas tax:
---
|
> **_"Instead of spending the last eight years working to lower the gas tax in Pennsylvania and harnessing the resources under our feet to make energy costs cheaper for everyone, Wolf has allowed the radical left to dictate his policy. This failure is exacerbated by Joe Biden's disastrous energy policies at the national level, and now Wolf is begging Joe Biden to lower the gas tax nationally while Biden, in turn, begs the terrorist regime in Iran and the ruthless dictator in Venezuela to produce more oil rather than increasing production domestically. _**
>
> **_For Wolf to call for the suspension of the federal gas tax while maintaining the third-highest state gas tax in the nation is the height of hypocrisy - a desperate attempt to distract Pennsylvanians from a looming state crisis of his own making. Unfortunately for Wolf, no amount of election-year pandering will distract Pennsylvanians from the dire economic consequences of a progressive Governor who puts their needs last.
>
> Equally hypocritical is Jake Corman's [recent call ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=cede575511&e=b1ec95759b)for a temporary 50% reduction in state gas tax, a transparent attempt to garner public favor by relieving taxpayers of the burdensome tax that he himself voted to enact. Corman has consistently voted to increase the tax burden on Pennsylvanians.
>
> A temporary reprieve is not enough. As Governor, I will call for a permanent and drastic reduction of the gas tax and harness the full potential of Pennsylvania's oil and gas resources. These taxes were put in place by career Harrisburg politicians in both parties, and supported by many of my opponents in this race. I will turn Pennsylvania into an energy powerhouse."_**
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=5d2e12bcd3&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=df328aeaba&e=b1ec95759b)

| | [](billmcswain.com)

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=b4aa4fabb2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=b4aa4fabb2).

Peter, Across the country, corporations are ripping people off. Hidden fees. Higher prices. Crappy customer service. We don’t need to tell you. You know. But on top of all that — now we have to deal with inflation. Higher prices on everything from groceries to gasoline, from essentials to luxuries. **The reality is, current inflation levels are the quintessential example of corporate greed.** Corporations use inflation as an excuse to jack their prices up even higher, creating record profits at the expense of everyone else — and effectively lowering your wages by decreasing the power of your dollar. Kyrsten Sinema claims fighting inflation is a priority for her — but her past actions and current positions demonstrate that her loyalty is first and foremost to her corporate donors. ##

## Since owning a home is a core idea of the American Dream, we must fix the property tax problem to protect it.
##

Property taxes weigh heavily on Idaho. We collectively pay about $2 billion per year. With home values climbing like a caffeinated kid on a jungle gym, the annual letter from the County Assessor is not a letter many of us look forward to.
Rising property taxes, like other taxes, contribute to growth in the size of government. nothing chokes economic growth and personal freedom like taking money our of pockets and using it to create more bureaucracy. We want governments to operate inside a budget just like the rest of us.
The bottom line: Growth should pay for itself! No one should lose their home from unpredictable and skyrocketing property taxes.
---

### Humphreys wants a debate.

By DEVIN WEEKS Staff Writer | March 3, 2022 1:00 AM Idaho gubernatorial candidate Ed Humphreys has been on the campaign trail for nearly 10 months. In his time traversing the Gem State, the Republican from Eagle said he's hearing that voters are concerned about being properly represented.

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

clean_body: Another Big Week! | | | | | | | March 7, 2022 | | | | Another big week on the campaign trail. | == | If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign! | | == | Since owning a home is a core idea of the American Dream, we must fix the property tax problem to protect it. Property taxes weigh heavily on Idaho. We collectively pay about $2 billion per year. With home values climbing like a caffeinated kid on a jungle gym, the annual letter from the County Assessor is not a letter many of us look forward to. Rising property taxes, like other taxes, contribute to growth in the size of government. nothing chokes economic growth and personal freedom like taking money our of pockets and using it to create more bureaucracy. We want governments to operate inside a budget just like the rest of us. The bottom line: Growth should pay for itself! No one should lose their home from unpredictable and skyrocketing property taxes. | | == | | | | In the Press | | | Humphreys wants a debate. By DEVIN WEEKS Staff Writer | March 3, 2022 1:00 AM Idaho gubernatorial candidate Ed Humphreys has been on the campaign trail for nearly 10 months. In his time traversing the Gem State, the Republican from Eagle said he's hearing that voters are concerned about being properly represented. == | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | March 5 - Avimor, ID If elected then I would establish a temporary department to investigate and prosecute corruption in government! Great gathering in Avimor! | | | | March 3 - Genesee, ID Do not play politics! Stand up for what you believe in! It's been a long trip to North Idaho and our last event was in Genesee. Lots of Humphreys signs appearing across the state! | | | | March 2 - Bonners Ferry, ID As Governor I would BAN any state agency from hiring lobbyists! | | | | March 2 - Post Falls, ID Freedom Convoy in North Idaho! | | | | March 1 - Sandpoint, ID Our first time campaigning in Sandpoint. Everywhere in this state it has gone the same way. First we start with a small toehold. Then we gain a foothold. Then we have a beachhead! | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | == | | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. Box 1667 Eagle, ID 83616 | == Stay Social! == == == | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | PO box 1667, Eagle, ID 83616 | | Sent by mailto:info@edforidaho.com in collaboration with |

body:
We have a significant gap in our fundraising
| | |
---
Friend,
I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours.
However, my campaign just authorized a $13 million ad investment to fight back against GOP attacks, and we don't have all of the money yet. **That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, we need to stay on track to make this critical ad buy.**
As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but **Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7.5 million to unseat me.** And if we don't stay on track, we could relinquish vital ad inventory to far-right Republicans who are out to smear my reputation. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing.
That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. **[Will you please donate what you can right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783514/334314823/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk801-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTE4ZTBhMC0wMWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jCtp61EquwskRujLaViiEUgV1akQW1U1IQNVlgwb2s=)**

My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. The only way we'll win in November is if we have the resources we need to reach every voter and push back against the GOP's misleading attack ads.
I know it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your $5 makes a huge difference.
[**Friend, please make a donation right now to help my campaign turn our fundraising around.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783519/334314828/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk801-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTE4ZTBhMC0wMWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jCtp61EquwskRujLaViiEUgV1akQW1U1IQNVlgwb2s=)

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: need your thoughts on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=R%2BfmTMf69QTfxwSiuRf61QPZv7xOaDj%2F&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
At his first State of the Union address, President Biden spoke with sincerity, decency, and honesty. It was a welcome change of pace from what we'd become accustomed to hearing when Donald Trump was the one addressing Congress.
But I'll be blunt: The threat of Donald Trump is still alive and well in this country. The Republican Party is clinging to Trump and his dangerous agenda - amplifying his lies and obstructing any efforts to investigate his potential criminal actions. With the crisis in Ukraine expanding globally and leadership needed at home to uphold the integrity of our democracy, we cannot hand Senate control back to the GOP.
**Yet with the Senate split 50-50, we have zero margin for error. That 's why my campaign is scaling up its efforts to protect this crucial seat and keep the Senate in Democratic hands. With two new resourced and established Republican opponents, my race is heating up, and attacks have begun. I need your input right away to help shape my response.**
**I need to know what 's on your mind - because feedback from supporters like you is the key to winning this race and keeping Trumpism at bay.**
[**That 's why I'm personally asking: Will you take just a moment to let me know what issues matter most to you this election year? Your input helps ensure that your priorities are at the center of my work. **](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1152-su-nd)
I know that you hear from me a lot about the stakes of defending our Senate majority. It's because I've seen the harm and obstruction of a Mitch McConnell-led Senate firsthand - the dire consequences for people's livelihoods and most basic rights.
**I am here to serve you - to make sure your voices are heard and your priorities are fought for. But my willingness to stand up against the Republican Party has made me a target. I know I can only ensure the balance of power in the Senate is about you if I have the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you. **
[**So please, will you share your input in our official campaign survey? I 'm looking for 350 more members of this team to submit their feedback before my team's next strategy meeting on Friday morning. **](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1152-su-nd)
With gratitude,
Dick

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Mr=2E_Rod_Doril=C3=A1s?=
subject: Do you know how many black Republicans there are in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_t=KqHWgp4qdg1FKRO4vEXAe9wEPM2F_jANLWhn-mAz-LIIJp9R-EbibHtfH6fZymGN9jGomqeg7AQw5n4fZ1Mgj8kfL3BWz7MBZ7FPkFO7Q75BGQq_kJHaWn0FAWIK0bL5PW8758P5rUlB6dXkLunhf_t8F8Bg2-JeYx-Yxk2xnkg%3D).

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_e=gyUMYwF-DqhxWEM-btwRd5GTFT2nlwWqqPun-CTf4Uf8yib2p0ntetpIehQJG5uSUA8lcPTA9SkkPyegMIFBLR7Gxv-3X8eEpStqT_HFxnMH9v5J7dI4lpNHgx5ouEo3t6HFG-as_GN09mRtPjlmG3VO3bXMASvGoU6V3I87SWMbnXpQUXbTDl1dfOMwuvjgPc-BwugUJELCb9NZ1nAqqSxLPCk27Z9ZEJrETjvlBgxxEmADNrfHtvWbQl2n56g5cIaVbFdbrKrDD5oDg4gewsh0hTqnM9zxaQFmXffbnMhNU8sze9a882Ss_tLWdvu0PlxbOm9z-ph5A4xLZhsMHUN25_O9I0s6HO9nYr_AQqvQw4gLz2Lj7PmW_OA5YvNmQUtN9RiDnuecLeZvoyPQaVIuWonXIAfaPsgN_TKioZ1hdOTFpptxXSfXfeMCt08DNNIbQ1gyUeVA3XbSx-CbsZZKq-wku4bY-BLLO5ttApE%3D)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_e=gyUMYwF-DqhxWEM-btwRd5GTFT2nlwWqqPun-CTf4Uf8yib2p0ntetpIehQJG5uSUA8lcPTA9SkkPyegMIFBLR7Gxv-3X8eEpStqT_HFxnMH9v5J7dI4lpNHgx5ouEo3t6HFG-as_GN09mRtPjlmG3VO3bXMASvGoU6V3I87SWMbnXpQUXbTDl1dfOMwuvjgPc-BwugUJELCb9NZ1nAqqSxLPCk27Z9ZEJrETjvlBgxxEmADNrfHtvWbQl2n56g5cIaVbFdbrKrDD5oDg4gewriflas8QTt2K385gvmTHQT4unrCIZnyV1dLSDc4Fme8q8-4vIGavefLB6Of_m8YgfOovdF9_LZKTq7KLtCKqxgDHwK1taU-lO4gIFddLktCIOaPK0U4QMuxMj2G4D0GCvArgb9w2NAJ2r5Q3u5vql0M2bnSvOysGTgGZ9YnQJtGVXZteztzsvPeYSnhkCP_1qMhRx-ljJnlP6BVWIErJGw%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_e=gyUMYwF-DqhxWEM-btwRd5GTFT2nlwWqqPun-CTf4Uf8yib2p0ntetpIehQJG5uSUA8lcPTA9SkkPyegMIFBLR7Gxv-3X8eEpStqT_HFxnMH9v5J7dI4lpNHgx5ouEo3t6HFG-as_GN09mRtPjlmG3VO3bXMASvGoU6V3I87SWMbnXpQUXbTDl1dfOMwuvjgPc-BwugUJELCb9NZ1nAqqSxLPCk27Z9ZEJrETjvlBgxxEmADNrfHtvWbQl2n56g5cIaVbFdbrKrDD5oDg4gewi42bQFF99vbo-cneHeNyZLwsrj3HZ35NidJSeUplFYsAYDmhvZi_YshLVl0awE5NITGWj20riM23Z5j7zkw9GTTx6sviww6mYzEvSYEo3SKzGAPu7dI4CvehBm-rsVazMZXiQ4h6V0jn_27nOGdr7v-E_pGYCCrZ9E5HxoITyVdAtROqj9b9DGGxBIkt3HCKGi6XDac9QIrty1bDKLoq-g%3D)

I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_e=gyUMYwF-DqhxWEM-btwRd5GTFT2nlwWqqPun-CTf4Uf8yib2p0ntetpIehQJG5uSUA8lcPTA9SkkPyegMIFBLR7Gxv-3X8eEpStqT_HFxnMH9v5J7dI4lpNHgx5ouEo3t6HFG-as_GN09mRtPjlmG3VO3bXMASvGoU6V3I87SWMbnXpQUXbTDl1dfOMwuvjgPc-BwugUJELCb9NZ1nAqqSxLPCk27Z9ZEJrETjvlBgxxEmADNrfHtvWbQl2n56g5cIaVbFdbrKrDD5oDg4gewqWvFlDtH49F8MVxaybaJfQ3hu3Qf-ZJTGuDmx81HzcOLFYao3SYfPZNnO1-kUSGFLwmfL_ECAzWal0koZ85q8ssYLKB1LNSw-HsBaffcRQ9Zl5gJikekMSYQzZtyVIJEMZEDri8UWNAR2J0zA2x8-vUVf9l_mAyFcp9UOQqWB8skORddRAmIlAesrRTdmwcvWnGV8QzYJnZx8JXRyvhgNg%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_e=gyUMYwF-DqhxWEM-btwRd5GTFT2nlwWqqPun-CTf4Uf8yib2p0ntetpIehQJG5uSUA8lcPTA9SkkPyegMIFBLR7Gxv-3X8eEpStqT_HFxnMH9v5J7dI4lpNHgx5ouEo3t6HFG-as_GN09mRtPjlmG3VO3bXMASvGoU6V3I87SWMbnXpQUXbTDl1dfOMwuvjgPc-BwugUJELCb9NZ1nAqqSxLPCk27Z9ZEJrETjvlBgxxEmADNrfHtvWbQl2n56g5cIaVbFdbrKrDD5oDg4gewi9XZMU7dKqznYtbzzvzs-fcUNMGQyBdbeDJ9gtCFsfRBYRtuJ62_1Fh09WIJxr_wHCNQnpx45djTmRByK8JKbQFw9_7cyuC5citQ0AMGpo9k5oxLdipS_mr4uQ6eLqaS-WGd-MpqWxcFJLtOhnzdikoyqWKX4_93q1NBsW_VjMYouyA6A4fG6E5UWdMHU-MSnOs_gxm5wFDndHYfEocDek%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

Rod Dorilas

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_e=gyUMYwF-DqhxWEM-btwRd5GTFT2nlwWqqPun-CTf4Uf8yib2p0ntetpIehQJG5uSUA8lcPTA9SkkPyegMIFBLR7Gxv-3X8eEpStqT_HFxnMH9v5J7dI4lpNHgx5ouEo3t6HFG-as_GN09mRtPjlmG3VO3bXMASvGoU6V3I87SWMbnXpQUXbTDl1dfOMwuvjgPc-BwugUJELCb9NZ1nAqqSxLPCk27Z9ZEJrETjvlBgxxEmADNrfHtvWbQl2n56g5cIaVbFdbrKrDD5oDg4gewhzdujd5RBrGjwLFZ1djgEF-TIXPZPD45AjRAQ_w1b9vSay_xAyfjvuOxKNZblEhQ_IQzV1Er8LfJ7uu5fVpoA03tNvmZE5ECPhKeeqZqnlA97djxdrgN8L9U09O684icvKWFG5bpI6CaiacBoNA-s0josEW8NnsOcX0LGdXDd6pTCr68MS1flstHXxPKAgoJet6cIKagCXPpUe_M38f1Y0%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f3687d011cdf43f6bdd3ecb0c2dd668c&_t=KqHWgp4qdg1FKRO4vEXAe9wEPM2F_jANLWhn-mAz-LIIJp9R-EbibHtfH6fZymGN9jGomqeg7AQw5n4fZ1Mgj8kfL3BWz7MBZ7FPkFO7Q75BGQq_kJHaWn0FAWIK0bL5PW8758P5rUlB6dXkLunhf_t8F8Bg2-JeYx-Yxk2xnkg%3D).

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I’m disgusted and furious at the Florida GOP’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
it’s vile and abhorrent |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783782/334316422/1828375930?refcode=20220309_f_3_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg5ZTI2YS0wNGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5R4LjmwLWw9pd2NdHEWtH2B9cM10GweO287xjLLWm8=)
---
Friend, I’m disgusted and furious.

Yesterday, Florida Republicans passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill – a proposed law that would **_ban_** all discussion of LGBTQ+ issues, history, people, and more in the classroom. And now, it’s headed straight to Gov. DeSantis’s desk, where he’s expected to sign it without any hesitation.

Let’s be clear: This a direct attack on our LGBTQ+ youth, who already face higher risks of bullying and suicide. This bill is anti-history and jeopardizes the safe learning environments that are so essential in our schools.

[**_I’ve pledged to build a Florida for All, and all includes _everyone_. That’s why I’m fighting to beat DeSantis and end this crusade against LGBTQ+ students once and for all. If you’re ready to make Florida a more inclusive place, please chip in today to our campaign:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783783/334316423/1828375930?refcode=20220309_f_3_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg5ZTI2YS0wNGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5R4LjmwLWw9pd2NdHEWtH2B9cM10GweO287xjLLWm8=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783784/334316424/1828375930?refcode=20220309_f_3_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg5ZTI2YS0wNGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5R4LjmwLWw9pd2NdHEWtH2B9cM10GweO287xjLLWm8=)
---
Unfortunately, this isn’t the first time Gov. DeSantis and his allies in the Florida Legislature have attacked the LGBTQ+ community.

On the _first day_ of Pride Month 2021, the governor signed an anti-transgender bill. It was abhorrent then, and it’s abhorrent now.

[**_Friend, please chip in any amount as soon as you possibly can. Floridians deserve better than this vile, hateful bill. I’m doing everything I can to make sure Gov. DeSantis doesn’t have another term in office, but I’m counting on your help._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783785/334316425/1828375930?refcode=20220309_f_3_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg5ZTI2YS0wNGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5R4LjmwLWw9pd2NdHEWtH2B9cM10GweO287xjLLWm8=)

Thank you for fighting for what’s right.

— Charlie Crist

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42783786/334316426/1828375930?refcode=20220309_f_3_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTg5ZTI2YS0wNGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5R4LjmwLWw9pd2NdHEWtH2B9cM10GweO287xjLLWm8=)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Teamsters endorsement!
body:
The Teamsters Union has endorsed my campaign for Governor!
---
| | Dear Peter, I know you’ve heard from my team a couple of times already this week, but I want to make sure you hear this news while it’s still hot: **Teamsters Joint Council 37 has endorsed my campaign for Governor!** This is an important endorsement. The people who keep Oregon moving recognize that our vision for getting us back on track is the right one for our state. I’m proud of my long record of standing with Oregon workers in the legislature and now in the Treasurer’s office. Teamsters jobs are good, middle class jobs that support working families across Oregon and the country. The kind of jobs that we need more of in Oregon, and the kind of family supporting jobs my plan aims to create for Oregonians everywhere. The Teamsters endorsement means a lot to me and my team, and I’m looking forward to campaigning for our future together over the next few months as we add to our growing coalition. Stay safe,

---

---

* * *

name: Morgan Harper Volunteer Alert
subject: *Nudge* open for ways to get involved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220309-766-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg- ]Morgan Harper

Hey 👋 —

Welcome to the Morganizing community digest. ✨This is a newsletter where
we’ll share ways that you can get involved in your community.

We hope you’ll enjoy these opportunities to get involved and help build a
strong grassroots movement to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cresco Community Opportunities:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

— Canvasses near you 📋 —

We are knocking doors across the state to identify Morgan supporters, and
talk to undecided Democratic voters about the issues that matter most to
them and why Morgan is the best person to represent them in the U.S.
Senate. Closer to the election, we’ll also be reaching back out to
supporters to make sure they have a plan to vote! [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/21440?refcode=em20220309-766&t=1003&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg- ]If you would like to
get involved with this effort or learn more, please click here to find
canvasses happening near you.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/21440?refcode=em20220309-766&t=1004&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg- ]Sign up here »

— Other volunteer opportunities 🗂️ —

If there isn’t a canvass happening near you, please consider hosting a
canvass in your community or volunteering in another way! Regardless of
your location or experience level, we have plenty of ways that you can
support the campaign by volunteering – including opportunities to
volunteer remotely. [ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?refcode=em20220309-766&t=1005&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg- ]Click here to fill out our volunteer form and we’ll
reach out to you with more information.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?refcode=em20220309-766&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg- ]Sign up here »

— Voter registration 🗳️ —

We
wanted to make sure you’re aware that the last day to register to vote in
the primary election in Ohio is April 4th. [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29354?t=1007&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg- ]Early voting then starts on
April 5th. Please click here to register to vote.

Register to vote »

Thank you for everything you do,

Team Morganize

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Did you enjoy this newsletter? Please consider forwarding it to a friend
or sharing it on social media. That way even more people can find out
about Morgan’s progressive campaign for U.S. Senate and get involved. We
really appreciate your support! 🥰

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1008&akid=766%2E90090%2ExRmjg-

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

Hello,
Former Senator Claire McCaskill just issued a dire warning on MSNBC: **Senate Democrats must URGENTLY act on voting rights – _now_.**
Republicans tried to steal the election in 2020, even encouraging an armed insurrection at the capitol. Since then, they’ve been gerrymandering districts, suppressing voters, and enacting laws that everyone from President Joe Biden to Stacey Abrams are calling Jim Crow 2.0
We have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate. Only one seat would give control back to Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. **That’s why Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley in Iowa is so important.**
Senate control will likely be decided in Iowa and the early polls are showing a close race. **But if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now.**
**We need to raise another $15,000 to fight back against Grassley’s corporate PAC money and McConnell’s Super PACs, but right now we’re still $4,081 short with time running out:**

clean_body: = Hello, Former Senator Claire McCaskill just issued a dire warning on MSNBC: Senate Democrats must URGENTLY act on voting rights – now. Republicans tried to steal the election in 2020, even encouraging an armed insurrection at the capitol. Since then, they’ve been gerrymandering districts, suppressing voters, and enacting laws that everyone from President Joe Biden to Stacey Abrams are calling Jim Crow 2.0 We have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate. Only one seat would give control back to Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. That’s why Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley in Iowa is so important. Senate control will likely be decided in Iowa and the early polls are showing a close race. But if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now. We need to raise another $15,000 to fight back against Grassley’s corporate PAC money and McConnell’s Super PACs, but right now we’re still $4,081 short with time running out: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Study the Roman Republic
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zh4ohns3cerfa5dca5mh95kcn1u3va7le635db28_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3jm0ob1cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tlncuoeaoj7c5jb4t1h6urras3i6qpmcshlcqq37c346do75c7361pbecbhcarrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphmcaqr0pti6hj32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1e4icjlgseq1of49q8d6957bmk45rtj3qbe82a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3jm0ob1cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp75jnpks28ofcob1ducq7ppr2go29u7div97l88_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3jm0ob1cth2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2c34kol71br9hdd8r663dh4g2ol4msq7md9fas0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c3jm0ob1cth2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42774831/334274982/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220309womenshistory_a4pa1_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDliMTdiOS1kYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CljtPlJ_Ndp7w9us7YwIXcegPVnbb7958pXPkte2bvA=)
---
Did you know Pennsylvania ranks 31st in the country for women in elected office, team? As we celebrate Women’s History Month, we’d like to take a moment to honor the women throughout our nation’s history who came before us and acknowledge the work that we have left to achieve gender equality for all. Women in politics often face gender bias and discrimination in powerful institutions, also known as the “old boys club.” **Ashley broke barriers by being the only woman to graduate in her Apache class and served in the U.S. Army as an Apache helicopter pilot.** By carving her own path, she learned the values of integrity and leadership. And she learned to take on tough fights and beat the odds against her. That’s why we need women with diverse backgrounds and experiences in leadership roles at all levels of government. If elected, Ashley will be the first woman to represent PA-01. **[Contribute $10 today to help us make history by electing Ashley to be the first woman to represent PA-01 in Congress →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42774832/334274983/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220309womenshistory_a4pa1_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDliMTdiOS1kYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CljtPlJ_Ndp7w9us7YwIXcegPVnbb7958pXPkte2bvA=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Did you know Pennsylvania ranks 31st in the country for women in elected office, team? As we celebrate Women’s History Month, we’d like to take a moment to honor the women throughout our nation’s history who came before us and acknowledge the work that we have left to achieve gender equality for all. Women in politics often face gender bias and discrimination in powerful institutions, also known as the “old boys club.” Ashley broke barriers by being the only woman to graduate in her Apache class and served in the U.S. Army as an Apache helicopter pilot. By carving her own path, she learned the values of integrity and leadership. And she learned to take on tough fights and beat the odds against her. That’s why we need women with diverse backgrounds and experiences in leadership roles at all levels of government. If elected, Ashley will be the first woman to represent PA-01. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** **= ** **** | **= = ** | **= = There’s a lot of work left to do to ensure women have the same rights and equal opportunities as men. But the future remains bright because people like you are committed to fighting for justice and equality. Friend, the U.S. Postal Service delivers lifesaving prescriptions, groceries and even paychecks – and in election years like the one we just entered, it also delivers mail-in ballots to millions of voters. But when Trump was president, he kicked off a series of events that could spell DISASTER for this year's election:
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected an unqualified Trump megadonor, Louis DeJoy, to be postmaster general.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and essential groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time reducing efficiency and capacity ahead of the CRUCIAL midterm elections – putting vote-by-mail in serious danger!**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy, save the United States Postal Service and protect voters' ability to be heard. **But we can't stop DeJoy without your grassroots support, and we need to hear from 54 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please, friend, tell us now:**
**SHOULD LOUIS DEJOY BE REMOVED AS POSTMASTER GENERAL?**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country – in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes. I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. What America will we leave for our children? With the direction our country is headed in right now – our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c3d8e06cc04c48b68d489dc76d0ee7d6&_e=NcXwrvXZnxwJHvqdZftvXHA9ey5R16QDm6BIuTOsoxiFOrL70NyJvqQkmbIPt1LXIvjg6k-PO8ZiXQZ9gDYHITyTk098-_NCYh7QUqb6-Xp58iD_EQlJqHCYPrqKyx0IryrtEhrYlY8AE4Lu39iYTm3wn6J1eHXoWlEdvRdEiOa0U-9S3gTlScFKD3K257is4V1zScdmKsk4LOFfzonBbN3Jf4xFT1qVQhj7QOaug-dMTz-pWPKk-9rqDsomvxMOYJbWGimqh9JvS4jpmy-SfwDAuilazTm-rP6ZPYyQwEBbE5zm3ryf198C0B8PVO8BbmsE0V85n0NG-Nrw-CktG6DPWSqskZYeFPquULXxW6WKmFON6KGXEcJLpEWFztvc)

---
Fellow American,

Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Leader Kevin McCarthy submitted me for the prestigious “Young Guns Program” and they declared me “On the Radar”! This program is designed to help Republican candidates running in the top competitive districts around the country to provide strategic support.

**But here’s the catch:** candidates in the program must prove they can raise enough money to sustain their campaigns and pave a clear path to victory, in order to be given support by the NRCC. **Since this membership is so exclusive, I have a hefty goal that I have to meet before the quarter is up at the end of March - $100,000, and I’m more than $40,000 short.**

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Starting off behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
New Mexico's legislative session has ended, and we passed so many monumental policies
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42775115/334276787/-341899999?code=jtk1169-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTQ3ODc5YS1kYzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUu4dbZoIQy26c5Qs8oDmGg7XMK5ms8yNUCSfXnys6U=)
---
Peter,

New Mexico's legislative session has ended, and we passed so many monumental policies – from raising educator pay to free higher education for every New Mexican student.
We're pushing our state toward a brighter future – together. But the reality is, Peter, I have a tough road ahead as I work on my reelection campaign to keep New Mexico blue this coming November.
The GOP is pushing harder than ever to remove me from office, and I'm starting off this year behind on my goals because we haven't been allowed to fundraise since the special legislative session started in December.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Help us stand up to this NEW GOP attack 😬
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is just the beginning.
#
Derek, I have some (not great) breaking news to share: 😬
**Senate Republicans just released a brand-new video directly attacking me + our campaign.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45221?refcode=em20220309-4903&t=1&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)
**[Derek, will you chip in any amount right now to help me fight back? If enough folks donate before midnight, we should have enough money to set the record straight.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45221?refcode=em20220309-4903&t=2&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45221?amount=5&refcode=em20220309-4903&t=3&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)**
Let’s be clear here: **The truth is, as the frontrunner in the Democratic primary, these baseless attacks will keep coming,** and we need to make sure that our campaign has the resources to fight back.
Our campaign is powerfully supported by grassroots donors unlike anything we’ve ever seen in Pennsylvania. But Senate Republicans raised a record-breaking $104.8 million in 2021 alone. They can easily overpower the work of the people if we’re not prepared.
The great news is, if we can get a couple thousand of our Team Fetterman supporters to chip in right now, we can raise enough to send a clear message about the kind of grassroots strength they’ll be up against.
**[Please, if you can afford it today, make a contribution of any amount to fight back against Senate Republicans’ brand-new attack + the huge amount of money they can afford to spend in PA.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45221?refcode=em20220309-4903&t=4&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45221?amount=5&refcode=em20220309-4903&t=23&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)**
__
Derek, thank you. Whether you can give today or not, I’m incredibly grateful that you’re on the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220309-4903-footer&t=24&refcode2=4903_434096_IiXVmg&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4903%2E434096%2EIiXVmg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This hateful bill is headed toward Desantis’ desk, and he’s made it clear he’s planning on signing his name. **We’re going to need a tidal wave of support to stop DeSantis from signing this bill into law.** _Ron DeSantis' spokesperson called this an 'anti-grooming' bill_ and said that anyone who stands up to support LGBTQ youth is “probably a groomer” - _implying that those who don't want to silence students must be sexual predators._ **That's disgusting.** The top Republican sponsor of this bill said he wrote it to stop “social engineering” - that somehow counselors and teachers are recruiting kids to be gay. body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_t=jhXHIYVV0fQdHiCpxClrK9QxBk2hxYC-c0spdPLF9OIYRmNuu0U78c0_KJ0GC8uv_l___GUKxMDvvTeMfxljfvB3Ro-BDd1S1Ll6MWkBFHy19rl7QwGhQ6R-LBphMwEAb-dgtXAqoFIKiCxcwjtIDUsQhYs_d_lcLyKvMA8KKzU%3D).

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbYfUrZjYVFznpvvUW5l3PfX_kejilqX6yuRiZ6nsvA8W5DjZHWUQG-OSI45llSyCCEwSxNLDHs4vtZTwj1Ia-9dspPgJSttZQz7XPzsADQMEcWKQzFUJAKChhZXLhqleaRMnI4TzAcWY3NJZIVqDG2LVCLuoYadDgRhuGZnjXUZjW16YWn7ZhFOKSxOVtbZN_wGgs7HXyxZr3TSJj8_e7AI%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbUx-mxDHfrweWBAZ4a0xgDYUCUyhiwjPLh0mln90ZaP1lxOCgR1EcrQkYDwzmFWUUG33jUrhHU5bCBNgBMQdX6V5USSFeQQCxxiMfGx59ZV71tRjz9sQZnCYdOg5l2QL8zkvHOKURZsAparXHplwkREgx8a4mztTDRnp-wm99Kbl-rCbdoPN8qj9LB3imhGjMqhF1Jpncqb8Vjvc853l5X8%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbXO1YC7PlOlvGGU0wQ53yFStjPJufL38dBalOshwTfVV8MphJT0eHUp-kkpdZvZ4kHoRxCrKFsZ75QTe2WO2r-4jItMclC2UozYAwIaazKpJ0g_JI5sOLrb0S82Mg3lrZ4w6tYvcJMK3VVLFrcQ8RpoR24CJgp81MZcx6ZtUEnHEDmgIZwBHxv2Fjqj4voA8egHUEX6e-B9Qz5B3fLuMNfw%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbWFXCPBcOTA8wDH9zNemj0Va6NJhGoJcd4yXEsnWm9WfSC7_kycHtCQMqmK9eGIAEgmBcIp7I_m4C3klBoeClbexs_X69_7MfsCY0-JVouMmdsi9x_Ck50CRmVpkutU8-fjPg1MTu5OCS6RfP5XHpaLLLO4EpQBE175ZUVNFk_AqhX4w2Js8wNXmmirFFV3D-aSAKT3entd_TWyVPbJSXqE%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** PLEASE TAKE A CHANCE ON ME
MAKE A GIFT TODAY>>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbTsw54E3Gdx-pZaNFBRSHeToIbE0gC6GLukzHDN3uifBNblBb83dZf0WGkMjCJMlxe0XEUNWIN1nMvmC_Kl-xxgUwD_cV6k4RensPU_s2NW-srzKhDWODZzYLb3nwlpuuKQIyUXnkJ9Xk7xlcB7oBduXa2zsPRN074p_g7sY9dqDLOh6uHNIPHtof1L_SxCT-0xQD5th89Yd6AXC1MYvy0k%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbQb4Gl5LC0A6NO_0gcguA0NlHsVkcZlKUPMleaDGkIVXCqDGbfHySYN_Yf0w5O4F0IJsIgK9WE1Yk36w5nZ0xUAAwygSWqlAS6w0Pr3ndntyKCOBT3rRfTLjR-wctTe28H6GMBOeJV-KKK1cvfHDaDqHvOhBvJ6MmM9xblqqF3SgsjitUUEOYiFSIYQpTl9-swJ-459F2zBvAojkQy2jYEA%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbdDVStMsLX6ddxH6exdJW-nPH3iBvgAhiS9vBpFvs2Ua1mvm3LTzYa7uYtoBk0ztUAjUg7-TgyfMDCcNMJp4MZaFUbHqCTQtF6VfubMkc9hBZZGMtpcKnE7wofBAOr4ZRWRMRDhdR6kY1oN85YyroSvzdqmR31ijAYDMSMa_zWpaVmvqcd5JBjP7Z2FowfWg-4KEZgf3MH683FG_v0BZ5S8%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** PLEASE TAKE A CHANCE ON ME
MAKE A GIFT TODAY >>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbUEWy7j2QxkvDIeXLUyFGweaiydaeeasOquVrjvYFSHfYg71uMOXhulDZDibT-YPbsl8otogALSIzYopeviRZeWQ9Blb6ydqlL-MJZOecHW9LWWfqHaH5v-EsfbHbwPRiqy1iK1Cwh1ynGy1HfZPW02XVBu3pwY2cxV7qP6sYdYMxij43pav_Sp1i4bRJ9DFTiOPJ-ryoJwsAOAXG55j7YU%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbU6dwTMo578aTefuKFYJT9UYVxRZZaUqm9rINpyMMbWiedCvW1_2JTiMOZ5mVf3bSjqEskKLH0akzGx8_bHeRMBXJ4FI7CUurVX0RunCUA2ymczxtDAax6xr0u1Fu_2va47ZC9F5TBG3z3Y2s5VajJ1UvgNZnltZzNnYPh2xgd1cz8TY7KTg1fuM9B2fQjijcik2XGhu7VZOLGTPRrbhIFQ%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_e=TV4ggWXWMcBkeB_RCxUcvENlxqHstn6sDRTP96C3yPX2jG5e0H5CHmjMy5jhYl71y_FGC8TAYrDNDIduQwfLpXQ-415pSCgAyoMw5zaCRBldtyVGES-N-SFD2bhTnTM9dTXlX1pe2bxplJ1N7G8U2nbsFE7Ws8xycFma60b6AiKdRQBuXXwvg1zpvsO_Ka4YPekchUU5qVZjhuAjzgglyIjAosNGJ6cBQIkQ-L3TBSiamLRN07YVVrASbs-62B2wMo5NQrNXGX6PReKTGFznbXlJRpGa-BqosKiD8Is6zFLPS4D77QaS-uxqIHq8_dfGTUyUzepvt8DRrz9cFUEhEc2vjes-oEnh1YzNuZACIQIs8Yogp-hhy8LzMzwKMvDy6hg8D4GQ2E6juLKEe6SMCiegd3ANs94E8YVGsNHTkvrN7wPD2pn_MP_QkZxzihnzCs1A3xixsZbBNY0yKxXvYh8v4EGyrAawp8sFMLuK1NQ%3D)

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=3cb06f8cc4ba450c938008935b9c9dc3&_t=jhXHIYVV0fQdHiCpxClrK9QxBk2hxYC-c0spdPLF9OIYRmNuu0U78c0_KJ0GC8uv_l___GUKxMDvvTeMfxljfvB3Ro-BDd1S1Ll6MWkBFHy19rl7QwGhQ6R-LBphMwEAb-dgtXAqoFIKiCxcwjtIDUsQhYs_d_lcLyKvMA8KKzU%3D).
