And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. For Country, Rod Dorilas | ABOUT ROD** Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: Tom
subject: Team, we made it official!
body:
It's official – The Perez Sneed Administration is on the ballot for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland!
#

Big news, team!

It's official – **The Perez Sneed Administration is on the ballot for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland!**

This is a huge milestone, but it's only one of **many** we need to hit before we can get to Annapolis and deliver on our big plans to bring jobs, equal justice, and equal opportunity to _all_ Marylanders.

So, we're announcing our **Official Filing Fund** today to celebrate our filing and make sure we have the resources necessary to sustain our momentum ahead of the primary. **_[We're looking for 150 supporters to donate $10 to the Fund before midnight tonight. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: "This seat is in jeopardy”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My former opponent thinks that because he represented the 4th district of Oregon for 36 years, he can hand pick his replacement. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnGEgGDw0_bFcdo6LhV7L46AVfxljDDGzPkV2xZtR3nKT5Wj-VigrWbZtHmW173_5oUHAzpoxEI_1dmOf_h03N4R8d-mjhe_bcSSjCeRtvGlRX8Vx67RHuaUlUZV_27j2gvs68-zAViEewqddbEO-i1HTBHz7BNdhSZSKe4Lz7iDrQZdMrOQbJlhymsR3cB-ZuOAsJhk7DhuduIZBQ2R04X3)
---

Peter,

In a recent email missive endorsing the Democrat he hopes to succeed him in Congress, my former opponent Peter DeFazio described me as a “**hand-selected Trump** ” candidate running with “**all kinds of help from all kinds of Super PACs and conservative mega-donors**.”

On both counts, **Peter DeFazio is lying**. He’s trying to gin up support for my would-be Democrat opponent, Val Hoyle, by hounding his email list and scaring his donors into supporting Val’s campaign.

1. No one picked me to run on Oregon's 4th District

2. I'm not receiving the support of any Super PACs or megadonors. In reality, 98% of the support my campaign receives is from **small-dollar donors** like you reading emails like this.

What DeFazio DOES get right is that “ _**this seat is in jeopardy**_.”

That’s right - this seat is in Jeopardy of flipping red, but we need your help to make Peter’s warning come true in real life.

We’re just asking for a few dollars today. **[Can you help us out with a donation of $2, $4 or even $6 right now?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnElHS00DDUGBBogvoiSpxnZQyDPA2Qn0mqHR203sy-lbsqD6K8_Ba75vPHJQfRmgu3tclH6qaBn_-InC-qYxpw_nVdgmyTQpwZ30iUaeafaErnW67wZxks03gALoQ6DRqEeDs75_MihkZQ-huNkM1NIwU-KcuGtt6TCLKecOvaAQdw_YVrNtHFkrWD1EHYDol4kSs04QMw00Ix210StuOqa)**
[**__
CHIP IN $2, $4 or $6 NOW -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnE4SShgMykU-FJnyEPUzI0_ZEQyKcqjmSYo0uEsaOAk6clkew_X4mF8be5OMndfv_4ObFzlmIbXvPO_3aBT2rstau1NZ6l107TVajIjT50GFhvCA-zfUrUEShnf5kjF5TKNsqlX0cuywen1c5j1MlaCzfwqqz1uPtaX7AMSVETQU-JfdKKxUlxb69d-5EKs9Znech2-wLsz1DDbBYFsnqlS)
Peter DeFazio himself notes that, “ _**Republicans nationwide are preferred on a generic ballot.**_ ”

And that ...

“ _**in the face of a bruising midterm election with President Biden’s favorability,” this seat is a battleground district.**_ ”

This campaign is really starting to come into clear view and all forecasts point to it being another expensive undertaking. That’s why I’m writing today.**[We’ve set a goal to raise $65,000 online this month and we need your help](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnEcYwIEi99vz4xnao5XjEZdXm46nwYVMSnNoLPd5x6byMDxQs7aWmNj_5_3Q_MNNB-YR36mYRZHjsS6w-mbexGHVPWzVNjl1iXDerj-YU_W0FqEw3JVtz_fsSwBy74V_pZvybWC1GhitXSAdgCJykkHzdd3UbuVHyic-oYQNleC4D28ZEvjw0uCVLTQv1LmiLW07vEwIadW_VLfZJOzaPxi)**.

**[Every donation of $5 or $10 or even $100](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnEdgWg8UUoTKkOpnJ4r_moud5kI-J9DVht-yChYUtxsUm-LH6iJ8ex_FpIbLNvtjHkV__pttTQZnnCyDVQMx_8A99YIa-AcSwrpOrCh3dwqUMr7S_E8_XIwKNqNmVuqk9AruBfY9Z1jgN8iU613S74SC1_iB7NiapTn_a79bANWC84EqMGFdPccx0zKqd7TOzs9eTzPUZ_FImHYMTgVUn3G)** will help us make sure we’re able to keep pace with what DEMS plan to spend here. Because as Peter DeFazio put it, expect “ _**an even higher rate of spending and outside meddling**_.”

[**__
CHIP IN $2, $4 or $6 NOW -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnFY3QhYbBmPL4nMTVhi5409xSw9NFR5417kH3Tnn2UuqhL197T31e5__872KNf8KSdMiqEZTPiHkA6LGcW6rJODhDsPwEqWY94O_k2ad7sdL5vYd3pH0eiNZu_InYliVo2uG54uifhJ5iVzHtdpw6gTak46z3Pilky0qlzsCzbdjegbw0z51OD3CzEssiGrQpVu_zZoeaVaWWQwJz2Kgnpi)

In 2016, this district was the closest in terms of presidential margin of victory in the entire country, and the new district lines haven’t changed the political make-up of the Congressional District too terribly much.

**Will you help me get the job done this time around?**

Alek Skarlatos

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. [**To support Alek’s campaign chip in $5 or more today!**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=27d30bf4234c4f2c8f36e26bf6ab96ad&_e=pJvB-2PlS23kzfe2H0LOBnuSW-gjsKuju7ZxwUJk6bJ8TQXJeLiKFaoTkf7ITthy7b9oM_GhNDpVf6N0G6qRiSuqy7CFuSLYjigsqN9usUwm4ZzXciRPXjKDebXTZWMBe5ndNlWhNR-G8ByIrI-ebU14DMaBzdhYrZujbmKIGlXqkVDubZq36cM-WajZYJwlcvbNKjAfs5zY8gLb7ae2I9p3FGjqorkViKAFip2iPnFuR3Ylq1q13JglDUEBKI-QmxvWEOV0kk_3jcvHodjnD8u0XQ60z6SjTQQMehbdfmuwsWnK7ebe9RNtcUQwSJkt86IFCrL0B4CcwIXNDlSbltkHBPq-tQqaRoDbSYHw0euFJmiNZx1_lGM_Zz8IWgqIl8ge3yz7JnZwUKUCXPNauNKGbcAmRoeeLczK8IOQgIoHLhhXmqJs1ijPOryqaygj)

subject: Fire Nancy Pelosi
body:
Our campaign has all the momentum. Help us capitalize and win back the house. | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=62b3c0b652&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | Friend,
Our campaign to bring honest and servant leadership to Congress is gaining momentum, and Democrats are NERVOUS that we're going to be the ones to tip the scales and take back the House for Republicans.

Nancy Pelosi knows her days as speaker are coming to an end, and MILLIONS have been put into our race to try to hold this seat for the Democrats.

We have all the momentum in this campaign, but we need YOU to help us make sure we keep it going all the way to Election Day. America and our children's future are worth the fight.

[Contribute $10 or more TODAY to help us take back the House and FIRE Nancy Pelosi. >> ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=a623911cf1&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| [FIRE PELOSI](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=243d41f17e&e=b78e7c4d40 "FIRE PELOSI")
---
| Our race is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country.

It’s going to take all hands on deck to bring this thing home and defeat the socialism and progressivism that is trying to undermine our great nation.

[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT you can to help us win big on Election Day. >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=eb053f2e04&e=b78e7c4d40)

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate for Congress (IL-11)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=ee87b8e677&e=b78e7c4d40 "CONTRIBUTE NOW >>")
---
| |

_To contribute by mail, please send a personal check made payable to “Jerry Evans for Congress” to:
Jerry Evans for Congress
PO Box 4074
Naperville, IL 60567_

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=c61429644e&e=b78e7c4d40&c=66190091ef) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=c61429644e&e=b78e7c4d40&c=66190091ef).

We came in just a slim margin from defeating Henry Cuellar in the primary — but we’re confident we’ll be victorious in the runoff. Together, we can fund the outreach initiatives we need to replace Henry Cuellar with Jessica Cisneros — a bold, fearless leader who will fight for ALL of us in Congress and not just a select few (unlike Cuellar who _only_ works for his corporate donors).

Fellow American,

Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Leader Kevin McCarthy submitted me for the prestigious “Young Guns Program” and they declared me “On the Radar”! This program is designed to help Republican candidates running in the top competitive districts around the country to provide strategic support.

**But here’s the catch:** candidates in the program must prove they can raise enough money to sustain their campaigns and pave a clear path to victory, in order to be given support by the NRCC. **Since this membership is so exclusive, I have a hefty goal that I have to meet before the quarter is up at the end of March - $100,000, and I’m more than $40,000 short.**

I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country - _in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes._ I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and kick my ultra-liberal opponent out of office.

Republican’s only need to pick up five seats to ensure the majority - and it all comes down to Minnesota. I can’t afford to fall short _**again**_. With all eyes on this race, I sincerely need all the help I can get, and that means crushing this goal before March 31st. clean_body: I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country – in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes. I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. What America will we leave for our children? With the direction our country is headed in right now – our children will be left with a worthless currency, a futile voting system, and the fear to dream. | Fellow American, Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Leader Kevin McCarthy submitted me for the prestigious “Young Guns Program” and they declared me “On the Radar”! This program is designed to help Republican candidates running in the top competitive districts around the country to provide strategic support. But here’s the catch: candidates in the program must prove they can raise enough money to sustain their campaigns and pave a clear path to victory, in order to be given support by the NRCC. Since this membership is so exclusive, I have a hefty goal that I have to meet before the quarter is up at the end of March - $100,000, and I’m more than $40,000 short. I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country - in 2020 I lost by less than 10,000 votes. I need the support of the NRCC to WIN and kick my ultra-liberal opponent out of office. Republican’s only need to pick up five seats to ensure the majority - and it all comes down to Minnesota. I can’t afford to fall short again. With all eyes on this race, I sincerely need all the help I can get, and that means crushing this goal before March 31st. Every contribution --even if it’s just a couple of bucks -- makes a huge difference in inching towards our goal. I’m counting on you today, Fellow American. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. P.S. I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and that oath will never expire. | | Tyler Kistner * Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Video: Ukraine (Urgent)
body:
Dear Patriot,

Right now, the same establishment leaders in both parties that kept us in disastrous wars in Afghanistan, Syria, and Iraq are working overtime to get us involved on the ground in Ukraine.

I will oppose this and any other attempt to engage our military where we do not have a vital national interest.

Will you help me win my race with a contribution today? https://www.joekentforcongress.com.

My opponent, Jaime Herrera Beutler, voted to keep our troops in Syria and has refused to rule out ground involvement or a no-fly zone in Syria. Instead, she’s sided with those calling for a dramatic escalation that could result in a direct war with Russia.

To fight back, my campaign has cut an ad that we’re putting on TV and radio. You can see it and contribute to keep it on the air here: https://www.joekentforcongress.com/ukraine.

Please, help me get this message out. Right now, it seems like the entire mainstream media and the establishment leadership is eager to send our sons and daughters to die in another war of convenience.

By getting my ad on the air, it sends the message that the American people oppose our leaders’ reckless intentions that could cost precious American blood.

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

PS – Every $145 you gives allows us to air this ad one time on Fox News in our biggest city. Please chip in at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/ukraine.

==============================================

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: BREAKING: 2 hateful new laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, Breaking news: Idaho is considering a law that makes it a felony for a parent to leave the state with their trans teenager to get them care. And a proposed law in Missouri would prohibit women from leaving the state to get an abortion. [**I am the first woman and first gay person to run for Congress in WA-06. Protecting reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights are personal to me. If you can, please contribute to my campaign now and help me win, so I can fight for our rights in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42785568/334346484/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjA5MDFjMi0xMGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDk_ffGuD9Py-z_TN9L4mf_I1aSy1TDgOq-I8AYg3Ss=) It feels like we’ve been moving backwards over the last few years. He watched LBJ sign the Civil Rights Act and now he’s watching the Supreme Court take it apart. We must move forwards, not backwards. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alan Sims for Congress
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alansimsforcongress/9gmhty1yxf?e=bcd0e72a5a)
---
| | |
# Weekly Update 3.9.22
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Friends,** As we await the Supreme Court's decision in a recent Mississippi case to learn whether Roe v. Wade may be limited or overturned, the House passed, and the Senate killed a democrat sponsored bill that would have mandated unfettered abortion access in federal law. We absolutely must elect Representatives to the Congress that will fight for the Right to Life.
---
|
# **In this issue:**
* Recent Events
* Upcoming Events
* Alan on the Issues
* This week in Congress

---
|
---
On Wednesday, March 9th, Alan submitted his qualifying paperwork to run for Congress. He is a conservative Republican, and a native of the 10th district.

"I’m honored to submit my qualifying paperwork to represent Georgia in our nation’s Capitol," **Sims said**. "In Congress, I will fight for Georgia’s conservative values and fire Nancy Pelosi. Under the Biden-Pelosi far-left agenda we have soaring prices at the gas station and grocery store and record numbers of illegals crossing our southern border. Now, after capitulating to the Taliban in Afghanistan, the weak posture of this administration has invited aggression from Russia, China, Iran and North Korea. We need leaders in Washington who know how to defend our Georgia way of life, and our safety abroad. We need a proven fighter, and I’m ready to serve. Again.”
|
---
---
| |
---
**Recent Events:** Alan spoke with the **Newton County Republican Women** at the Covington Municipal Airport.
---
| What a great turnout last week at the **Farm Bureau Forum** in **Winder**. This fantastic event was sponsored by the Barrow County Farm Bureau. We sure appreciate those fine folks, and especially all the hard work by Staci Waters and team to pull off such a fantastic event! We truly appreciate the opportunity to share and meet so many great residents of the great 10th district!

**Greene County GOP’s Candidate Forum** was a great opportunity to connect! It was so great to meet and talk to so many informed voters (and future voters) about our campaign and our priorities for the 10th Congressional district. Many thanks to everyone who came out to listen, engage, and support!

**Upcoming Events:**
**Wednesday, March 9** : Meet Alan at the **Taliaferro County Republican Party** meeting at the Crawfordville Senior Citizens’ Center at 6:30 pm.

**Sunday, March 13** : Meet Alan for some great wings and time together at the **Rutledge Wings Meet & Greet** from 2-4 pm at 148 West Atlanta Highway Suite D, Rutledge. RSVP to Greg Sherrill at 770-403-2125
*Paid for by Alan Sims for Congress

**VOTE FOR ALAN MAY 24th in the Republican Primary**

---
| **Alan on the Issues:
Second Amendment: The Right to Keep and Bear Arms**
**Second Amendment: The Right to Keep and Bear Arms**
As a veteran and avid gunowner, I know the right to keep and bear arms is key to protecting freedom and must be defended as fundamental to all other liberties.

**Key Takeaways:**
* The right to keep and bear arms is an inalienable right, protected by our Constitution
* This right ensures that citizens are able to defend themselves against abuse of power from the federal government or from would-be criminals
* This core right is deeply ingrained in our history; it has been and will continue to be a key in preserving our liberties and our nation

---
| [CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: The Second Amendment: The Right to Keep and Bear Arms](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=a2c0654f24&e=bcd0e72a5a "CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: The Second Amendment: The Right to Keep and Bear Arms")
---
| **This week in Congress:**
**House & Senate Abortion Bill**
At the end of February, the Senate voted down the most expansive and ghoulish abortion bill in recent history, more radical than even Roe vs. Wade. This bill, passed onto them by a majority vote in the House, would have reversed decades of progress made toward restoring the right to life for every preborn child.

Instead, House Democrats sought to override states’ rights to set their own abortion laws in favor of granting unfettered rights to abortion on the federal level.

This bill would have paved the way to legalize genetic testing to determine which children live and which die, as well as threatened laws banning late-term abortions and protection of abortion survivors.

More importantly, it would have banned states from passing laws requiring that women be fully informed before deciding to have an abortion and would have threatened existing laws that prevent taxpayer dollars from funding the abortion industry.

This extreme bill showed just how far the left intends to go, given enough power. Clearly, Congress needs representatives who will fight for our most vulnerable and protect the right to life, and who will support the majority of Americans who believe the same. As your Representative, that’s exactly what I’ll do.

# **What We Learn From Democrats’ Failure to Pass an Extreme Abortion Bill**
[https://www.dailysignal.com/2022/03/04/what-we-learn-from-democrats-failure-to-pass-an-extreme-abortion-bill/](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=b1a41e9f05&e=bcd0e72a5a)

subject: NBC BREAKING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Florida Republicans for passing a bill to BAN discussions of sexual orientation and gender identity in the classroom?
| | _**NBC BREAKING: Florida legislature passes 'Don't Say Gay' bill**_

| | ****We 're FURIOUS.

All children deserve to be treated with respect.

But Florida Republicans just passed a HORRIFIC, discriminatory bill attacking LGBTQ+ youth.

Democrats will never stop fighting to create a more inclusive America - but we need this grassroots team to help defeat bigoted Republicans. **

[So let us know: Do you CONDEMN Florida Republicans for passing a bill to BAN discussions of sexual orientation and gender identity in the classroom?](https://links.e.dccc.) ******
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0LpA7Q~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAd~)
---|---|---

We need to move NOW.

In President Biden's State of the Union address, he promised LGBTQ+ youth that he would always have their back:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

But the GOP can't say the same - **because Florida Republicans just passed a HORRIFIC bill to stop discussions about LGBTQ+ issues in the classroom.**

Let us be clear: All our children deserve to feel accepted and to be able to show pride in their identities.

But this Florida bill sends us backwards in the fight for an inclusive America.

**So we 're calling on 25,000 grassroots Democrats to rise up and join us in taking a stand:**

**[Do you CONDEMN Florida Republicans for passing their"Don't Say Gay" bill and attacking LGBTQ+ youth?](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0LpA7Q~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAd~)
---|---|---

Thank you,

DCCC

| Team,

My name is Greg Stanton. I’m a Congressman from Arizona, and I’m reaching out because I’m currently running in one of the tightest races in the country. For the last four years, I’ve proudly represented Arizona’s 9th Congressional district, but because of redistricting, my new district now only leans Democratic by **one percent.**

That’s a BIG problem when Democrats historically turn out in smaller numbers during the midterms. **That’s why I’m relying on the grassroots support of folks like you to help PROTECT our House majority and KEEP this seat blue.**

**[Team, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party to help us defend this seat in November?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6FRW5bwg9SvS6xTX_t5s9h_69vO13Xhgs7sIgYQRwIceg8II3CjA9J7auhkXgWPqcDx1nsDo69mGQqAcDvVnJm3lMM28ZsXnUKRGHknjHCEudUsq7yUFpqnoBhMZVmzy1pWIdOTuj5eT7y3CjdyMlQ6KYj09BX8F1JTp8WwUqFOvK0Ln7vmmo-y4SSW0UHvZu5N-7rNMd_CwBQHNuB0dWrSTGcgV18bxP2e7qNI7ojqf2pO7hZt_UlTTfk5X8yGXLCR5m8R7iK_KddE5HuCYO5LMj3eatKJbXDbMwJZn1taXmFr9LLjVjeE5iZVJMu7QYCZmAPLosyDV7Gvc_ZGpsqsq2QkZLjd9ACMdM_fHTlOX0GYjgSrdi_5GQXQxuiF75eYaw7ynpTIH_1QhSnnXhIQuu9U7xrvsNIX5buMasBLf-7ujCqJ676GThqawbh5I/3k7/ZKdAlV2ZSQCr4erel0wohQ/h1/kJ677LCbymYHC3qo6Hb-6IttyceN3UTfu-35SN9Gwgo)** [

clean_body: | | | Help me defend our majority | | | Team, My name is Greg Stanton. I’m a Congressman from Arizona, and I’m reaching out because I’m currently running in one of the tightest races in the country. For the last four years, I’ve proudly represented Arizona’s 9th Congressional district, but because of redistricting, my new district now only leans Democratic by one percent. That’s a BIG problem when Democrats historically turn out in smaller numbers during the midterms. That’s why I’m relying on the grassroots support of folks like you to help PROTECT our House majority and KEEP this seat blue. I’m not in politics for the fame or power — I’m working to make life better for everyone. As Mayor of Phoenix, I led bipartisan efforts to expand public transportation, defend LGBT equality, and support small businesses — while overseeing the highest wage growth in the country at the time. In Congress, I’ve secured billions of dollars to invest in Arizona’s infrastructure, helped expand and support our tourism industry and local economy, and passed COVID-19 relief in the darkest days of the pandemic. I’ve worked across the aisle when it made sense — and stood up for Arizonans always. With my new district lines, I’m in the toughest race I’ve ever been in. I’m not the only one ringing the alarm: Democrats just added me to their list of frontline candidates, which means holding my seat could make or break our House majority. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for your time, — Greg For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Arizona Democrats, please .

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Why this month is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can only do this with a movement behind us.
#
Peter,
There’s a lot riding on this year. We need to pass as much of President Biden’s agenda as possible and protect the Democratic majority in the midterm elections in November. Pramila is laser focused on both, but she needs the resources to ramp up her advocacy and organizing during this election year.
At the end of this month, we have to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). What we report to the FEC becomes public, and folks will see the strength of our movement — but only if we hit our fundraising goals. Plus, media outlets and politicos will look to Pramila’s fundraising numbers to judge the strength of the progressive movement, since Pramila is the Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.
[**Can you chip in $3 to help increase our fundraising pace before the end of the first quarter of the year? We can’t wait until the end of the month to boost our fundraising.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10897?refcode=em20220309-1090&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1090%2E420207%2EEymBNO)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10897?refcode=em20220309-1090&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1090%2E420207%2EEymBNO)**
Pramila has already helped progressive Democrat Greg Casar win his Congressional primary in Texas. And she’s expanding on that work right now to elect more progressives and protect the Democratic majority in the U.S. House.
**It will take a lot of money to do that. And Pramila’s campaign doesn’t take a cent of corporate PAC money, so we’re relying on your grassroots support.**
Pramila is also fighting to secure critical pieces of the Democratic agenda: raising the minimum wage to $15, making childcare affordable, investing in health care, securing paid family and medical leave, and much more.
We can only do this with a movement behind us. And part of that is raising money from our grassroots supporters and hitting our fundraising goals each quarter.
[**So, Peter, can you chip in $3 right now to ensure Pramila hit’s her first quarter goals during this critical election year? Our average online donation this quarter is $27.23, so you know we are counting on your support.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10897?refcode=em20220309-1090&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1090%2E420207%2EEymBNO)
Thank you so much for your support.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220309-1090-footer&t=22&refcode2=1090_420207_EymBNO&akid=1090%2E420207%2EEymBNO)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Illegal Immigrant Murders 4 in Jurisdiction of Sheriff Sued for Reporting Alien Criminals to ICE
body:
Months after a California sheriff got sued for reporting undocumented criminals to federal authorities, an illegal immigrant with a criminal history murdered four people in the veteran law enforcement official’s jurisdiction just days after being released from jail.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | March 09, 2022
---|---|---

# [Illegal Immigrant Murders 4 in Jurisdiction of Sheriff Sued for Reporting Alien Criminals to ICE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58261&L=26903&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtbXVyZGVycy1mb3VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
Months after a California sheriff got sued for reporting undocumented criminals to federal authorities, an illegal immigrant with a criminal history murdered four people in the veteran law enforcement official’s jurisdiction just days after being released from jail. The brutal crimes occurred in Sacramento, California where Sheriff Scott Jones was recently sued by a leftist civil rights group for transferring illegal alien offenders to Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for removal rather than release them back into the community under state sanctuary laws known as the TRUTH Act and the California Values Act.

### [U.S. Starts Disbursing $260 Mil to Promote Equity in Unemployment Benefits ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58261&L=26898&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjYwLW1pbC10by1wcm9tb3RlLWVxdWl0eS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch Months after the Biden administration announced it was dedicating an unprecedented $260 million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment benefits the money is starting to flow so states can address disparities, increase public awareness of the program and boost the number of applicants. body:
With Annie showing her campaign strength with appearances on major news programs and events across SC-1, one of our primary challengers JUST dropped out of the race.

| FIRST: We’re gearing up to officially launch our campaign with our filing on Tuesday. Annie is running against far-right opponents to bring thoughtful, caring leadership centered around building a better future for our children to the Lowcountry.

THEN: With Annie showing her campaign strength with appearances on major news programs and events across SC-1, one of our primary challengers **JUST** dropped out of the race.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Democrats can win anywhere we can compete. Steve Sisolak proved that in Nevada.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Democratic governors across the country, like Governor Steve Sisolak in Nevada, are facing tough re-election challenges this year. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42778670/334294765/823540626?refcode=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhiZTdmMi1lYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wr0Wb6MAoN0EraLsUdN3M8CcBzL5TdaotowGdJMM5s=&emci=63571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Peter, As Democrats, we hold some values dear: **We believe in a nation that is fair, where each of us has a say in our government, where our civil rights are respected, and where everyone has the opportunity to live abundant, purposeful lives.** Governors are on the front lines of creating this kind of country. But Democratic governors across the country, like Governor Steve Sisolak in Nevada, are facing tough re-election challenges this year — a year we always knew was going to be challenging for our party. **Steve is already facing relentless efforts by Donald Trump’s allies and state Republicans to suppress the vote, undermine our democracy, and spread Trump’s Big Lie about the 2020 election in Nevada.** **[Steve needs Democrats everywhere, even here in North Carolina, to unite and help him HOLD Nevada. Please, split a contribution between our team and his campaign right now to show your support>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42778674/334294772/-1487676571?refcode=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhiZTdmMi1lYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wr0Wb6MAoN0EraLsUdN3M8CcBzL5TdaotowGdJMM5s=)** **I’ve always believed that Democrats can win everywhere we can compete** — everywhere we can prove that we have the plans to solve the kitchen-table issues facing American families and make progress to improve their lives. Steve proved that back in 2018 when he became the first Democrat elected governor in Nevada in 20 years. The GOP has already spent $2 million working to unseat Steve, and if he’s going to defeat them, he needs resources to keep up and counter their dangerous lies about stolen elections. **Steve is relying on folks like you to help take on the MAGA money machine.** **[Donate whatever you can today to Team Cooper and Team Sisolak — together, we will hold Nevada for Democrats>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42778676/334294795/-1487676571?refcode=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhiZTdmMi1lYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wr0Wb6MAoN0EraLsUdN3M8CcBzL5TdaotowGdJMM5s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42778679/334294811/-1487676571?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.308be7f2-eb9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhiZTdmMi1lYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wr0Wb6MAoN0EraLsUdN3M8CcBzL5TdaotowGdJMM5s=)

clean_body: Democratic governors across the country, like Governor Steve Sisolak in Nevada, are facing tough re-election challenges this year. | Peter, As Democrats, we hold some values dear: We believe in a nation that is fair, where each of us has a say in our government, where our civil rights are respected, and where everyone has the opportunity to live abundant, purposeful lives. Governors are on the front lines of creating this kind of country. But Democratic governors across the country, like Governor Steve Sisolak in Nevada, are facing tough re-election challenges this year — a year we always knew was going to be challenging for our party. Steve is already facing relentless efforts by Donald Trump’s allies and state Republicans to suppress the vote, undermine our democracy, and spread Trump’s Big Lie about the 2020 election in Nevada. = I’ve always believed that Democrats can win everywhere we can compete — everywhere we can prove that we have the plans to solve the kitchen-table issues facing American families and make progress to improve their lives. Steve proved that back in 2018 when he became the first Democrat elected governor in Nevada in 20 years. The GOP has already spent $2 million working to unseat Steve, and if he’s going to defeat them, he needs resources to keep up and counter their dangerous lies about stolen elections. Steve is relying on folks like you to help take on the MAGA money machine. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Roy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. | | | I had a great time with the Cheshire County GOP this past Saturday and am honored to have the support from former Senate President Tom Eaton and many others at the meeting.
**_Check out the news:_**

---
---
| | | **_
Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.

---

subject: MCPP's New Income Tax Tool – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/incometaxtool?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

With all the tax reform discussion in the state legislature, we have created an interactive tool to allow you to see exactly what the proposed tax plans would mean for you.

It takes just a few seconds to see how each plan would impact your household income. Try it now on our website by clicking below.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=eabef4f026&e=5703353baa)
---
| Our interactive tool allows you to see for yourself how the tax cut plans before the Mississippi legislature compare to one another and the current tax code. In addition, the tool allows you to build your own tax model and see how it compares.

Don’t let mere political talking points fool you. Use our interactive tool to let the math do the talking.

---
| |
---

Best Regards,

Matthew Nicaud

---
| |
---

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: The Vote Just Happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The "California Way"](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorGnJ2VuHqw56rgC0dkXjJalKIkFvoEFXQ3mrjBVRhefw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=1) Yesterday Newsom delivered his State of the State speech. It lasted 17 minutes. Asked to address our state’s problems, the unbearably long-winded Governor had little to say. He certainly had nothing to say about crime. Earlier in the day, I’d held a major press conference to end the Prop. 47 mess Newsom helped create. I then walked into the Capitol for the hearing on the bill. While voters overwhelmingly support it, the radical “Public Safety” Committee killed my bill on a party-line vote. Watch the press conference and committee hearing [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioroivHUkb_HaTqCJWOLN7Y1drIROEpIwr6xyeXMCEA9C5nxSIh2OA_uhXBPWqAARMY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=2). This is far from over. Newsom’s enablers at the LA Times were so worried they devoted their [entire editorial](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharNbB-e1xHH0yx1ytNXx11ks2CruvIEQf6vKktB__JCYTQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=3) to attacking me, even calling the crime problem a “work of fiction.” Our focus now turns to a [ballot initiative](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7bvWEFyTCh_CU-zOAmPP7_JZBjAbl54ocZanC2t5KNcZXQH4TAPAo8_Ci_2mOI6ypdCcUiefWavB3yQC90mzdw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=4) circulating to repeal Prop. 47. One thing in the State of the State did catch my attention. Newsom suddenly wants to "address" gas prices with tax relief. If he's serious, he'll back my bill to suspend the gas tax. Otherwise, it's just the usual puffery. Puffery is how I’d describe a new slogan he rolled out: “The California Way.” That's supposed to be a good thing, like when he told Biden we're a “model for the nation.” In reality, Newsom’s “California Way” is ruining the greatest state in the country. We can’t let it become the “American Way” and ruin the greatest country in the world. [Help me fight for our state and country](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=5) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxdUCrzvoJ12LpmKhJMrxbdR0_prugZUnvqalJNURY1Ng&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar9_final&n=7).

##
**An Update on the Blue Wave Fund**
**Friend,**

I wanted to send you a personal update on the progress of our Blue Wave Fund. So far, we raised $8,124 of the $10,000 we needed in our first week since winning the primary. We're SO CLOSE to hitting our goal!
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Di=20Paola?=
subject: Di Paola for Congress Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. John Di Paola for Congress 2022
body:
The national average gas price has reached a record high. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/427ce7399208/wl0w2dvf9x-15919326?e=b369608f84)
---
| |
---
| | The national average gas price has reached a record high.

Banning Russian energy imports is one of many steps that need to take place to destabilize Putin’s regime. However, Americans do not need to suffer at the pump. The United States is fully capable of increasing domestic production and I continue to call on President Biden to reverse all his policies that have caused gas prices to soar.

Over the last couple of weeks, I’ve continued my journey across the district attending meetings hosted by Linn County and Deschutes County Republicans. We have met incredible people along the way.

**What I’ve Been Up To:**
* In Bend, I sat down with several construction industry leaders to discuss the hurdles contractors face in our state.

* In Lake Oswego, I met with families from a variety of different backgrounds. We discussed solutions, and ways we can partner together to bring common sense back to Washington, D.C.

* I called out Biden’s State of the Union address for the bust it was. As a nation, we are plagued by rampant crime, deadly homelessness, failing schools, unprotected borders, a failing economy, and weak foreign policy that puts all Americans at risk. President Biden failed to acknowledge any of that during his speech. Read more [here](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=68f4a433f4&e=b369608f84).

To learn more about my grassroots campaign, please visit [DiPaolaForCongress.com](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=d2527dba81&e=b369608f84). You can also follow me on social media on [Twitter](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=652c54c561&e=b369608f84), [Facebook](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=4e8c367079&e=b369608f84), and [Instagram](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=ff0848a375&e=b369608f84) to see my latest updates.

Together, we will fight for common sense solutions that make Oregon’s Fifth District a more prosperous place to live.
Dr. John Di Paola,

name: Daniel Hernandez
subject: re: Gabby Giffords
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Please don't delete this email.
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6846?t=6&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S) This is a longer email than usual, but I hope you'll give me the courtesy of reading the whole thing. [**If you don 't have time, I hope you'll at least consider splitting $5 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to win my toss-up district and protect our House Majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6847?t=7&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S) | [**$5,000 NEEDED: SPLIT $5 BEFORE MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6846?t=8&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
---
**As long as I can remember, I 've been committed to public service.** In fact, when I was 18, I volunteered for Hillary Clinton's 2008 campaign for President. Then, as a first-generation college student in 2011, I interned in Congresswoman Gabby Giffords' office.

**Tragically, while I was at an event with Rep. Giffords during that internship, she was shot.** As her staffer, I snapped into action and did everything I could to save her life -- _including being the first to administer first aid before the paramedics took over_. Incredibly, she survived and has become a steadfast advocate for gun reform ever since.

**Now, I'm continuing that legacy of working to create a better Arizona.** First by getting elected to my local school board in the Sunnyside Unified School District, then by winning a seat in the Arizona House of Representatives where I've fought for LGBTQ+ rights, affordable health care, school employees, and so much more.

And now, I'm hoping to bring my tenacity for public service to Congress. **But I can 't win this fight on my own.**
[**My campaign needs to raise $5,000 TODAY to win in toss-up district AZ-06. So I 'm humbly asking: will you split $5 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me get to Congress and save our Democratic House majority? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6847?t=9&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6848?t=10&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6849?t=11&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6850?t=12&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6851?t=13&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6846?t=14&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
Thank you so much.

Daniel Hernandez
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1470%2E878179%2ElR6c3S)

name: Team Caraveo
subject: More proof that our opponents are fighting for Big Oil, not Colorado families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42779697/334299075/-1587983307?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220309epa_tc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2EyMzY4Ni1mMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLNcWAjTftlUiEsz1vw4GFlPDuOMrgyWJAE9VF3sSpQ=)
---
Our opponents are showing their true colors again, Peter. Here’s a quote from one of Dr. Caraveo’s opponents, Barbara Kirkmeyer, at a Republican event last week: _“The EPA, it just needs to go away. . . what would be really great is maybe if we took away this state’s primacy when it comes to EPA so that they can’t pass onerous air quality and water quality regulations on oil and gas.”_ In other words, **our opponent believes that the work EPA does to protect our children’s health and future by regulating environmental pollution is _a burden_ — to fossil fuel companies.** Once again, out-of-touch GOP politicians are siding with corporate greed over the health of Colorado families. [**Make a donation today to ensure they can’t take their harmful stances to Congress and attempt to deregulate fossil fuels.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42779698/334299076/-1587983307?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220309epa_tc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2EyMzY4Ni1mMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLNcWAjTftlUiEsz1vw4GFlPDuOMrgyWJAE9VF3sSpQ=) Big Oil and the fossil fuel industry have gone unchecked for decades, destroying our planet in the name of profit with zero accountability — all because they have bought-and-paid-for Republican politicians in their pocket. Dr. Caraveo sees the consequences of this greed firsthand every day in her pediatrics practice, treating kids who come to her clinic suffering from asthma worsened by wildfires and air pollution. name: Team Harder
subject: A Supreme Court that reflects America
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8RwF1fL6ELQf6WOsvFTthyaTSR8d4ZVgoE0JXjMxDRY=/vHnOV8GWizVkassFcGtew_l9IL4Hm65tyPB55MZjwwE=) | Peter, It is long past time that we had a Supreme Court that reflects the full talents and greatness of our nation. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has had an exceptional career and has seen all sides of the justice system up close - as a federal judge, a public defender, and with family in law enforcement. She is experienced and qualified, and Josh is so proud to stand in support of her confirmation. [**This is a historic milestone! Will you take a moment to add your name to the growing number of Americans asking the Senate to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8RwF1fL6ELQf6WOsvFTthyaTSR8d4ZVgoE0JXjMxDRY=/vHnOV8GWizVkassFcGtew_l9IL4Hm65tyPB55MZjwwE=) **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8RwF1fL6ELQf6WOsvFTthyaTSR8d4ZVgoE0JXjMxDRY=/SeOLq0mzt93v9g0BfXaUrQxYnMaJgAoxxKBxTmjYmEk=)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/8RwF1fL6ELQf6WOsvFTthyaTSR8d4ZVgoE0JXjMxDRY=/vHnOV8GWizVkassFcGtew_l9IL4Hm65tyPB55MZjwwE=) A daughter of two public school teachers and administrators, Judge Jackson rose through our justice system from a public defender to a federal appellate judge. Her extraordinary qualifications also include serving as a Justice Breyer's law clerk and being nominated by President Obama to serve as the Vice Chair of the U.S. Sentencing Commission. She was confirmed 3 times with bipartisan support by the U.S. Senate - even Republicans like Paul Ryan have praised her intellect and said her integrity is unequivocal. In addition to her robust experience, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is now the first Black woman nominated to the highest court in the land. **This is a huge and important moment, Peter!** Since the creation of the Supreme Court in 1789, America has had 115 Justices - and only seven of them have been women or people of color. Josh believes having a diverse Supreme Court is crucial to promoting a justice system that serves everyone in our country. This nomination couldn't have come at a more important time, with several extremely important issues pending before the Supreme Court right now. [**Will you stand with Josh and ask the Senate to promptly confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8RwF1fL6ELQf6WOsvFTthyaTSR8d4ZVgoE0JXjMxDRY=/vHnOV8GWizVkassFcGtew_l9IL4Hm65tyPB55MZjwwE=) Thank you for your advocacy,
Team Harder

| | Peter, Abortion is health care — but right now, Republicans across the country are doing everything they can to chip away at the right to an abortion. As we fight back against anti-abortion legislation and regressive attempts to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , we must also recognize the key individuals who work to provide lifesaving care to patients amidst political pressures, anti-choice harassment and threats of violence. **That’s why I am proud to introduce the Abortion Provider Appreciation Day resolution in Congress —** honoring abortion providers and clinic staff who continue to show their courage while facing obstacles to performing their important work every day. [_**Peter, will you add your name to show your support for the fight to protect the safety of abortion care providers and their patients?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42779823/334299678/-157337514?refcode=em_20220309_p_a_repro&ms=em_20220309_p_a_repro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDMzOWNmMi1mMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLS3DswleYWepvnhg30Lz7RCEztkDBPSAFPlwjyr32k=&emci=912de77d-e89f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e0339cf2-f09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22034926) Here in Michigan, abortion will be restricted severely should the GOP — and the most conservative Supreme Court we’ve seen in our lifetimes — succeed in overturning _Roe_. At the same time, abortion providers and clinic staff at organizations like Planned Parenthood are the targets of right-wing attacks and risk being defunded should these restrictions go into effect. I will always stand for reproductive rights for all. **All people deserve the right to an abortion, no matter what.** And we have to look out for those who provide them. [_**Peter, join me in the fight to protect reproductive freedoms and the safety of essential abortion providers. Sign your name today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42779826/334299679/-157337514?refcode=em_20220309_p_a_repro&ms=em_20220309_p_a_repro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDMzOWNmMi1mMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLS3DswleYWepvnhg30Lz7RCEztkDBPSAFPlwjyr32k=&emci=912de77d-e89f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e0339cf2-f09f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22034926) Let’s go!

clean_body: I need to know if you’re with me in this fight, Peter. | | | | | Peter, Abortion is health care — but right now, Republicans across the country are doing everything they can to chip away at the right to an abortion. As we fight back against anti-abortion legislation and regressive attempts to overturn Roe v. Wade , we must also recognize the key individuals who work to provide lifesaving care to patients amidst political pressures, anti-choice harassment and threats of violence. That’s why I am proud to introduce the Abortion Provider Appreciation Day resolution in Congress — honoring abortion providers and clinic staff who continue to show their courage while facing obstacles to performing their important work every day. Here in Michigan, abortion will be restricted severely should the GOP — and the most conservative Supreme Court we’ve seen in our lifetimes — succeed in overturning Roe. At the same time, abortion providers and clinic staff at organizations like Planned Parenthood are the targets of right-wing attacks and risk being defunded should these restrictions go into effect. I will always stand for reproductive rights for all. All people deserve the right to an abortion, no matter what. And we have to look out for those who provide them. Let’s go! | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

**_Florida’s hateful “Don’t Say Gay” bill has landed on Republican Governor Ron DeSantis’ desk, Peter, and he is moments away from enshrining this horrific bill into law._**

The Florida GOP thinks they can erase LGBTQ+ Floridians by banning discussion of sexual orientation and gender identity in schools. They think they can shove us into hiding. _They think they can make us ashamed of who we are._

It’s supporters of this bill who should be ashamed, Peter.

**This is not a matter of parental concern for educational content, it is yet another line item on the GOP’s hateful political agenda.**

I’m so proud and grateful to see so many young Floridians take a stand against the GOP’s bigotry. The walkouts prove what we’ve always known: the GOP’s hate is unfounded, unpopular, and unwarranted.

As a queer Black woman, I understand firsthand the destructive toll of anti-gay discrimination and hate. LGBTQ+ youth are among the most vulnerable demographics in the country, being victim to high rates of bullying, homelessness, and suicide.

Further marginalizing them is despicable. **Our youth deserve better.**

[Peter, the state has turned their back on our children, so we must rely on the federal government to step up and protect our kids from hate. That’s why I’m running for Congress – because no child should be made a victim to the GOP’s hateful agenda. name: American Firebrand
subject: American Firebrand Newsletter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FIREBRAND PAC
body:
# **Fight to Win **
**NEW PODCASTS** The 2016 election was a national backlash to the destruction wrought by globalism. This kicked off a feverish effort by elites to discredit patriotism and the cause of our own country, advocating instead for worship of government, bureaucracy, and global institutions. Join Paige Willey on THIS YOUR COUNTRY as she lays out the stakes of the ultimate matchup: globalism vs. sovereignty. On AMERICA'S MOMENT, Molly McCann discusses the financial implications of the Ukraine crisis and how Biden's action on sanctions threatens the U.S. dollar's status as the world reserve currency. **LISTEN NOW! **[Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btlhryk-ihhjkhtyud-r/)[ ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btlhryk-ihhjkhtyud-y/) [Spotify ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btlhryk-ihhjkhtyud-j/) | **New Podcast **
# Globalism vs. Sovereignty
**March 7th **Paige shares a stunning revelation from Anthony Fauci's performance during a White House Task Force meeting that illustrates how seriously globalism harms the American public. Devotion to globalism also harms American credibility, as heard in clips contrasting Biden staffers' frivolous platitudes with Trump's no-nonsense rhetoric. Americans must decide which will rule our future: globalism or sovereignty? [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btlhryk-ihhjkhtyud-t/)
---

**New Podcast **
# Ukraine & America's Status as World Reserve Currency
**March 4th **Molly discusses the very real threat to the U.S. Dollar as the global reserve currency and shares Steve Cortes's excellent [Substack ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btlhryk-ihhjkhtyud-i/)piece explaining the stakes. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btlhryk-ihhjkhtyud-d/)
---

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Securing the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
It’s a matter of life and death NOT a campaign slogan Friend, For over fifteen years, my family farm has been under siege by drug cartels, human traffickers, and the cartels that employ them. We’ve had our family vehicle stolen, our neighbor murdered, and been evacuated from our home by law enforcement on more than one occassion due to credible death threats against my family. Under President Trump, we finally began to see the situation improve, and I had the opportunity to personally thank him for what he was doing when we spoke in 2020. Since Biden took office, however, my family is back to living the same nightmare – and it’s as bad as ever. I’m done waiting for the Biden administration to do something about our border crisis. That’s why I’m taking matters into my own hands and running for Attorney General. **We will get the wall built, declare cartels as terrorists, and punish criminals to the fullest extent of the law.****My opponents say Joe Biden won’t let us do any of this. I say MAKE HIM STOP US. ** **Will you chip in to help me fight for a secure border and a safer Arizona?** [**Chip in clean_body: It’s a matter of life and death NOT a campaign slogan Friend, For over fifteen years, my family farm has been under siege by drug cartels, human traffickers, and the cartels that employ them. We’ve had our family vehicle stolen, our neighbor murdered, and been evacuated from our home by law enforcement on more than one occassion due to credible death threats against my family. Under President Trump, we finally began to see the situation improve, and I had the opportunity to personally thank him for what he was doing when we spoke in 2020. Since Biden took office, however, my family is back to living the same nightmare – and it’s as bad as ever. I’m done waiting for the Biden administration to do something about our border crisis. That’s why I’m taking matters into my own hands and running for Attorney General. We will get the wall built, declare cartels as terrorists, and punish criminals to the fullest extent of the law.My opponents say Joe Biden won’t let us do any of this. I say MAKE HIM STOP US. Will you chip in to help me fight for a secure border and a safer Arizona? - We cannot afford to lose the position of Arizona’s top cop to a Democrat or a weak Republican who simply says “we can’t do that.” The road ahead will not be easy, but I won't stop fighting until every Arizonan can go to sleep without fear of cartels, gangs or criminals. Thank you, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

Fellow American,

This race is not about me.

This is about saving our country and the great state of Georgia from President Biden's disastrous agenda which has led to higher prices, out-of-control crime, dangerous open borders, and 'America Last' foreign policy.

And unfortunately, my Senate opponent has been there supporting this agenda every step of the way.

**Weak leaders create bad results.**

Fellow American, are you sick and tired of politicians not being held accountable for their actions? **_I am._**

That is why I am so excited to announce that I have officially filed paperwork to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate in Georgia.

we're mounting a serious campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42786248/334350213/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGYxOGQ1Mi0xZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIgtZZXq7rFwRZiMDsV3k7iRT3GJ30PSlPMXt_F0ca4=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/358f09b3-1ea0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/30f18d52-1fa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGYxOGQ1Mi0xZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIgtZZXq7rFwRZiMDsV3k7iRT3GJ30PSlPMXt_F0ca4=&id=124172018)._ Friend,

Here are a few updates directly from campaign HQ. **» We're mounting a serious campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.** Marisa's campaign was unanimously endorsed by the California Democratic Party. Central Valley voters know McCarthy has been horrible. Now they know there's a viable Democrat running against him.

**» McCarthy is blanketing our community with misleading information about his record, but he can't hide from the truth.** He’s so desperate to become Speaker that he's threatening to punish any Democrat who tried to hold Trump and his cronies accountable. He's also ignoring disgusting behavior from Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar. _That’s the real McCarthy._

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Another redistricting challenge
body:
Summer has overcome challenges before. Now, we have to do it again.
#
Peter,
Late last year, we were right by Summer Lee’s side as she launched her campaign for Congress. Just a few weeks ago, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court split the communities Summer currently represents in the PA State House in two.
**The new map carved Summer’s home out of the district she was running in by just a few feet.** Now, Summer’s running in Pennsylvania’s 12th Congressional District and we’re rallying behind her to keep her organizing program as strong as ever. The PA Supreme Court decision set off a sprint to collect petition signatures before March 15 so Summer can qualify for the ballot. Team Summer has been working tirelessly, amassing thousands of signatures so far.
Then, it’s another sprint to the May primary.
[Peter, we need your help right now to power Summer’s campaign amidst these big challenges. Can you split a $3 contribution to Summer’s campaign and Justice Democrats today to fuel Summer to victory in May?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97122?refcode=em20220309-22326&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97122?refcode=em20220309-22326&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd)**
The movement behind Summer and Justice Democrats has overcome so many challenges, but we continue our fight. What happened to Summer’s district — her home and communities divided, splitting up the very precinct and block she lives on — is another serious challenge that we’ll have to overcome. We know there are barriers to Black women and working-class candidates of color running grassroots campaigns for political office. **But together, we are strong enough to win.**
We have a lot of work to do in all of our remaining primaries, but Summer’s race in Pennsylvania this May is the very next election. Summer needs your support if she’s going to scale up, get the signatures she needs to get on the ballot, and win this race. **[Can you split a donation to Summer and Justice Democrats today to fuel us to victory in PA-12?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97122?refcode=em20220309-22326&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220309-22326-footer&t=24&refcode2=22326_1203867_Peghcd&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd)**
---

JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=22326%2E1203867%2EPeghcd)
