body:
In a new TV ad, I let folks know how being a mom prepared me to take on the radical left and the challenge of leading the state of Arkansas | |
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=2d3f64e650fd4b59b4b36ed1b7136b5c&_e=hrohUynCdXT_HZPnpEULbBQbNoHdta365EfoBV_N3S9U4nhQwzzoF8qBojHWjtdTfkZnQ5Vxly-NqPI29-wIqpHt9xjlIhM7V_o5z3EDWYu3PChrp0joVxMxRDnkYQra1jRKMogn_sxRLyXGwQSjAO2BIirVU2U9eomxaGhMJHu9nSySavxho8GZ8iwCNYhfy7JIX_HuCZZxBNjzkLmyRgCCEmXSB2DjklhDc94zQ4wd_VGuQXlrNrHRn7CR0FDTOFQIWLKp6FvKbRgwpfolOgy7FYi5JhLv21YYXKOj_QtgN7f97zFuYhkjKXLgygZ4GQDh8AwleYjRe-tjUccGtgq_4YU7orAjYeDpXeRfNeDwkvpTomtlkLIG0EkTbzvYMiUZDdHbPZDZMpYIxJ06cuFdX-DAzDPFKU6_x9Qn7ks%3D)
Peter,

As White House press secretary, I had to say no... _a lot_.

But, as all moms know, having young children was the perfect preparation.

In a new TV ad, I let folks know how being a mom prepared me to take on the radical left and the challenge of leading the state of Arkansas (and why I might have to put parental controls on CNN)...
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=2d3f64e650fd4b59b4b36ed1b7136b5c&_e=hrohUynCdXT_HZPnpEULbBQbNoHdta365EfoBV_N3S9U4nhQwzzoF8qBojHWjtdTfkZnQ5Vxly-NqPI29-wIqpHt9xjlIhM7V_o5z3EDWYu3PChrp0joVxMxRDnkYQra1jRKMogn_sxRLyXGwQSjAO2BIirVU2U9eomxaGhMJHu9nSySavxho8GZ8iwCNYhfy7JIX_HuCZZxBNjzkLmyRtNkaSXBL0gd5RhdxhNhIFFkKqSyTn1zeMcw6Yn_pLHP-E048PfZSd6QM44jTpjYDrZpAJOUJO-x3dSyROIX4q4Z0WxQf5sfksAv8TAyg3CChU_9zD_wF8IH8CS3FwigXdfqdE0zGpK6Y_bhPlbUIeprp6mCLT14jQLAdROjQBSS5M50QRGPusUckyotZoY-Xfyo0P4EsJhZv37eK1iQfHY%3D)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=2d3f64e650fd4b59b4b36ed1b7136b5c&_e=hrohUynCdXT_HZPnpEULbBQbNoHdta365EfoBV_N3S9U4nhQwzzoF8qBojHWjtdTfkZnQ5Vxly-NqPI29-wIqpHt9xjlIhM7V_o5z3EDWYu3PChrp0joVxMxRDnkYQra1jRKMogn_sxRLyXGwQSjAO2BIirVU2U9eomxaGhMJHu9nSySavxho8GZ8iwCNYhfy7JIX_HuCZZxBNjzkLmyRrjPzvywxhJRSyBio6KZ9wBb7H_j9pw0uE7dF6P3lQ0rnKTUOo2ZvBV83UmatrQItMCQWqmev6u0islAZqHVmgClfnhFCouVOsvNl2-nGb6Lz7twhQqgGeNAaQ6pBfd7zpnf0WB8cs2IpP5f07URZTjOKl7o4xS8QxfGV4oL_d63WYndGXF2O0tdwfsc7H_8dTcPLTyO7DLWrWvqkUsDa6U%3D)
Peter, as governor, I’ll say NO to Biden and the radical left, but YES to good schools, lower taxes, and higher paying jobs.

Together, we’ll win the fight for our freedom and our kids’ future.

**[Give the new ad a watch and then share it on social media.](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=2d3f64e650fd4b59b4b36ed1b7136b5c&_e=hrohUynCdXT_HZPnpEULbBQbNoHdta365EfoBV_N3S9U4nhQwzzoF8qBojHWjtdTfkZnQ5Vxly-NqPI29-wIqpHt9xjlIhM7V_o5z3EDWYu3PChrp0joVxMxRDnkYQra1jRKMogn_sxRLyXGwQSjAO2BIirVU2U9eomxaGhMJHu9nSySavxho8GZ8iwCNYhfy7JIX_HuCZZxBNjzkLmyRsCVDyv0mJ6bEMQyjcPKokCHeUoHa2vQv20l7LfMWXhXYkoRbIWStDLDvjHzfSaqSRw0LBvdTOfQSWOv557xJGdsDSomLHPi_uy7Zj-t309qaV-bnGLgEvCivE9xiuYTZvnkeDSnZobZVZhXMxTdTPY7n8Fp_yTRyAQ0EPQ2bgY7xKmuM7WkTUmW72emX9wz1rgTMh9lFlx6rN1Ta_Qs13M%3D)**

Sarah

But, as all moms know, having young children was the perfect preparation. In a new TV ad, I let folks know how being a mom prepared me to take on the radical left and the challenge of leading the state of Arkansas (and why I might have to put parental controls on CNN)... Peter, as governor, I’ll say NO to Biden and the radical left, but YES to good schools, lower taxes, and higher paying jobs. Together, we’ll win the fight for our freedom and our kids’ future. body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Beto is on the road right now! He’s driving across the state to meet with
voters, listen to the people of Texas, and share his positive vision for
our state.

But here’s the deal: It costs hundreds of thousands of dollars to put on
these statewide drives. We need to pay for travel, venues, and
transportation, invite everyone to make sure folks know Beto is coming,
get the word out to the local media, and more!

But it’s all worth it because we generate a lot of buzz every time Beto
makes a stop, and it gives him a chance to connect directly with thousands
of new or undecided voters.

While Abbott tries to divide and distract us, we are focused on uniting
Texans around a shared vision for great jobs, world-class schools,
affordable health care, and a future where everyone in this state can live

of $3 right now to keep Beto on the road, sharing his

Thank you,

— Beto HQ

[ ]Contribute $3 While Abbott tries to divide and distract us, we are focused on uniting Texans around a shared vision for great jobs, world-class schools, affordable health care, and a future where everyone in this state can live to their full potential. In order to elect Beto governor in November and defeat Greg Abbott, we need a massive influx of grassroots contributions to take on the over $50 million that Abbott has in the bank. [ ]The future of Texas is on the line. Please make your first donation of $3 right now to keep Beto on the road, sharing his positive vision for Texas with voters. Thank you, — Beto HQ

name: Morgan Harper
subject: I’m honored to announce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Adding to the ranks of our movement
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220309-770-footer-ak&t=2&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)
Hey,
I’m honored to announce that our campaign to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate has been endorsed by We Have The People!
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29355?t=28&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)
I’m so excited to have their support. This comes after exciting endorsements from Collective PAC, Brand New Congress, Elect Black Women PAC, the Progressive Change Campaign Committee – and many more.
**[This amounts to one clear thing: momentum. Can you help us keep it up by making a contribution to our campaign right now?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29355?t=29&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29361?refcode=em20220309-770&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=48&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)**
The end of this month is our final end-of-quarter deadline before our primary election. That’s a huge deal because it’s the last time we publicly report how much we’ve raised before voters go to the polls, and it’s a big marker of how strong this movement is.
Our opponents on both sides, from moderate Tim Ryan to far-right radicals like Josh Mandel and J.D. Vance, are bankrolled by corporate PACs and big businesses. **Our campaign is only funded by grassroots donations, so you know exactly where I stand.** We have to keep pace with them to ensure our message gets to voters, and that means any momentum we have depends on folks like you stepping up.
**[So with our major deadline coming up on March 31, I have to ask: Could you chip in to our campaign today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29355?t=49&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)**
We’re building a movement to elect the first Black woman from Ohio to the Senate — thank you for being a part of it.
Together,
Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220309-770-footer&t=50&refcode2=770_90090_eB-oKa&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=51&akid=770%2E90090%2EeB-oKa)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

subject: What if you knew...

body:
How about if you knew NBC and FiveThirtyEight had named us one of the races most likely to decide “control of the Senate”
#

**$3.**
What if you knew a $3 contribution meant winning this race and expanding the majority?
If that same $3 meant we passed legislation that’s currently being blocked in a 50-50 Senate — like voting rights, lower prescription drug prices, reproductive freedom and climate action — wouldn’t it be worth it?
And how about if you knew NBC and FiveThirtyEight had named us one of the races most likely to decide “control of the Senate” — meaning your $3 could guarantee that Mitch McConnell does not become majority leader again?
That’s what’s possible in this race if we elect Cheri Beasley. So knowing all this, doesn’t it seem worth $3?

name: Ben Samuels
subject: This is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,
Yesterday, on International Women's Day, a Missouri lawmaker announced a measure to make it legal for private citizens to personally sue women who have left Missouri in search of abortion care. This is dangerous, anti-choice extremism, and it must be stopped.
That means anti-choice members of the public will have a financial incentive for suing women who have had abortions out of state.
There is a way to fight back—Vote anti-choice representatives out of power. Ann Wagner has spent her time in Congress fighting against bodily autonomy. She is an outspoken anti-choice advocate, and if she had her way, no woman would likely have access to abortion care. We need to replace Wagner with a pro-choice advocate.
I know that is a big project, but I am running for Congress because I am sick of watching radicals like Ann Wagner. It will take a lot to overcome this, but I know wholeheartedly that with your help, we will stop this measure from passing and vote Wagner OUT. Will you help me win this race and replace anti-choice Republican Ann Wagner? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs-rr?refcode=220309-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Our government has no business trying to legislate what people do with their bodies, AND there are crucial things that it could be doing to impact our lives positively.
I decided a while ago I am finished watching far-right extremists shred away every right we have. I am done letting them weaken and destroy our democracy. Are you with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs-rr?refcode=220309-email]
Don't lose hope. This fight is far from over.
Ben Samuels
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.

_**Americans EVERYWHERE are at RISK.**_

Radical Left movements to Defund the Police are STILL alive and well across our nation, and the situation is only getting worse. THAT is just one of the countless reasons why it is critical that you show your support for Republicans ASAP.

**We are approaching the end of the FIRST quarter in March, and our numbers are just not where they need to be.** We have to post our numbers for ALL of our competition to see in just 20 days, and if we don’t have a strong showing - **Nancy Pelosi will know that the 2022 election is for the taking.**
[**CHIP IN $15 TO SHOW PELOSI WE'RE WOINNING!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0d11d04a9fa84789970a010290ee2b51&_e=CcebCa0Hb3kMjb4qHkV6tiRs27ngnNVzw9g1YAlSSf3mimY5OIpWXbbseQ31B_oxOoh2_iZrbDOXo2PIHlXocMdWGDhWdtyEQUOK92e6THr91Ir6988MYQRXCmQQWa3uOyc-WIks-HItN79UO4-O17xhoELLlE2ThdaRrB9YCCzCMMV9xS_UWlSLWtW8gBNSvrx3NtJfOuMXUDQ70JbLB9gnjlprj54auiZWx6S29pHAOSFN3pbobaz8faDAOstHSylTXO4WUx3Kg7DdYBuyOg0YfWm2YkB9VrjtELpEfkX1mNE92z65HiBtHkMq2cVi0uKAANnecbH7tRvWhLFMncp6BAYTsPnZPll7GJKkK3ceqiHLM-cjgwL9z4LnsQSbiuVYIOJiyAPwgPBOFHEXJZeOZ79O_8XwD7WDMhH1TJ6zc27W_1XKu59-CJCSITK4e8qvl_xxm9lo1WemCU3QJ2twcogMGwrWLfuaLkYc6WXMXnO1E1J8rlylVKF_I3KQnufdj1iqW1JS9q5Rt80zVNJm3BgHoEGtP1VfTl-Qp1tPJiRRvbpB6xHi3tfoyzhQ)

That means NO safety for our families and communities, no action against skyrocketing inflation and gas prices, and NO consideration for the American people.

Friends,

I think we can all agree that partisan gerrymandering is a travesty and takes away the voice of the voters. The NY Democrats are at it again and have re-drawn Nicole Malliotakis’ district so they can protect their slim House Majority.

**This is WRONG!**

She needs patriots to step up and help her fight back against this blatant partisan Gerrymandering. I worked side by side with her in the New York State Assembly and know she is one of the few leaders left in Washington that puts the interests of people she serves before anything else.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue=20Updates?=
subject: Important context on polling
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=60786e60f5&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Fox News released their latest poll of the Georgia Governor’s race. The headline is Kemp leads 50-39.

This headline is misleading at best. First, this poll was taken of ALL Republican voters, not just Republican Primary voters. Second, when you look at the details, there are a couple of observations that more accurately depict where this race is currently.

Roughly three times as many Republicans vote in the general election as compared to the Republican Primary.

This makes the following two data points very meaningful:
* 54% of all Republicans polled say they are “extremely interested.” This is the group most likely to vote in the upcoming Republican Primary. In this group, Perdue leads 49-42.

* 57% of all Republicans polled say they are “extremely favorable” of Trump. And 79% are “extremely favorable” or “favorable” of Trump. In the “extremely favorable” group, 87% say that they will definitely vote and Perdue leads 52-39.

Given that only just over 50% of Republican Primary voters are aware that Trump has endorsed Perdue, Perdue's support will continue to grow as that message gets out. Advertising, combined with President Trump’s engagement in this race and organization on the ground, will put Perdue over the top.

**This race is just beginning to kick into high gear, and Perdue is well-positioned for victory on May 24.**
---

name: Protect Liberty USA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Educating our children honestly
body:
We produced the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum—and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. | _*Sponsored Message*_
| | [](https://links.protectlibertyusa.com/u/click?_t=e0d37d6491ea40e1bef88ebef6b63c58&_m=106ca311225b49d0907e68523938501d&_e=scEz-VAc4XYhaoO7p1cyiyTx0KZH1a1DHMDULoZbAK0FWg1wZGckrhofqHSaAm1yDDv-wDxf_-8u982aEslCbl88frDnQ-fJ-7x6m2kR1GC7dio493aX2lznUq48OLfdTLYn9zKQu2aM2oHc6CwnsvuavzQUFOXDrEw-kXLkgukvQ7dbaj7KImBTcJod_kzVfxv0yfyi-AxPdNZvo5vZckLpgZGg04cl4wwNUyc1YOPr9s2Gy-l3xextFhx7oEPDEa89AjyLJ_xEP1b8fbxsZIt-adPle0CSJFY0gUcUCiMPmajaxJyg4z5Rau1RSpbxW-BDYA1Y_fYz5FSo6oX4TRCKy7H-84-AY2LSxyXfGKjK7ltuit4fsIS9Ru92fNZXnKx660QRr3mekxhDkGwuMrnq-4KNSH5tD1EgQINpMeWpk_VnH5Zqij0SLgK7_crH0QD4OQMhW4ReuuJ0FXEPpwgbFuEEtWlD4Z4fOHRI13w1PaKKbUch4diRBVskSVuq)
---

| |
Dear Fellow American,
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point.
In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools.
As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats?
Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history?
We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future.
For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide.
**What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? **
The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively.
This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available **free of charge**.
To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children.
It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844.
And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact.
_We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts—including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _
That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible.
One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty.
We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.”
With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide.
Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_
Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today.
**I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: **
_**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](https://links.protectlibertyusa.com/u/click?_t=e0d37d6491ea40e1bef88ebef6b63c58&_m=106ca311225b49d0907e68523938501d&_e=scEz-VAc4XYhaoO7p1cyiyTx0KZH1a1DHMDULoZbAK0FWg1wZGckrhofqHSaAm1yDDv-wDxf_-8u982aEslCbl88frDnQ-fJ-7x6m2kR1GC7dio493aX2lznUq48OLfdTLYn9zKQu2aM2oHc6CwnsvuavzQUFOXDrEw-kXLkgukvQ7dbaj7KImBTcJod_kzVfxv0yfyi-AxPdNZvo5vZckLpgZGg04cl4wwNUyc1YOPr9s2Gy-l3xextFhx7oEPDEa89AjyLJ_xEP1b8fbxsZIt-adPle0CSJFY0gUcUCiNjk-jg5rLcqMUGp_1-uUFQvp0E4z0j2yf-UCIOuJdQFo1T83wub1sGMQF2LjE43I_NMG-X22GowvmigJQJVeF0S9EeHsuyIB5-_9Dtw84BNnztDqpMOAaJNlPNIYiBM3YOV8g4ZoIvyTr2N2O4CN3Pg2iGjvfB8_mydb3zUIKzw07uyeTpSVYg1Q9q_iGsdn7WoliNQZnjznwErHRp6FwI)**_
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

10660 Page Ave #65
Fairfax, VA 22038

[unsubscribe](https://links.protectlibertyusa.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e0d37d6491ea40e1bef88ebef6b63c58&_s=106ca311225b49d0907e68523938501d&_t=K_8dmwz2yiVW-KVYz9fbPsgxV4sQRQxQpzLoJiJYrrTqa6bmVxgXs_SnNL4CVLJygh_UGd0Gs4WvOiX7bOepT45ryHMDG1wGpnlPX9uq67TtdeI_HWToxo2IgmRbVQGLSQCNmS7ENJ2wwgDDom7ThMNZWUuTBszK6KEUMq2yJKY%3D)

name: Erica Smith
subject: [Add your name] Making history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

In
historical news last month, President Biden announced his nominee for the
Supreme Court: Kentanji Brown Jackson.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220309-SCOTUS-nomination-petition?refcode=em20220309-1&t=1001&akid=971%2E3698%2E2ikMkR ][IMG]

Judge Jackson would be the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court
and for Black women this representation is long overdue.

As a Black woman, this is so meaningful to me. Representation like this
matters. It means something to see someone who looks like you in the
highest court in the land.

I’ve devoted my whole career to breaking barriers in my own community and
I’m inspired to see Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson get the opportunity she
deserves. She is more than just a symbol of progress, she’s a smart, hard
working and extremely qualified judge. And it’s clear that she’ll fight
for folks across the country on the Supreme Court.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220309-SCOTUS-nomination-petition?refcode=em20220309-1&t=1002&akid=971%2E3698%2E2ikMkR ]Please join me as we call on the Senate to confirm Judge Jackson to the
Supreme Court by adding your name right now. We cannot wait any longer for
a progressive Black woman to be on the Supreme Court.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220309-SCOTUS-nomination-petition?refcode=em20220309-971&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=971%2E3698%2E2ikMkR ]Add your name →

This is about so much more than just making history by having the first
Black woman on the Supreme Court. This will *literally* determine the
shape of our country over the next few decades.

Right now Roe v. Wade is under constant attack and it’s clear we need to
swiftly confirm Judge Jackson to protect reproductive justice across the
country.

To make history and ensure that Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson is confirmed,
we *must* work together.

It’s clear that she’ll already face an all out brawl from Republicans in
the Senate and you can bet they’ll do everything they can to block
President Biden’s nomination.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220309-SCOTUS-nomination-petition?refcode=em20220309-1&t=1004&akid=971%2E3698%2E2ikMkR ]Please add your name to our petition urging the Senate to confirm Judge
Jackson. It’ll take less than a minute and we’re most powerful when we
combine our voices.

In solidarity,

Erica ❤️

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220309-971-footer&t=1005&refcode2=971_3698_2ikMkR&akid=971%2E3698%2E2ikMkR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=971%2E3698%2E2ikMkR

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

name: Team Lira
subject: Things are about to get difficult
body:
Peter, now the real race of the general begins.

Things are going to get very difficult from here on out. We’re going to need your support from now, all the way through to November. Can you chip in $9 now to get us through the next 9 months? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220309?refcode=em20220309]

This is an important hold for Republicans. TX-23 is one of the biggest districts in terms of land and a majority rural, meaning they have been relying on it to stay red for years.

We know just how important this district, and the people who make it what it is, have been and that’s why we are standing with John to fight for it.

Peter, John is going to be enemy #1 as far as the GOP is concerned in their battle to keep this district red. It’s going to take everything we’ve got to fend off the type of attacks we’re about to start seeing.

Together we can flip this district, a key to help border relations and so much more in Texas. It’s time to unite as TX-23 to win back our district, our state and our country.

This is where the real fight begins. Make a $9 donation right now to help power our efforts as this race moves into the most important stage yet.

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220309?refcode=em20220309]

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

Did you hear? Our grassroots campaign has officially been endorsed by the California Democratic Party! Because of you, our effort is growing momentum each day.

Kevin Mullin

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: 🇺🇸 On the road again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I’m happy to announce another endorsement from a local business owner and patriot. Eric Weeldreyer is co-owner of On Target Guns & Gunsmithing. | | | |
---
| | | Hello Peter!

Reporting from the campaign trail... I’m happy to announce another endorsement from a local business owner and patriot. Eric Weeldreyer is co-owner of On Target Guns & Gunsmithing in Kalamazoo. He’s weathered Whitmer’s shutdowns like other small businesses in our state.
---
|
---
| As you know, I’m a strong supporter of our second amendment rights, and I’ve pledged as Governor to sign constitutional carry legislation the moment it hits my desk. I’m grateful for Eric’s endorsement. This is what he had to say:

> “We as citizens need protection from criminals, good roads to drive on, a safety net for those truly in need, and a good work ethic. The government that governs least governs best. Captain Mike embodies those virtues. He has my backing in life and for the office of governor. On any given issue people will feel differently, but pandering to certain groups for political goals is wrong. Only people with a working moral compass know this and behave accordingly. Captain Mike has this. You can trust him.” **Eric Weeldreyer**
> _On Target Guns & Gunsmithing_
Earlier in the week, I ran into these nice ladies representing freedom at the Michigan State Capitol. What an inspirational talk with them.
---
|
---
| In Niles, Michigan I chatted with members of the Bend of the River Conservation Club, including Charles Tidey.
---
|
---
---
| Then later in the week the Farmington Area Republicans hosted me at their regular meeting.
---
|
---
| Finally, I wrapped up the week on a beautiful day in Southwest Michigan adding some more signatures to our petitions which we’ll be submitting soon.

We hung out in front of Baroda Party Store in Baroda, Michigan and had a great response from the good folks visiting them. Our sign with "Dump Whitmer" on it helped pull people in. We even had Baroda's own Republican County Commissioner Teri Sue Freehling stop by.
---
|
---
---
| Overall it was another excellent week of campaigning in this beautiful state of ours. Stay tuned for some big news coming soon.

Stay safe Michigan. See you on the campaign trail.

**Michael Brown**
Conservative Republican
for Governor
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT THE CAMPAIGN AT OUR WEBSITE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=768e6107bd&e=0636b97700 "LEARN MORE ABOUT THE CAMPAIGN AT OUR WEBSITE")
